As the GOP threatens to cut it, we’re fighting to keep its promise by demanding Congress take immediate action to protect Social Security.

name: Jonathon Nave
subject: Will you help Pat Herrity get on the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hi Peter,

It's Jonathon -- Pat Herrity's campaign manager.

Pat is a commonsense, conservative leader who has defended our values against progressives in Northern Virginia for years on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors.

As the last Republican standing in Fairfax, Pat has proven that he knows how to win tough elections in a Democrat area without compromising on our conservative values.

As our nominee for Lieutenant Governor in 2025, Pat will continue to move the needle in Northern Virginia and help our Republican ticket get the support we need to win all three of our statewide elected offices.

But before we can get there, Pat needs your help.

We're required to collect 10,000 signatures from registered voters across Virginia in order for Pat's name to be listed on the ballot.

So I'm writing today to ask that you consider volunteering just a little of your time to collect signatures from your friends and neighbors to get Pat on the ballot.

**Will you volunteer some time to help?**

---
| [Click here to volunteer](mailto:jnave@patforva.com?subject=I'll%20help%20Pat%20get%20on%20the%20ballot!&body=Jonathon%2C%0A%0APlease%20send%20me%20petition%20forms%20and%20information%20on%20how%20to%20help! "Click here to volunteer")
---
|
Click the button above or reply directly to this email, and I'll send you everything you need to help collect signatures and make sure that Pat gets on the ballot!

Peter -- Even collecting just a dozen signatures from your closest friends and family will make a big difference towards the 10,000 we need.

If you're not able to help with signatures, I'd ask that you consider [making a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or even as much as $100](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=7fc208c25d&e=a1ea0f9c99) to cover the many expenses of running a campaign, and ensure that Pat is in the strongest possible position to defeat the Democrats' nominee in November.

However you are able to help, we're extremely grateful for your support of Pat's campaign.

I look forward to working with you this year to ensure that we continue Governor Youngkin's commonsense, conservative legacy by electing Pat Herrity as our next Lieutenant Governor, reelecting Jason Miyares as our Attorney General, and getting Winsome Earle-Sears into the Governor's mansion.

Thank you!

**Jonathon Nave**
Campaign Manager | Pat Herrity for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=293935b782&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Donate")
---
| | | | | | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=391ee26ed1&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=95d9284f1c&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](www.patforva.com)
---
| | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152
[Add us to your address book](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=e4de38972e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=e4de38972e)

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: did you see Josh’s email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Hey there,

Did you see Josh’s email?

This campaign is built on listening to what’s on the minds of the hardworking people who live here in Jersey. Josh knows that good ideas come from everyone — not just those in charge. That’s why he needs to hear from you!

Please, take a moment to fill out this survey and share your thoughts on the challenges facing people here in Jersey! [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/prisv-2501]

TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/prisv-2501]

We can’t do this without you. Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: One way you can help Californians affected by this disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | Friend, The scenes of devastating wildfires in Southern California are heartbreaking. As first responders continue to fight the flames and save lives, my fellow Californians affected by this disaster are in my prayers. I always say that our firefighters are our nobility. We must give them the respect and support that they deserve. In the days and weeks ahead, we must all come together to assist with the immediate needs and recovery for impacted California communities. [_**If you’d like to help, please consider splitting a donation to the following incredible organizations working night and day to help contain these devastating fires and support those affected >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100215413/522037615/-704783921?refcode=20250110_em_ex_b2_np4c_main_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjFkMWVhMi1hZmNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6RyMQUUVTapyTPfg2_tQmUL8uw-GLvQcaSi8eSOfUM=)

body:
As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGxganxU3QtlheRn-_ZU6ubnEgvzF81-faOhQZ19bRxVgrlu1Taii5Kv51Va-oKnm7w1j2k-K6MhVr-8eayFMgbi31QH6gML_bqSlN6JS0MfBZo0OCBvYnlKSQ5WP4J5JIc3HL21cpQ9_uvohdYWZN3A%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

It’s me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I’ve been called many names. Whether it’s Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I’ve always led by example for the people who depend on me.

**This email is a little longer.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my re-election campaign for the United States Senate when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGV3Adz_2Dk6ynV2xNIiV9RXn29Ix5nZEn5aXJcOQPdNPzBQA58QM0P9m0V7nXN2eDBnyR1gAfe_FwvIjQA-uGNONGYCpQpfWbo4U3iNnd7UVRGsMKQoApniXJTJhhfgpcLGnylHMN_vofZbBYOvk2mQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGHRW6Uf8jYipNrQ_Pt-C4JUpK570w7nvhRI8fHeg6N3Hc1LJT4dQ7TlbplmYU14iHWowNpexSfgt9FkDwX3iDOQsn22NF5sWNgGkkY_aV2F77Y5TmiYWZQ2_FAZmLNb7CYsvoT72D1tWAPZuY8b22mg%3D%3D)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I’ve brought with me in every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgG4uJG7rF9PPPtSlaSTrR8PLIVL0Kh0rj6nGD5Q8Cr5f7O276ZZtmqw_W7z7847edAjK0aXw9-E2hWwQudrGaxh0wbmZ8kKO71gqXL0ivSVC4vZaM8jyN6dc_XAdrpx3cDk7bRBh7wv8CxoXio0yb66w%3D%3D)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGyHaZ28amPXWFd8RSoJBIZZsc2P8TihPPsszGnUMzVzE3JFrI5Sitq0ebvv7p-qJlr20LCnDIx_0baIjRtSBUf1I4sqHPBo41XBlB6JuL2zCCheLjrC5VIvHqm5vqUAFTOx-JU-eEDsTkWTVdwMcrcQ%3D%3D)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn’t done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

Throughout my first term in office, I’ve been fighting non-stop on President Trump’s behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration’s Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGQ-hYqCgQeWKmsqjHp4skYAbw2YXEXsUqkVmjziew-HDnVQNAU2xBs5S1wO8ogLwHYT6rfoGCkTVmALUT3VzQTpzhCPUkH_h_erUDz8Tr13yfZACvE5ZwmOSvHmCuqHoPbEkh95ic0vRZ8feDkPDiKg%3D%3D)
**Now, I’m running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They’re going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it’s this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I’m looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and retain President Trump’s Senate Majority?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgGKZ10TdNrOXyg6yp_3sCkcSQijY6qjZSaJxAd_p_da1JusSOKvAnoxwk1zbCtiUBOEdveK6z7ac8OXkGscExmikyqQnec3Ox2HevC7sBCEF_rDEN45lmPWGNCwkg_uxQbWOkoKYTCnVWPQlEv-hmo9Q%3D%3D)

I won’t take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgG28RGQex4XJ1SyVFTASnG2fZMIqMRsPASFhUykXMmZ-6ofZYMIUx1SXqJRWi2EQzcUUFg_tiiknfVVPqzWxs9XsHTpTN8ch94KVXQ_OVExeOhDTLwPViT37eK86ekSf-TnfxUQBGPTS8TX2vRtqH_FA%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7c4e2a72c6204976b38765e19e49137b&_e=VL7EN-YF8aA8g9QIx9dtMw4tBaCfFyFsjb5vWu7SiHgVlvt2SyfomlAVpIMvT6ATj_UpsQQo_4BtlgCGFFM57dem45w1Zqu7bLxE77M57Kdfp9m9ST5NJ23V1XmdyocsbuwUatppiwTpvHkSpuuJ5VgNi0HTzclFPmBiyRHkp6mmarb3Z4gOKPrC1LjbAzgG4Kdp3Y3E_IWuFEVZWOHoMmHNo8BbsXtThX0k7Tv0qsA5cB_De0oDgckhgaow5kqgkrZrR11N2OJ6ccmjJPFpoC0mDYe-1NnP3iwbvDKnEvCxzKoJzawWjolcvi62voUwt_ehNOlUB4jU2LW7Q5TzUQ%3D%3D)

Whether it’s Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I’ve always led by example for the people who depend on me. This email is a little longer. I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I’ve brought with me in every step of my life. I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day. After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University. Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson. I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards. I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn’t done winning just yet. In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: How you can help relief efforts in LA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Fueled by drought conditions and record-breaking winds, catastrophic wildfires in Los Angeles have displaced over 179,000 people and claimed at least ten lives. Two fires have already broken the record as the most destructive in L.A. history.1
Today, we’re asking for you to **join us in supporting two organizations working around the clock to provide emergency housing and relief services** to displaced families and refugees across L.A. County.2
[Will you make a $4 contribution — $2 for each organization — so that World Central Kitchen and United Way of Greater Los Angeles can provide relief to the families most impacted by these deadly wildfires?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250110-la.Ancwqe&refcode=em20250110-7889-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
**[Contribute $4](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250110-la.Ancwqe&refcode=em20250110-7889-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)**
Covering roughly 45 square miles, emergency workers have exhausted nearly 3 million gallons of water reserved in storage tanks around the city since the fires started Tuesday morning.3 We will keep you informed as more on this develops.
• **World Central Kitchen’s Relief Team** is in Southern California to support first responders and families impacted by wildfires in the Los Angeles area. Their teams have mobilized across the region to provide immediate food relief with nutritious meals and water to people displaced by evacuation or fire.
• **United Way of Greater Los Angeles** is working to provide longer-term support to the tens of thousands of Los Angelenos impacted by the wildfires, through direct outreach and in tandem with other community organizations.
[You can make a major difference right now by splitting a $4 contribution between these organizations providing direct, on-the-ground relief. Can they count on your $2 contribution now?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250110-la.Ancwqe&refcode=em20250110-7889-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
**[Contribute $4](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250110-la.Ancwqe&refcode=em20250110-7889-P_FND_CHA_DIR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)**
Our hearts are with those who lost loved ones in the fires, and all those impacted.
Together, we will help this community make it out of this stronger.
Thank you,
Team AOC

1 - [**NY Times** : Live Updates: ‘We Don’t Know’ Death Toll From Fires Raging Across L.A., Sheriff Says](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31652?t=23&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
2 - [**CBS News** : Fires in California kill at least 5, scorch Los Angeles area as over 100,000 told to evacuate: Live Updates](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31653?t=24&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
3 - [**Reuters** : In Los Angeles, water runs short as wildfires burn out of control](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31654?t=25&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=7889%2E2526796%2ElkM_hz)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: LA County & Local Wildfire and Windstorm Resources
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXsP4-aCbP-yKtjW90d7iJfxm3hcKYHzBWLWiYk1hbn6QU2mkmWlk2BphK6u2DNHN4qqlZzklz2N1kw3cMXTGiD8ZbMhwErd2YgBbnAv0Rsb9jfxfjLuMMZu1jiMqobbot69Hd6pOM4IuYYcgbqWmdCLvp1Ynrzct-RM3-sXVnSOb0h0IVP5ZhPdcNNfNbilMOH5TX7WVCpl9Vrq-2X_gdwue6q9oMjrENwp38sRygEzc/4d2/nbUiSfXfQ1a4HivrkHOzPg/h0/h001.T7qXeN7SThJv918vB1UwjLPoVmdwCRv8M3qTafGpxeM)
---
---
---
Dear Derek

With the ongoing wildfires devastating the Los Angeles region, our hearts go out to everyone affected. Please know that you are in our thoughts during this incredibly difficult time.

We understand how overwhelming moments like these can be, and we want to remind you that you are not alone. We wanted to share some resources provided by the Los Angeles County Young Democrats and the Long Beach Young Democrats, who have come together to compile a list of resources for those in need or who are looking to help.

In Solidarity,

Quentin Wathum-Ocama
President, Young Democrats of America

* * *

**LA County & Local Wildfire and Windstorm Resources
**
Our hearts are with the many people across LA County who have faced devastating impacts from the ongoing wildfires. We have compiled a list of resources and donation drives for those who want to help.

**Helpful Resources**
* Mutual Aid LA Network (MALAN): [bit.ly/malan-fire](bit.ly/malan-fire?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)
* Disaster Mental Health Resources: [bit.ly/LAco-MH](bit.ly/LAco-MH?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)
* Traffic info, road closures: [quickmap.dot.ca.gov](quickmap.dot.ca.gov?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)
* Evacuation Zones: [bit.ly/LAfires-EvacZones](bit.ly/LAfires-EvacZones?link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)
* 211 info on shelters, closures, and more: [211la.org/LA-Wildfires](211la.org/LA-Wildfires?link_id=5&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)[](11la.org/LA-Wildfires?link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources&email_referrer=email_2579960&email_subject=la-county-local-wildfire-and-windstorm-resources)

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Derek With the ongoing wildfires devastating the Los Angeles region, our hearts go out to everyone affected. Please know that you are in our thoughts during this incredibly difficult time. We understand how overwhelming moments like these can be, and we want to remind you that you are not alone. We wanted to share some resources provided by the Los Angeles County Young Democrats and the Long Beach Young Democrats, who have come together to compile a list of resources for those in need or who are looking to help. In Solidarity, Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America LA County & Local Wildfire and Windstorm Resources Our hearts are with the many people across LA County who have faced devastating impacts from the ongoing wildfires. We have compiled a list of resources and donation drives for those who want to help. Helpful Resources Mutual Aid LA Network (MALAN): name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: God had my back
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---

| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7c468fb35bbd4b0aae8075735f698c5d&_e=xC7brEuoYfX-Y_Up_JkCLOIxw56Taqa5I8iSNbFj7MnpAUUxtsJu45iEqCctStSfqXXymCYlX50Ipl3x0a9BUm58OLtRF_cGDY41hyLRHW3zlRjrb0UtqvhfaXxZCkKTxhmctFKeno26WjReYBq4oQ-3cKT3XU_3mE9L28tfJWRhdE_J152uaAG5mEgh3fPi7RCGJy1AohqBoH_hdmi4gkJ91gd3sD_TBE46DJAsFRbz62vZXHeJVsgx_FyNpH2bmqwtrLayxZ32v9p-6L99CG6OGRAm-hzGKuGOoV-bNldkUyMMrfuTq_nc7l1voS6_L3jf8J9rC8XNLtjoqAcWLQMH2YoEDXDnyRpGHiDtGD-7tYGXmwHXwS4ccAD2_xF4ehfmSHHE2Fe6v4o9T0bPIg%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,

body:
Things are going from bad to worse
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)
---
Hello,

Last month, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with _MSNBC_ as they struggle with low ratings and a potential sale.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

We can’t abandon _MSNBC_ after all they’ve done for Democrats. [**Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)
---
We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: very concerning... [FFR]
Subject: _MSNBC_ is in DEEP trouble
To: TOP DEMOCRATS
**THIS IS BAD NEWS:**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)
**THIS IS EVEN WORSE NEWS:**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)
We’re **stunned** to see that _MSNBC_ is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re launching an _URGENT_ petition standing with _MSNBC_ during this trying time for them.**
[**Please, after all that _MSNBC_ has done for Democrats, we can’t abandon them now! Sign our petition to stand with _MSNBC_ »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)
[25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with _MSNBC_ »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250110_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22738%2E4449941%2E7KTGiT)

Thank you for adding your voice to our emergency petition!

_– Fight for Reform_

Patriot,
---
The upcoming inauguration of President Trump _should_ mark the beginning of a new chapter in American history.
---
**But sadly, when President Trump takes office, he’s immediately facing a $486 MILLION witch hunt led by my opponent, corrupt New York Attorney General Tish James.**
---
She’s announced that she’ll continue to pursue this wrongfully imposed fine even after President Trump takes office.
---
The worst part? The unconstitutional judgment against him is written in such a way that he has to pay interest on that massive sum...
---
**_...meaning he’s effectively being fined $112,000 _PER_ _DAY_ as President!_**
---
This kind of LAWFARE poses a grave threat to our free Republic, Patriot.
---
_The Left couldn’t defeat President Trump at the ballot box, so corrupt radicals like Tish James are trying to stall his agenda by bleeding him dry._
---
She cares more about destroying her political enemies than going after the real criminals that are ravaging our state.
---
**That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and end the politicization of the Office of Attorney General.**
---
_But our country cannot wait until 2026 to stop this $486 MILLION (and counting) scam_ ...
---
So, every day that President Trump is required to pay $112,000, I’m asking **112,000 grassroots Americans** to sign my campaign’s [**OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS PETITION**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OmzAUhZ_G7ED29Q9kwWJSxKia_qlVNeoqMvZ1cIuBGAhKn76Comy_-0nnnKvD2Hn3KEl-JgCttxMBIPyFANx-rSEuv8Pba_pGx9f0pr4EuV3hw6He4Sn3Ruvh_GN4aX7-ncL7n4_X5oZ39tTnx4hP-QjNMGjfbTSvEltyZ6lIsGQ5V1IWEoqkLSWVQjHGhYNcMOaYbkQjhOBMUJpLTHwJFCRljFEGTBSZQnVipuEW0LmGn4ige06mA0ZvNJvmVcc4DCEzQ0i6sp3ncdqL1QTqCc0SMVt9H9FuBoHaRY-9ndLBpcGbVmOXttjHRyqNY2gKTaAWJ1fIXHGZW66E2RDh9TKHi9Fh1P7aE179r0pPBNR2CWj9EgivjkfscMa4oTWyA0zDEg0SXn1_v5wPZoZ-xn4mvPr66fO3JJZ2XH3X-UnlRNDrvndbdy_hXwAAAP__RkKTMQ) demanding an END to this unjust, politically-motivated witch hunt.
---
[**Please add your name to sign my official “112,000-Patriot Petition” DEMANDING an END to Tish James’ witch hunt intended to bleed the 47th President dry.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OmzAUhZ_G7ED29Q9kwWJSxKia_qlVNeoqMvZ1cIuBGAhKn76Comy_-0nnnKvD2Hn3KEl-JgCttxMBIPyFANx-rSEuv8Pba_pGx9f0pr4EuV3hw6He4Sn3Ruvh_GN4aX7-ncL7n4_X5oZ39tTnx4hP-QjNMGjfbTSvEltyZ6lIsGQ5V1IWEoqkLSWVQjHGhYNcMOaYbkQjhOBMUJpLTHwJFCRljFEGTBSZQnVipuEW0LmGn4ige06mA0ZvNJvmVcc4DCEzQ0i6sp3ncdqL1QTqCc0SMVt9H9FuBoHaRY-9ndLBpcGbVmOXttjHRyqNY2gKTaAWJ1fIXHGZW66E2RDh9TKHi9Fh1P7aE179r0pPBNR2CWj9EgivjkfscMa4oTWyA0zDEg0SXn1_v5wPZoZ-xn4mvPr66fO3JJZ2XH3X-UnlRNDrvndbdy_hXwAAAP__RkKTMQ)

clean_body: As New York’s next AG, I have a plan to stop the witch hunts. As New York’s next AG, I have a plan to stop the witch hunts. | Patriot, The upcoming inauguration of President Trump should mark the beginning of a new chapter in American history. But sadly, when President Trump takes office, he’s immediately facing a $486 MILLION witch hunt led by my opponent, corrupt New York Attorney General Tish James. She’s announced that she’ll continue to pursue this wrongfully imposed fine even after President Trump takes office. The worst part? The unconstitutional judgment against him is written in such a way that he has to pay interest on that massive sum... ...meaning he’s effectively being fined $112,000 PER DAY as President! This kind of LAWFARE poses a grave threat to our free Republic, Patriot. The Left couldn’t defeat President Trump at the ballot box, so corrupt radicals like Tish James are trying to stall his agenda by bleeding him dry. She cares more about destroying her political enemies than going after the real criminals that are ravaging our state. That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and end the politicization of the Office of Attorney General. But our country cannot wait until 2026 to stop this $486 MILLION (and counting) scam ... So, every day that President Trump is required to pay $112,000, I’m asking 112,000 grassroots Americans to sign my campaign’s demanding an END to this unjust, politically-motivated witch hunt. Thank you, Michael Henry Republican for New York Attorney General PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY

body:
Please contact my office if you need assistance

| Peter, I hope you and your family are safe as Southern California reels from wildfire. Like many of you, I am heartbroken by the images coming out of Los Angeles.

My office is here to offer to connect you with resources in response to this week’s wildfires. _**Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or are in need of any assistance.**_

📞 Contact our District Office: (951) 222-0203
📞 Contact our D.C. Office: (202) 225-2305
📩 Email us for assistance by clicking [**_this link_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100216667/522072388/1048921785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjJmZjFhNi1iYmNmLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zEho3agEg4VprGos-edDsFh1m86r264E_Dn4oLXcjQo=&emci=66b7eb34-a4cf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=462ff1a6-bbcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
**In cases of immediate danger** , call 9-1-1

While first responders continue to fight these fires, my team and I wanted to update you with **additional resources and information below.**

Like many of you, I am heartbroken by the images coming out of Los Angeles. My office is here to offer to connect you with resources in response to this week’s wildfires. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or are in need of any assistance. 📞 Contact our District Office: (951) 222-0203 📞 Contact our D.C. Office: (202) 225-2305 📩 Email us for assistance by clicking In cases of immediate danger , call 9-1-1 While first responders continue to fight these fires, my team and I wanted to update you with additional resources and information below. To track fires and stay informed: Please also bookmark or otherwise make a note of information coming from the County level websites – these sites will allow you to sign up for county specific information regarding alerts, evacuation notices, and other critical information. For additional information for LA County residents, click For additional information for Orange County residents, click For additional information for Ventura County residents, click For additional information for San Bernardino County residents, click For additional information for Riverside County residents, click For additional information for Santa Barbara residents, click Other resources: Evacuation Zones and Shelter Info: Track Local Air Quality info here: Food assistance: Housing assistance: Mental Health Resources: If you do not live in affected areas, please consider making a donation to any of the following relief funds: Please folks, I cannot emphasize enough that you should not hesitate to contact my office should you have any questions or require assistance in response to these wildfires. subject: 🔻 Republican threat on Merrick Garland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Merrick Garland Says He Will Release Jack Smith Report** Folks, the MAGA GOP has been waiting for ANY opportunity to get revenge on Attorney General Merrick Garland for standing up to Donald Trump.

**_With Garland about to release Jack Smith's damning report, he could face prosecution under Trump!_**

[**So we’re rallying 500 TOP Democratic supporters to let Garland know we REFUSE to stand for these vicious attempts to destroy his career! Add your name to our letter before your spot closes at 11:59pm »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86089?t=6&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4) | [MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86089?t=7&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4)
---
TO: Attorney General Merrick Garland
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We have your back. **_To Attorney General Merrick Garland,_

Thank you for your incredible work holding Donald Trump and his insurrectionist buddies accountable!**

House Republicans know you would _never_ back down in the face of corruption — so they’re using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you.

Democrats across the country are so grateful for everything you’ve done to defend our democracy, **so please know you’re not alone in this fight.**

[**We need more leaders like you who will stand up to Trump and far-right extremism at every turn: So today, I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help flip the seats we need to retake the House majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86089?t=8&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86089?t=9&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
Thank you for signing our letter!

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18541%2E878179%2E8553P4).**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Victory Against Fani Willis!
body:
Sanctuary Policy Lawlessness!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: Court Awards Judicial Watch $21,578 in Fees
and Costs in Fani Willis Lawsuit

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34223&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1nUlBoazVUZ19qdyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=020a68ad54830b7ced13aafc584e1f83f0615065186a3104c86c6d9c2ef86f6f]

The Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34206&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWNvc3RzLW9yZGVyLTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=97e1a4457b34f7b423ee9a96f2312262cb022d257917841998f4088672076c6f]
granting
$21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in our open records lawsuit
for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the
House January 6 Committee. The order followed a previous order finding
that Willis was in default in the lawsuit.

We filed this lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=31661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtY29tbXVuaWNhdGlvbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d67ec90cc33e53c10668f6c6065ddbf2c2a63c92f21462d7f15f9a4bf41702c]
in March
2024 after Willis falsely denied having any records responsive to our
earlier Georgia Open Records Act (ORA) request for communications with
Special Counsel Jack Smiths office and/or the January 6 Committee
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34224&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS9dX2FsLl8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=476c982d1b0e20cd20b98cbd7cfe9b304e1db9e75c4c5722ae8f3c1a114d229c
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=31606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=688508329e21ad3fd5d66d7b6b7b16c9328876a6b96289c9cabbaa143cb6d8eb]
(No.
24-CV-002805)).

After finding Willis in default, the court ordered a hearing on
December 20, which resulted in the latest order finding Willis liable
for fees and expenses that “shall be paid within two weeks of the
entry of this Order.” The order recounts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34206&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWNvc3RzLW9yZGVyLTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=97e1a4457b34f7b423ee9a96f2312262cb022d257917841998f4088672076c6f]
the
timeline of events after we filed our records request:

> Plaintiff [Judicial Watch] submitted an Open Records Act (ORA)
> request to Defendant on 22 August 2023 by way of Fulton County’s
> ORA on-line “portal”. That same day, Plaintiff received
> confirmation that its request had been delivered and would be
> channeled to the “appropriate department” (presumably the
> District Attorney’s Office). The following day, the County’s
> Open Records Custodian sent Plaintiff [Judicial Watch] an email
> confirming that the District Attorney’s Office had received the
> inquiry and asking Plaintiff to “simplify” its ORA [Open Records
> Act] request.... Literally five minutes later, before any
> simplification had occurred, Plaintiff received a second e-mail from
> the Records Custodian: “After carefully reviewing your request.
> (sic) We do not have the responsive records.”
>
> This response was perplexing and eventually suspicious to Plaintiff,
> given that Plaintiff subsequently uncovered through own effort at
> least one document that should have been in the District
> Attorney’s Office’s possession that was patently responsive to
> the request.

***

> Defendant [Willis] ultimately defaulted and this Court entered an
> Order on 2 December 2024 directing Defendant “to conduct a
> diligent search of her records for responsive materials” and to
> provide any responsive records that were not legally exempted from
> disclosure....
>
> Defendant’s compliance with the Court’s 2 December Order
> consisted of an undated, unsigned two-page memo to Plaintiff from
> Defendant’s “Open Records Department.” ... In this memo,
> Defendant announced that there still were no records responsive to
> one set of Plaintiff’s requests (communications with former
> Special Counsel Jack Smith) but that there were in fact records
> responsive to Plaintiff’s second set of requests (communications
> with the United States House January 6th Committee) – but those
> were exempt from disclosure....
>
> Despite having previously informed Plaintiff four separate times
> that her team had carefully searched but found no responsive
> records, now there suddenly were – but they were not subject to
> disclosure under the ORA....
>
> The ORA is not hortatory; it is mandatory. Non-compliance has
> consequences. One of them can be liability for the requesting
> party’s attorney’s fees and costs of litigation.

The court concludes its criticism of Willis’ actions, stating:

> Most basically, by operation of law Defendant acknowledged violating
> the ORA when she defaulted. But actual evidence proves the same: per
> her Records Custodian’s own admission, the District Attorney’s
> Office flatly ignored Plaintiff’s original ORA request, conducting
> no search and simply (and falsely) informing the County’s Open
> Records Custodian that no responsive records existed. We know now
> that that is simply incorrect: once pressed by a Court order,
> Defendant managed to identify responsive records, but has
> categorized them as exempt. Even if the records prove to be just
> that – exempt from disclosure for sound public policy reasons –
> this late revelation is a patent violation of the ORA. And for none
> of this is there any justification, substantial or otherwise: no one
> searched until prodded by civil litigation.
>
> Given this, the Court finds that relevant and reasonable
> attorney’s fees and costs of litigation are properly awardable to
> Plaintiff ... Defendant is thus liable to Plaintiff for $21,578
> pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-73(b). That amount shall be paid
> within two weeks of the entry of this Order.

In early December
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34120&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS1oaWRlcy1yZWNvcmRzLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=570eb28cd38389bb576611ea73320b8ded5ac9942f1b804fa3c0dd856e594083],
Willis
finally admitted to having records showing communications with the
January 6 Committee but refused to release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34120&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS1oaWRlcy1yZWNvcmRzLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=570eb28cd38389bb576611ea73320b8ded5ac9942f1b804fa3c0dd856e594083]
all but one
document in response to the court order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34055&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtaW4tZGVmYXVsdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6b382dff9d6f558eca2d51acc07c108fee615cf285ee98b6cde48d6e73b13879]
that found
her in default. She cited a series of legal exemptions to justify the
withholding of communications with the January 6 Committee. The only
document she did release is one already public letter to January 6
Committee Chairman Benny Thompson (D-MS).

We subsequently filed a
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34225&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3BlY2lhbC1tYXN0ZXItZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtbGF3c3VpdC9dbW90aW9uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4ab02cab6cac8f78f1776b3e742aa9b20d0b01b70c40053bd411259c2ff9229b

provided no list or even a general description regarding any

OUTRAGE: MINNESOTA SUPREME COURT’S REJECTS LAWSUIT CHALLENGING WOKE
RACIST MINNEAPOLIS TEACHERS’ CONTRACT

In August 2022, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit on behalf of a
Minneapolis taxpayer over a teachers’ contract that provides
discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities. We
alleged that the contract violated the Equal Protection Guarantee of
the Minnesota Constitution.

The school district, supported by the teachers and other public
employee unions, asserted that Minnesota taxpayers do not have the
right to challenge the illegal spending of taxpayer money by
government officials.

A court of appeals upheld our victory in that suit.

However, the Minnesota Supreme Court has now rejected
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71876&L=34213&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NsYXBwLXYtY294LWV0LWFsLW1uLXN1cHJlbWUtY3QtMTI0NTQtMDM2MC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=71603d0fb64ed5269a7894624ccdf8c4a8a64e5be04c06448ee78102435a4a5d]
our
lawsuit.

This is beyond the pale. Minneapolis Public Schools is unabashedly
discriminating against teachers based on their race, and the school
district is using taxpayer dollars to do so.

The Minnesota Supreme Court’s disgraceful decision not only
threatens teachers’ jobs but also prevents Minnesota taxpayers
(present and future) from holding their government to account. This
woke, racially discriminatory contract cannot stand.

We will ask the Trump administration to investigate this blatant civil
rights violation and take all necessary steps to ensure teachers do
not lose their jobs because of their race.

clean_body: Sanctuary Policy Lawlessness! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH VICTORY: Court Awards Judicial Watch $21,578 in Fees and Costs in Fani Willis Lawsuit [] The Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an order [] granting $21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in our open records lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The order followed a previous order finding that Willis was in default in the lawsuit. We filed this lawsuit [] in March 2024 after Willis falsely denied having any records responsive to our earlier Georgia Open Records Act (ORA) request for communications with Special Counsel Jack Smiths office and/or the January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et [ [] (No. 24-CV-002805)). After finding Willis in default, the court ordered a hearing on December 20, which resulted in the latest order finding Willis liable for fees and expenses that “shall be paid within two weeks of the entry of this Order.” The order recounts [] the timeline of events after we filed our records request: Plaintiff [Judicial Watch] submitted an Open Records Act (ORA) request to Defendant on 22 August 2023 by way of Fulton County’s ORA on-line “portal”. That same day, Plaintiff received confirmation that its request had been delivered and would be channeled to the “appropriate department” (presumably the District Attorney’s Office). The following day, the County’s Open Records Custodian sent Plaintiff [Judicial Watch] an email confirming that the District Attorney’s Office had received the inquiry and asking Plaintiff to “simplify” its ORA [Open Records Act] request.... Literally five minutes later, before any simplification had occurred, Plaintiff received a second e-mail from the Records Custodian: “After carefully reviewing your request. (sic) We do not have the responsive records.” This response was perplexing and eventually suspicious to Plaintiff, given that Plaintiff subsequently uncovered through own effort at least one document that should have been in the District Attorney’s Office’s possession that was patently responsive to the request. Defendant [Willis] ultimately defaulted and this Court entered an Order on 2 December 2024 directing Defendant “to conduct a diligent search of her records for responsive materials” and to provide any responsive records that were not legally exempted from disclosure.... Defendant’s compliance with the Court’s 2 December Order consisted of an undated, unsigned two-page memo to Plaintiff from Defendant’s “Open Records Department.” ... In this memo, Defendant announced that there still were no records responsive to one set of Plaintiff’s requests (communications with former Special Counsel Jack Smith) but that there were in fact records responsive to Plaintiff’s second set of requests (communications with the United States House January 6th Committee) – but those were exempt from disclosure.... Despite having previously informed Plaintiff four separate times that her team had carefully searched but found no responsive records, now there suddenly were – but they were not subject to disclosure under the ORA.... The ORA is not hortatory; it is mandatory. Non-compliance has consequences. One of them can be liability for the requesting party’s attorney’s fees and costs of litigation. The court concludes its criticism of Willis’ actions, stating: Most basically, by operation of law Defendant acknowledged violating the ORA when she defaulted. But actual evidence proves the same: per her Records Custodian’s own admission, the District Attorney’s Office flatly ignored Plaintiff’s original ORA request, conducting no search and simply (and falsely) informing the County’s Open Records Custodian that no responsive records existed. We know now that that is simply incorrect: once pressed by a Court order, Defendant managed to identify responsive records, but has categorized them as exempt. Even if the records prove to be just that – exempt from disclosure for sound public policy reasons – this late revelation is a patent violation of the ORA. And for none of this is there any justification, substantial or otherwise: no one searched until prodded by civil litigation. Given this, the Court finds that relevant and reasonable attorney’s fees and costs of litigation are properly awardable to Plaintiff ... Defendant is thus liable to Plaintiff for $21,578 pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-73(b). That amount shall be paid within two weeks of the entry of this Order. In early December [], Willis finally admitted to having records showing communications with the January 6 Committee but refused to release [] all but one document in response to the court order [] that found her in default. She cited a series of legal exemptions to justify the withholding of communications with the January 6 Committee. The only document she did release is one already public letter to January 6 Committee Chairman Benny Thompson (D-MS). We subsequently filed a [ [] asking the court to appoint a special master [] to oversee her search for records in our lawsuit and that the court conduct an in camera (private) inspection of any records found. We stated in our motion that Willis’ response to the order “makes no showing that the search was diligent. Based on her previous searches in this matter, it probably was not diligent. Likewise, she provided no list or even a general description regarding any responsive records she has elected to withhold. Without a list or description, it is impossible to evaluate what, if any, exemptions or exceptions are applicable, as she now contends.” Regarding the appointment of a special master [], we state: Willis by her own admission conducted at least three searches before finding any responsive records not already supplied by [Judicial Watch]. She did not even bother to conduct a search until the Complaint was filed. Her records custodian says he does not know the Cellebrite [digital investigations []] equipment he apparently had a hand in ordering can be used to search cell phone texts and other data.... Moreover, the custodian had no standard practice for conducting searches and keeps no records of the methods used in a given search. The foregoing gives rise to grave suspicion that all responsive records have not been found. The Court should appoint a special master to supervise and monitor the record searches. The special master should have authority to audit searches and conduct searches herself. She also should have authority to hire such consultants and experts as may be needed to execute her commission. The special master should make a recommendation to the Court as to how her fees and expenses should be allocated among the parties, taking into consideration whether she finds responsive records that Willis should have found but did not. Fani Willis’s response to our request for a special master is due January 16, 2025. Fani Willis flouted the law, and the court is right to slam her and require, at a minimum, the payment of nearly $22,000 to Judicial Watch. But in the end we want the full truth on what she was hiding – her office’s political collusion with the Pelosi January 6 committee to ‘get Trump.’” OUTRAGE: MINNESOTA SUPREME COURT’S REJECTS LAWSUIT CHALLENGING WOKE RACIST MINNEAPOLIS TEACHERS’ CONTRACT In August 2022, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit on behalf of a Minneapolis taxpayer over a teachers’ contract that provides discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities. We alleged that the contract violated the Equal Protection Guarantee of the Minnesota Constitution. The school district, supported by the teachers and other public employee unions, asserted that Minnesota taxpayers do not have the right to challenge the illegal spending of taxpayer money by government officials. A court of appeals upheld our victory in that suit. However, the Minnesota Supreme Court has now rejected [] our lawsuit. This is beyond the pale. Minneapolis Public Schools is unabashedly discriminating against teachers based on their race, and the school district is using taxpayer dollars to do so. The Minnesota Supreme Court’s disgraceful decision not only threatens teachers’ jobs but also prevents Minnesota taxpayers (present and future) from holding their government to account. This woke, racially discriminatory contract cannot stand. We will ask the Trump administration to investigate this blatant civil rights violation and take all necessary steps to ensure teachers do not lose their jobs because of their race. EVEN IN SANCTUARY STATES, ILLEGALS COMMIT FRAUD TO GET A DRIVER’S LICENSE The lawlessness around the Biden border invasion and sanctuary policies across the land is epic, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. As if it were not bad enough that over a dozen states grant illegal immigrants driver’s licenses, a criminal ring has for years exploited the security vulnerabilities of the leftist policies to obtain licenses for undocumented migrants who live in jurisdictions that do not offer the benefit. For about $1,400, illegal aliens living in states that prohibit them from obtaining the cards, fraudulently secured them in New York and Massachusetts—both sanctuary states—with the help of five individuals. Federal authorities recently charged them with several crimes, including conspiracy to unlawfully produce and possess with intent to transfer identification documents and possession with intent to use or transfer unlawfully obtained identification. One of the suspects was also charged with furnishing a false passport. The scheme operated for four years before authorities finally busted it and the criminals conspired to fraudulently apply for licenses for over 1,000 illegal immigrants. They obtained driver’s licenses for more than 600 migrants and collected at least hundreds of thousands of dollars, according to a federal indictment [] that says the defendants fabricated and falsified bank statements and bills to make it appear to the New York Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) that illegal aliens resided in the state and to falsely make it appear to the Massachusetts Registry of Motor Vehicles (RMV) that undocumented aliens lived at various addresses in that state. They also created fake driving education certificates of completion and forged the signatures of driving school staff to make it appear that migrants completed the required curriculum. The operation was well organized and complex, according to federal authorities, because obtaining a driver’s license in either state requires residents to first earn a learner’s permit that consists of a written test. Applicants can take the test online if they provide a photo of themselves completing it and once the learner’s permit has been issued applicants have to finish a driving course before taking the actual test required to get a license. The defendants took the written test online and used photos of the migrant applicants to appear as if they were taking it. Then they provided fake certificates of completion and other false documents to New York DMV and Massachusetts RMV employees that believed the illegal immigrants lived in those states. The defendants would drive the migrants to apply for the license and have the cards mailed to local addresses where they would retrieve the licenses mailed by the state agencies. Though the ring has been disrupted, “the investigation remains ongoing,” according to a statement [] issued by the Department of Justice (DOJ) in the District of Massachusetts. Nineteen states and the District of Columbia allow illegal immigrants to obtain driver’s licenses if they provide documentation such as a foreign birth certificate, foreign passport or consular card and evidence of residency in that state, according to the National Conference of State Legislatures []. They include California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, Rhode Island, Utah, Vermont, Virginia, and Washington. In late 2023 Minnesota’s measure, known as Driver’s Licenses for Al [ [], became the latest to go into effect. At the time officials estimated that about 80,000 illegal immigrants who were previously disqualified from obtaining the cards in the North Star state would be allowed to get them. Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, Kamala Harris’ running mate, said ensuring that drivers are licensed and carry insurance makes the roads more secure for all Minnesotans. “As a longtime supporter of this bill, I am proud to finally sign it into law, making our roads safer and moving us toward our goal of making Minnesota the best state to raise a family for everyone,” the Democrat lawmaker said [] when he proudly signed the measure. As this federal case illustrates, policies enacted by local sanctuary governments to benefit illegal aliens can be easily exploited and go against federal laws meant to protect the nation’s citizens and legal residents. Furthermore, there is no evidence that giving undocumented migrants driver’s licenses makes “roads safer” as Walz claims. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

**Dear Neighbors,** We hope you’ve enjoyed today’s surprise snow day! ❄️ Unfortunately, the weather isn’t letting up, and we’ve made the decision to cancel tomorrow’s Town Hall. We’re so sorry for the late notice, but your safety comes first. The good news? We’ve rescheduled for next week at a new location, and we need YOU to be there! We a VERY special suprise guest that you don't want to miss.

|
---
|
---
# Join Us for the UCP Town Hall Meeting!

We’re excited to invite you to an important conversation about the future of College Park. Saturday, January 18, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM, we’ll gather at The Muse Center (3383 Main Street, College Park) to discuss issues that matter to you and your family.
**Here’s what we’ll cover:** • Issues impacting College Park Residents • Lack of emergency and ambulatory services in South Atlanta • Upcoming elections and ways to support candidates • How YOU and UCP can work together to create a better future
Let’s commit, plan, execute, and make it better—together. Your voice matters, and we can’t wait to see you there!
**Visit** [UnitedCollegePark.com](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQzMjAwMTcwNDQ3NzM0NjAyLFwiclwiOjE0MzIwMDE4MjEyMzYyNzYyOH0iLCJzIjoiZTc0YjIwYWRlY2QxZTlhOCJ9) **for more information.**

| |
---
|
---
While you’re snowed in, take a moment to participate in the **Field of Voices** campaign. Write a quick letter to BIDA and City Council to share why Bill Evans Field matters to you. A short email from YOU can make a huge impact. [Click here](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQzMjAwMTcwNDUwODgwMzMxLFwiclwiOjE0MzIwMDE4MjEyMzYyNzYyOH0iLCJzIjoiMzRiYzIzMTg3ODBmNDRiZSJ9) to see how easy it is. Together, we can keep the momentum going and protect our greenspace for generations to come.
|
---
|
---
|
---

Feeling cooped up? 🧊 This Sunday, come thaw out and rock out at the **Tracy Wyatt Recreation Center Rock Wall Opening!** 📅 **Sunday, January 14th** 📍 **Tracy Wyatt Recreation Center,
2300 Godby Rd, College Park, GA 30349** ⏰ **2:00 PM - 5:00 PM** It’s time to shake off the cold and get moving—bring your family, bring your energy, and let’s celebrate this exciting new addition to our community. Don’t miss it!

|

Saturday, January 18, 2025, from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM, we’ll gather at The Muse Center (3383 Main Street, College Park) to discuss issues that matter to you and your family. Here’s what we’ll cover: • Issues impacting College Park Residents • Lack of emergency and ambulatory services in South Atlanta • Upcoming elections and ways to support candidates • How YOU and UCP can work together to create a better future Let’s commit, plan, execute, and make it better—together. Your voice matters, and we can’t wait to see you there! Visit for more information. | | | While you’re snowed in, take a moment to participate in the Field of Voices campaign. Write a quick letter to BIDA and City Council to share why Bill Evans Field matters to you. A short email from YOU can make a huge impact. to see how easy it is. Together, we can keep the momentum going and protect our greenspace for generations to come. | | | Feeling cooped up? 🧊 This Sunday, come thaw out and rock out at the Tracy Wyatt Recreation Center Rock Wall Opening! 📅 Sunday, January 14th 📍 Tracy Wyatt Recreation Center, 2300 Godby Rd, College Park, GA 30349 ⏰ 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM It’s time to shake off the cold and get moving—bring your family, bring your energy, and let’s celebrate this exciting new addition to our community. Don’t miss it! | | United College Park 3799 Main Street Box 87398 College Park, GA 30337 United States of America | | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. |

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8c9vphb7rirnuu695ur564eh4i44efudrl08q8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge6o32clh2bs)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvkhemv7lu7og8o8dgnvgkm84imdcnf2kbj3jkao_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge6o32clh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgrq68er6kv9fl0itq6v8j6e25mko22sa8k3lnr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge6o36c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg4dnkasukmiki7lvalos2o6gesfb1l6ruhlisfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge6o36c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrrocc3qr6lnbpu4a8pohdif3j1a7bscggr9683g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or6cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpc5v5619o71l5gml1o3kmrdp7rp9h6fasafdpcg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zknj3d387bbe4m67huh174rnf2bel2u12j6ac5r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or6cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |

name: Update for America
subject: Lecture: Unpacking Socialism vs. Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqm2n2mu03a8s14fjngavaa1baih724292vca0oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zeocgg8lhsdau1t9bn517puns9gp4mfogtp4al7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zddl71j2fcmjncod7v2c3l9fm53lcm80s2u54u88_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

name: Leader Scalise
subject: Political AMBUSH Against President Trump’sCabinet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

| |
---
| | | _I knew the Democrats would want revenge after getting CRUSHED at the ballot box...

I knew they'd come for MAGA Republicans hard and fast...

And I knew President Trump's Cabinet would be a prime target for their revenge campaign..._

But this surprised even me. The Democrat Machine just unleashed a coordinated hatchet job against President Trump's top appointments.

_**[It's a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbdru6f1c68abmrhk03pd2grpnvhg0qn6oc5h9uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "It’s a sweeping political ambush and I need to fill you in immediately. ")**_
- Elizabeth Warren fired off a propaganda letter calling **PETE HEGSETH** a potential 'insider threat' because of his Christian tattoo
- Adam Schiff went on ABC to attack **KASH PATEL'S** nomination to run the FBI
- Axios confirmed that Senate Democrats declined an expedited confirmation process for **TULSI GABBARD** for political purposes
- Blue state governors announced they'll defy Trump Border Czar **TOM HOMAN 'S** mass deportation plan of violent criminals
- Democrat Gov. Josh Green is jetting to DC in order to help torpedo the confirmation of **ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR.**
- Nancy Pelosi fired off a press release slamming **ELON MUSK** as being a 'puppet'
It's a national disgrace.

That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help me support President Trump and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and deliver on his mandate from the American People.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z70ft3intaimcheh6lrass3kbrqkve8niot10sfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "I’m respectfully asking true American Patriots from ALL 50 STATES to join me and stand with President Trump, each of his Cabinet picks, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to stand up for what’s right to help see these nominations through.")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8pciuro0rt6ceuhh8bsu4kfbvec98j2l0e5q8c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

_As your House Majority Leader - and as an American - this political ambush against our duly elected 47th President infuriates me to my core._

But there's something that brings me comfort and I'll share it with you...

**The Democrats are desperate. They 're grasping at straws to do ANYTHING in their power to stay relevant and sabotage President Trump's second term. The election was certified. His historic victory is set in stone. And our mandate from the American People is ironclad. **

Now we need your help to deliver on it.

If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join me right here and right now, we'll have the power and resources to fight back, deliver on his agenda, and support President Trump's vision for our country.

**I 'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.**
| [PLEASE JOIN ME NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zternlss512t2o1h8namopqal36a8s1v3le3agu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "DEFEND TRUMP’S CABINET PICKS")
---

Thanks for all you do for our movement.

- Steve Scalise

| |
