---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbr1785rlhcl29j6bkai62gaguoauvs7i4k9vnig_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z609cplhk6ndgj794pgt1sq58c3s1l5e73r93flg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

body:
Imagine waking up tomorrow in a United States of North America, where freedom and prosperity reign supreme...

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg68m4jqi81p7ltvmbhignk0o9shuj31itu9kvj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, Did you hear the incredible news? **[Justin Trudeau has announced his resignation as Prime Minister of Canada!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc88htmfjg3fat85hlm9s0tjrvf2uqbkkbonfr80_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs)** This is a critical moment for our nation and our allies. With Trudeau out, the door is now open for a new leader who shares our values and supports President Trump's vision for a stronger North America.
### [As you know, President Trump has long advocated for a closer relationship between our two nations, even suggesting that Canada could become the 51st state!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za2cadebfme8t6nds1n9j6i865ja2jtka6gi8rvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clge9or5clh2bs)

subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziuut03rhpsoagnp232bj72c81ou4q5t5cvgnq1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie0pb4clh2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh3fbegbh6croj15pa3844smd4inttfnsc5m1jg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie0pb4clh2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zboon2ojb4eucra5uvvkk0rj78qdjtim3a2f158g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie0pb4clh2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z69rqnbdb9amvhnmhvf3qp54n13mm94v28ansono_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie0pb4clh2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |

subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsuvktk8bo2snibaqe47bd9rl7l163nea4thvu8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrkrp28ap1334tpbnsbv373gnpglgvj05etrrq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zug3p08r28odgvdd78n85uj08k4918r4l8oe926o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6drpjiqvtgecs3cfog90064on5ibk9j1pkbodro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4618eqf2qq6dqc941oaddb3e4s4fi0uepa6c83g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd06qlnfh0316p2fqor6d09eh94qi8fdkv3un390_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj4c3h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: This coin could surge on Trump’s first day in office …
body:
It’s part of Donald Trump’s plan to make America “the crypto capital of the planet.”

| | | | | Dear Reader, Bitcoin has [reached $100,000...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6n705g2ebfdt1bqqopliiks8keg0e20hq7r5sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj5chh2bs) BEFORE Trump is even inaugurated. And I think it could reach $125,000 by the end of his first month in office. And it's not just because America elected Donald Trump as the first crypto president. You see, according to my proprietary timing model, we are entering [what could be the biggest bull market in crypto history.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zecdckbsmtk46qvjd1ghc9u9uquhvag0s3tc9vh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj5chh2bs) While I expect Bitcoin to do very well, potentially even hitting a double in 2025 ... There is another coin that could [do even better](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjgdt5icmvbgi7ifv642p7vrquf82u5kukcdsm88_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj5chh2bs) than Bitcoin. It's part of Donald Trump's plan to make America "_the crypto capital of the planet. "_ This coin is the centerpiece of Trump's special "Project Crypto." [And it might even be the President's favorite coin.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrm2i43l8psrcvufktu81mj55btv4eathpsb0ub8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj5chh2bs) Sincerely, Eliza Lasky - Weiss Advocate PS. Juan's called every bull and bear market in crypto since 2012. In 2018 he nailed the top AND bottom of Bitcoin ... to within days. Now he says we are about to enter the biggest bull market in crypto history ... and [one special coin could benefit the best most.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqgi1snl10cuauoonv1tlsnes4kho6886rjpb358_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cliecoj5chh2bs)

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z59vqhg1jq6dlbb7of0vt3hn12veji8f5739t470_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlbgr8buhmf6ha4lup1orviujh98gr15nglred20_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c9h2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9od8afrdglo2lcp645b9u4jphnielp0m1va7pd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c9h2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7qms9t7uanadjrr5pl7hkhm1in7m0prqp97f83o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziv4c3oco2jve043hgloud4mmelru4eo20jpd2q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdgbh3bk1fe0u6pkivfhron72qn2otaa0aek0vg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie2p30c5h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Your America News
subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4iad12l2sve0hj4tqrmsnbtt45l334lrk2igu8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie6o72c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr3hbmmrt30h5jd6ve3l4fnjih5d8eo1efdll3n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie6o72c1h2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsd8ko6172983d4ran8b1nfq0b0iap8010n1qg2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3clie6o72c1h2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

A Florida woman attempted to buy fentanyl, but she made one little mistake that got her busted, according to police. Octavia Wells, 41, allegedly thought she was texting one of her contacts to purchase drugs before she left town to go to rehab. 'Unknown to Octavia, she had accidentally reached the phone of a narcotics investigator at the Bay County Sheriff’s Office with her text message.'The New York Post reported that Wells messaged one of her contacts labeled "PJ," and offered to pay $45 for fentanyl on New Year's Eve.

name: Concealed Carry
subject: YOUR CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19721/6374453/db843e4f0882f4b63d20088b12b3cbc537da9b0d/8367122b005972bc0a6639352acd0b33901a1f29)
---
| | |
---
_January 11th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19721/6374453/db843e4f0882f4b63d20088b12b3cbc537da9b0d/8367122b005972bc0a6639352acd0b33901a1f29). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19721/6374453/db843e4f0882f4b63d20088b12b3cbc537da9b0d/8367122b005972bc0a6639352acd0b33901a1f29).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19721/6374453/db843e4f0882f4b63d20088b12b3cbc537da9b0d/8367122b005972bc0a6639352acd0b33901a1f29)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
| | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19721/6374453/db843e4f0882f4b63d20088b12b3cbc537da9b0d/8367122b005972bc0a6639352acd0b33901a1f29)

name: Troy Downing
subject: My First deadline is in 4 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Can I count on you?

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, Troy here. We’re quickly approaching the January mid-month deadline on January 15th. This is one of my most crucial goals yet, as it's not only the first goal of 2025 but my first goal as a Congressman.

This goal will help set the tone for the rest of the year and show my colleagues in Congress that people are ready for true America First change. **[**So, Peter, can I count on you to chip in and help me reach this goal?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._KubsQ04QrlUbg)**
---
[ HELP TROY CRUSH HIS FIRST GOAL](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you,
Troy Downing

body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7rCYYQ24oDjp5G6jKE1KhA3rYwUYYey7-_eRL0qV5trRvHlvvvf7bu42xJDXHzZ5XZOpu2mn2Rcb6bPQVo9U6CMygwwHyoACGN45LUaUCjqvQXIxjDdkrHvTahAj4qyYEFI6P1uw3CnvHCrJxAO6oK87DADYeFPs1is1zwOH5TE_ZodCkhurvhxzDIvNyT63Gtpnn33ron5rreyEvxCcCE67X47q-_eQq3f9siWCU_M20St72D3B6RlS-qTFtrrlsNNyCflUL2ENeSX8tdXDExRHS2axqdiwZsJf_2Zk0vx8ob_u0ANwMQ6mwTCiEEhBDoKg8B-mBff9_S-XLTef22V90proPxwExceRz__mXdWuvIcYw_4FZ002xOvbrn27rVPjnwAAAP__nsWTnA "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7rCYYQ24oDjp5G6jKE1KhA3rYwUYYey7-_eRL0qV5trRvHlvvvf7bu42xJDXHzZ5XZOpu2mn2Rcb6bPQVo9U6CMygwwHyoACGN45LUaUCjqvQXIxjDdkrHvTahAj4qyYEFI6P1uw3CnvHCrJxAO6oK87DADYeFPs1is1zwOH5TE_ZodCkhurvhxzDIvNyT63Gtpnn33ron5rreyEvxCcCE67X47q-_eQq3f9siWCU_M20St72D3B6RlS-qTFtrrlsNNyCflUL2ENeSX8tdXDExRHS2axqdiwZsJf_2Zk0vx8ob_u0ANwMQ6mwTCiEEhBDoKg8B-mBff9_S-XLTef22V90proPxwExceRz__mXdWuvIcYw_4FZ002xOvbrn27rVPjnwAAAP__nsWTnA "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGP3CAQhX8N7rCYYQ24oDjp5G6jKE1KhA3rYwUYYey7-_eRL0qV5trRvHlvvvf7bu42xJDXHzZ5XZOpu2mn2Rcb6bPQVo9U6CMygwwHyoACGN45LUaUCjqvQXIxjDdkrHvTahAj4qyYEFI6P1uw3CnvHCrJxAO6oK87DADYeFPs1is1zwOH5TE_ZodCkhurvhxzDIvNyT63Gtpnn33ron5rreyEvxCcCE67X47q-_eQq3f9siWCU_M20St72D3B6RlS-qTFtrrlsNNyCflUL2ENeSX8tdXDExRHS2axqdiwZsJf_2Zk0vx8ob_u0ANwMQ6mwTCiEEhBDoKg8B-mBff9_S-XLTef22V90proPxwExceRz__mXdWuvIcYw_4FZ002xOvbrn27rVPjnwAAAP__nsWTnA "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")

Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.

Dear Friend,
---
I didn't want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 - just days before President Trump's inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there's no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what's _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go - homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ "heavenly treasures" await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I 'd rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I 'm asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---

subject: Preparing for my trial

body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...

It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5d0adc23ab941ecb5af1f0d7e061e69&_e=Mbof22hzrYsczuZduPghSCHBbvs_mBjRfSBakXsKZUBjzpd_Yuzg3c-RCGZKwETCLBnzAva69Vn6LSJezjb6UyTznirF-U59tRgzzR5T40WotQTmUarJZwNXjSe6aWslb4Znzek05n9zeoeG8srd8YGqDbuG0n7y7F9IYNDbUKYnXRX4yaSHWnYz3x0MaLpzl4qG_X0VbcdvK5HOwbSHbfG3kpihOJyIkMn_eJ_kIiO8EplJrXsSdBoTu4QoBjFI8TV0P1QaSlNXxiYAL_YJPGgsafihL8omvSD4weuFxPN-rjfvZAGbBePgqdBQOKxshH58DpABhI-sQJiliFUw9hFb_1hrZ3kgeo6hG4KUUTkDMQZGTAIT3IEecj1BVAzEO82UGefYI7c8q76WrZtgTw%3D%3D)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

With Trudeau out, the door is now open for a new leader who shares our values and supports President Trump's vision for a stronger North America.

But we must act quickly. We can't let that happen. That's why I'm calling on you to take immediate action. | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #[Redacted] DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | | | ---|--- | | Every dollar counts in this fight, and I urge you to contribute whatever you can today. name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2LpDAQhn9NvEXy2eohhwZ1GdieXejDHEMmKTUQTUji7t9fHKbve623eJ-Hqo-Hfhgf_LG-mx2UL0Xnog-jNx8CXnPFGZYMZdOMMIkJxZRq2jglGe2XvgFFO36TgxCCN5ty1Arm5OAWJgDop7PEEk66wRou-WIbr64eQimlhDBJW-p6Kwf32Q0SOOkdEuRMzlRo_VG8g2JjTCkGX70tbcxrE9RWayqI3xGbEZtDai_Z4kyAFtyJ2Fw3wGsGc9kXqNhac-3yuVjER0Io4--ECfaT3MZf4zQ9EbudddclntkC4mPKsSSw1R_rd7SD8-eO-Ai78eF7aM2ejF8PxMe6wRfxC_iK41HhqIiPH9P89rj_mPTvO357PvHrCE1WLv31Ifhy65Ag61Xe2rg39b9_8UexfwEAAP__E9CRPA)
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2LpDAQhn9NvEXy2eohhwZ1GdieXejDHEMmKTUQTUji7t9fHKbve623eJ-Hqo-Hfhgf_LG-mx2UL0Xnog-jNx8CXnPFGZYMZdOMMIkJxZRq2jglGe2XvgFFO36TgxCCN5ty1Arm5OAWJgDop7PEEk66wRou-WIbr64eQimlhDBJW-p6Kwf32Q0SOOkdEuRMzlRo_VG8g2JjTCkGX70tbcxrE9RWayqI3xGbEZtDai_Z4kyAFtyJ2Fw3wGsGc9kXqNhac-3yuVjER0Io4--ECfaT3MZf4zQ9EbudddclntkC4mPKsSSw1R_rd7SD8-eO-Ai78eF7aM2ejF8PxMe6wRfxC_iK41HhqIiPH9P89rj_mPTvO357PvHrCE1WLv31Ifhy65Ag61Xe2rg39b9_8UexfwEAAP__E9CRPA) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2LpDAQhn9NvEXy2eohhwZ1GdieXejDHEMmKTUQTUji7t9fHKbve623eJ-Hqo-Hfhgf_LG-mx2UL0Xnog-jNx8CXnPFGZYMZdOMMIkJxZRq2jglGe2XvgFFO36TgxCCN5ty1Arm5OAWJgDop7PEEk66wRou-WIbr64eQimlhDBJW-p6Kwf32Q0SOOkdEuRMzlRo_VG8g2JjTCkGX70tbcxrE9RWayqI3xGbEZtDai_Z4kyAFtyJ2Fw3wGsGc9kXqNhac-3yuVjER0Io4--ECfaT3MZf4zQ9EbudddclntkC4mPKsSSw1R_rd7SD8-eO-Ai78eF7aM2ejF8PxMe6wRfxC_iK41HhqIiPH9P89rj_mPTvO357PvHrCE1WLv31Ifhy65Ag61Xe2rg39b9_8UexfwEAAP__E9CRPA)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: Thinking about Los Angeles
body:
How we show up for each other during these difficult times
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3238766/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

It's been a difficult start to the new year as we continue to grapple with the climate destruction and devastation we're seeing everywhere on the news.

Entire homes are gone. Community centers, parks, schools, coffee shops, gas stations—all eviscerated by the wildfires that have engulfed Los Angeles County.

**These devastating losses are reminders of the growing cost of climate change and the urgent need for leaders who take the climate crisis seriously.** And while President-elect Trump continues to fan the flames of disaster with inaction and complete indifference to the suffering of the people he was elected to serve, it doesn't mean we all have to.

Because being in the climate fight means showing up for each other, whether from near or afar. As relief efforts continue on the ground in Southern California, **please visit the**[**Mutual Aid LA Network**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3238767/87SdQ4wZ)**(MALAN), which delivers direct assistance to marginalized communities impacted, to see how you can help.**

And for anyone feeling overwhelmed by the enormity of this crisis and the fight ahead of us, check out [this resource for coping with disasters.](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3238768/87SdQ4wZ)

There's no easy fix for what happened this week, or what will happen in the months to come. But as the Rebecca Solnit quote we keep turning to says: **_"the fact that we cannot save everything does not mean we cannot save anything—and everything we can save is worth saving."_**

As the climate crisis continues to unfold around us, Evergreen will not stop trying to save everything we can by working for real solutions that give all of us a chance at a safer, better future. |
---
| Take good care, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
---
---

subject: Trudeau's Out: Now's Our Chance to Unite North America Under Freedom & Prosperity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Imagine waking up tomorrow in a United States of North America, where freedom and prosperity reign supreme...

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGTNkPpCiSSP89wWhzZes6JGHdKbL8gaBuB-zXjkpynvM_E8NAank4SZZDq3o0_5Psl_Zixf0kbWiI2PVcIAv4KGO74FaVprKY5EZwmPJ-_IZ6iv2NIewZE9FxtR2mCv-TCGubqmZQ6PEaCwBrG9eimEuI6sohULTipWqErefv79qprsOcnfVG-OS-u5t2jNZxg%3D) Dear Fellow Conservative, Did you hear the incredible news? **[Justin Trudeau has announced his resignation as Prime Minister of Canada!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGQf48HJQYD6ZNaJb_WH_Kfk0b--FcpqX_a8keTXS4d08w2JyluKGqJIn7IUPDrt60XFNpu4bqTm0NsD_MgyE9vEgj0VJyldFjPlcHwz0e32cth6C2fxsWKIu7x3MqHcJ3DfNFSGZf6511LY14_3zJuI_etBw5T9mk82mcvAGBZ4XLtFIrpPAVrwfGy81BeEXmE%3D)** This is a critical moment for our nation and our allies. With Trudeau out, the door is now open for a new leader who shares our values and supports President Trump's vision for a stronger North America.
### [As you know, President Trump has long advocated for a closer relationship between our two nations, even suggesting that Canada could become the 51st state!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGTNkPpCiSSP89wWhzZes6JGSaYjZ6TSAtuvBW34zmQ6CALUGzUt58cDS56M8J3Zk1ngvc-1YpfHeWoMg5cuWN-yERtHtylIl7VnsjKrtKH6gKpUpTv207AIJ0Op86gWQRI1hd4_ncSgbERgILxmQ1LeANW6qBcdOa6kO_K3CKAQMSledkWSekv1Up7tYiE_iCo%3D)
Can you imagine the possibilities? **[A united North America, free from the shackles of socialism and bureaucratic red tape, would be an unstoppable force for freedom and prosperity.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGTNkPpCiSSP89wWhzZes6JG1TJta2Q07oaX8eo2WFJzL6YnPFYQQ7Xs_NbLDCUrGhYdk_A5K030h1BT2oWd0Un8emCHW2iZcOQXPCOkjXudWAJgcqRJmDqj92zN1eMPF-JJPfxHWtjJz68bNJjHuFQhZ7MHUt1JuLRTMBgxjKj75LMLDfT4pEKPg-2_IWXRCdk%3D)** But we must act quickly. [_The Liberal Party in Canada is already circling the wagons, trying to find a new leader who will continue their failed policies and undermine our President's agenda._](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGTNkPpCiSSP89wWhzZes6JG_wpwoeO4c_SXVY6PJ1ZM_KHuSffX1AbEEBWJsXL6p0WCZDt9IlglDh5iqJ-i_Ll0IX_R1FgHSMf0vauBZrXUrgE3236FGCZ1pOt-MwpagTjNSU6cUXtEgoBIij08cp-CR362ib0N64evRvUnnnvWhojR64BW5hl2LfE4arjsp4E%3D) We can't let that happen. That's why I'm calling on you to take immediate action. **[We need your support to help President Trump build on this momentum and make America STRONGER and GREATER than ever before.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31b344ca59434922a88f4db8db14ff05&_e=X_AhIppbDGPV5vm2OEWi7Kr-WSYeOYaal535mdtEnMKHoIKYTF3pUdADfrRjSWp-2BaJMAkcu1HWZQmsuX_KqcTqioe1r8WmzJPs2H5K8Nk_UDdFUP8_5f-4A6UpxN_Ri3OHa2c4MCMA8c6AkV6xgO1E5wrYRJJUQSQazTND51lor71JcQBIDo65R_vXxIFTzBN-uKHGvW9OxL0wUSq2Pwk3cJeOq_duK5V3jR5Ge2l0TYcmMMSccaneHBIK5LPjsUoA9RdEKOB4HikN7t2iYaH8Wg9XQHfG42X_unX2jfIzJorPQQkFwqpxHDhsBrXvJnwxFeb2Ibe5rn9kkZx7eEkAdyYzDEcnUEGjHXc1myA6G5aADEAALjKjUYh-UMJH--6M0AJ2z1pVJCJshBunoMDfgpM6__shrq1L_9FyW58Rtj2Ovo6uY3Z0TP-mwGOINC6Me8CB7svkiy4qV0xHq9MjHnSgomWCUVvZnS7uoGQf48HJQYD6ZNaJb_WH_Kfk0b--FcpqX_a8keTXS4d08-OpgTCMTp7Q68fM2kuIv8vSOdGYzEkp6FVd3fvn2AzUAX_pr2STBwjJkTOcvSB_aE-CutrPYv-hwF_ZNTLAvqQ6p6lp6e2flTwNelKlaENx7aT_p11A4ul-iN-pAP5XijybHkWd-2fl92rLM08PVJY%3D)** |

name: Pete Sepp
subject: What happens when the IRS goes after easy targets?
body:
If you’ve ever felt like the IRS is breathing down your neck, you’re not alone.

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6IjYaGKOHDvgnCkwUaU13Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZOWcP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vcGEtYWN0aW9uP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDExMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ3-KTYJn42BMCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Friend,

If you’ve ever felt like the IRS is breathing down your neck, you’re not alone.

Small business owners, gig workers, and everyday taxpayers are facing unprecedented scrutiny from the IRS, thanks to its growing reach and invasive tactics.

Unfortunately, this subject won’t be in the news much, but I promise you it will have a big impact in the future if we do not get the IRS back under control.

**But there’s good news: The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is fighting back on your behalf.**

I am Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. NTU is the “Taxpayers’ Lobbyist.” We fight to ensure that all Americans are able to pursue their dreams without the heavy hand of the government holding them back.

[NTU is protecting small businesses from IRS abuse, but we can’t do this alone. Will you chip in $10, $35, or even $100 today to support our efforts?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6IjYaGKOHDvgnCkwUaU13Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZOWcP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vcGEtYWN0aW9uP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDExMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ3-KTYJn42BMCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
[Donate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6IjYaGKOHDvgnCkwUaU13Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZOWcP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vcGEtYWN0aW9uP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDExMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ3-KTYJn42BMCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Here are just a few of the victories the National Taxpayers Union achieved in its campaign to reform the IRS.
**Pushing Back on IRS Overreach** In another major win, NTU was instrumental in stopping the IRS from expanding its bank reporting requirements. This would have forced banks to share details of millions of Americans' personal financial transactions just for moving their own money around.

**NTU rallied taxpayers, worked with policymakers, and helped to halt this invasion of privacy in its tracks.**

In another instance, the IRS tried to cancel a hearing on its own rulemaking that would have weakened protections for taxpayers seeking to appeal an audit finding.

**Because we said we wanted to testify - we forced the IRS to hold the hearing. Now, we are putting our efforts on this and other taxpayer rights matters to Members of Congress to strengthen these protections. **
**Defending Small Businesses** Just this year, NTU helped expose the IRS's overreach on issues like micro-captive insurance, a critical tool for small businesses to manage their risk. The IRS wanted to treat these legitimate strategies as tax evasion schemes, targeting business owners across the country.

**But thanks to NTU's relentless advocacy, we’ve shined a light on this aggressive IRS behavior, and now Congress is hearing from entrepreneurs like you, demanding action. **
**Protecting You from Tax Hikes** Let's not forget the battle we waged when Congress was considering massive tax hikes to fund reckless spending. NTU stood firm, advocating for taxpayers in every corner of the country.

**Our efforts resulted in billions of dollars in planned tax hikes being stripped from the final budget. That’s money saved for you and your family. We’ve even succeeded in paring back the excessive $80 billion in extra funding the IRS was given in 2022. **

But we can’t rest on these wins. The IRS continues to seek more authority, and the fight is far from over. We need your help to keep the IRS in check and protect small business owners and other taxpayers from being unfairly targeted.

You can help support the rights of taxpayers by donating today.
[Donate $10](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GyQJ5FnPD9CXzOwdng0T6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZOWcP0RsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC10YXhwYXllcnMtdW5pb24vcGEtYWN0aW9uP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDExMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb24mYW1vdW50PTEwVwNzcGNCCmd_ik2CZ-NgTAhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states.

And when the IRS attempts to make easy targets out of small businesses and individual households, we’re there to push back in the courts and in Congress.

**_The National Taxpayers Union is working for a tax system that Americans can respect rather than fear_.**

With your support, NTU will continue to stand up to the IRS when it’s acting out of bounds, push back on burdensome regulations, and make sure your hard-earned dollars stay in your pocket — not the government’s.

clean_body: If you’ve ever felt like the IRS is breathing down your neck, you’re not alone. | | | ~ Friend, If you’ve ever felt like the IRS is breathing down your neck, you’re not alone. Small business owners, gig workers, and everyday taxpayers are facing unprecedented scrutiny from the IRS, thanks to its growing reach and invasive tactics. Unfortunately, this subject won’t be in the news much, but I promise you it will have a big impact in the future if we do not get the IRS back under control. But there’s good news: The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is fighting back on your behalf. I am Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. NTU is the “Taxpayers’ Lobbyist.” We fight to ensure that all Americans are able to pursue their dreams without the heavy hand of the government holding them back. ~ ~ Here are just a few of the victories the National Taxpayers Union achieved in its campaign to reform the IRS. Pushing Back on IRS Overreach In another major win, NTU was instrumental in stopping the IRS from expanding its bank reporting requirements. This would have forced banks to share details of millions of Americans' personal financial transactions just for moving their own money around. NTU rallied taxpayers, worked with policymakers, and helped to halt this invasion of privacy in its tracks. In another instance, the IRS tried to cancel a hearing on its own rulemaking that would have weakened protections for taxpayers seeking to appeal an audit finding. Because we said we wanted to testify - we forced the IRS to hold the hearing. Now, we are putting our efforts on this and other taxpayer rights matters to Members of Congress to strengthen these protections. Defending Small Businesses Just this year, NTU helped expose the IRS's overreach on issues like micro-captive insurance, a critical tool for small businesses to manage their risk. The IRS wanted to treat these legitimate strategies as tax evasion schemes, targeting business owners across the country. But thanks to NTU's relentless advocacy, we’ve shined a light on this aggressive IRS behavior, and now Congress is hearing from entrepreneurs like you, demanding action. Protecting You from Tax Hikes Let's not forget the battle we waged when Congress was considering massive tax hikes to fund reckless spending. NTU stood firm, advocating for taxpayers in every corner of the country. Our efforts resulted in billions of dollars in planned tax hikes being stripped from the final budget. That’s money saved for you and your family. We’ve even succeeded in paring back the excessive $80 billion in extra funding the IRS was given in 2022. But we can’t rest on these wins. The IRS continues to seek more authority, and the fight is far from over. We need your help to keep the IRS in check and protect small business owners and other taxpayers from being unfairly targeted. You can help support the rights of taxpayers by donating today. ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states. And when the IRS attempts to make easy targets out of small businesses and individual households, we’re there to push back in the courts and in Congress. The National Taxpayers Union is working for a tax system that Americans can respect rather than fear. With your support, NTU will continue to stand up to the IRS when it’s acting out of bounds, push back on burdensome regulations, and make sure your hard-earned dollars stay in your pocket — not the government’s. ~ Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union The National Taxpayers Union is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to the National Taxpayers Union are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. Address: The National Taxpayers Union Foundation 122 C Street, NW Suite 700 Washington, DC 20001 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

With Trudeau out, the door is now open for a new leader who shares our values and supports President Trump's vision for a stronger North America.
### [As you know, President Trump has long advocated for a closer relationship between our two nations, even suggesting that Canada could become the 51st state!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15ef248ff4524f77b73f21ded86c6443&_e=sCbnHOcBP2GIhRX9rz_6Yr4HKRNth5ey3p9DGFD6VuPGXt2tbNC7E0PBdWEZs8jVccsrnel04TLxvbPBDWtT9lK4nM3oXCEBG0oVCCZqABWvoP12lAuj22Tpom1M7K3tog609urE0XKJiLDcx15hdB-NkrqbTt211A2tPzynipzh8R1jJHu-ZvkyXjKTyXZUg7kKyi4cWuZFjTNpIFifSPT5BdAK4uWDU1iQZ4lOyU6lS7oIc3-JJDPg3djTN53DTJhhIO-7cKc70KvshoFh2IhnGZfARbhSzEJ_191Eknvae0V-2_aNwBfGCnLUxXVADxcFeZt_L3LDP85z_5FJqHG3sOCTqufYTninz-rsTfJo5c6gihB3kcd2rOh8EdFJ2CZvnBtgoO1TVjTfKNDrTW2wpZ-udCjCN-RxlBjXP9P6r-nghGDbxflfdahqB_Ps-kqDyl4q6oqX31KeeSAUWlxVSTQZ4iB1_UXqplfFrHzTFzLe1nmQFhHPbpy1HYGLWusPtdI_AEJKuAFGn5pNtRynPRAoM5vhkqkZm8OB0czF3pQ5xPlV5wsjO6gtTgAvzeRUSwdokcHYOlu0IllbkK59tdvwHu9qL2WPCiZC27_Li2etYs0F8n_awyZewc4nyh5KBq8OfcgDdNkGQxlxD3Fhc8452UJV7d3Rrkl5EAA%3D)
Can you imagine the possibilities? **[A united North America, free from the shackles of socialism and bureaucratic red tape, would be an unstoppable force for freedom and prosperity.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15ef248ff4524f77b73f21ded86c6443&_e=sCbnHOcBP2GIhRX9rz_6Yr4HKRNth5ey3p9DGFD6VuPGXt2tbNC7E0PBdWEZs8jVccsrnel04TLxvbPBDWtT9lK4nM3oXCEBG0oVCCZqABWvoP12lAuj22Tpom1M7K3tog609urE0XKJiLDcx15hdB-NkrqbTt211A2tPzynipzh8R1jJHu-ZvkyXjKTyXZUg7kKyi4cWuZFjTNpIFifSPT5BdAK4uWDU1iQZ4lOyU6lS7oIc3-JJDPg3djTN53DTJhhIO-7cKc70KvshoFh2IhnGZfARbhSzEJ_191Eknvae0V-2_aNwBfGCnLUxXVADxcFeZt_L3LDP85z_5FJqHG3sOCTqufYTninz-rsTfJo5c6gihB3kcd2rOh8EdFJ2CZvnBtgoO1TVjTfKNDrTW2wpZ-udCjCN-RxlBjXP9P6r-nghGDbxflfdahqB_Ps-kqDyl4q6oqX31KeeSAUWlxVSTQZ4iB1_UXqplfFrHzTFzLe1nmQFhHPbpy1HYGLB_RxUFdnmtJ905VZk4h0xrElQd1ujgIE9i_a21aGf_7nouKPs55xjr2NtF5p2Iz0gI-d8ufoHniFYBhSYPBNa7OAfiq-3powKM7ScY6Af6E1jbNEspoFcwtO3QIItdRBM-LnynpJV4B6T177AVemQ12TBCYfDs9cEIhh1kR2wXs%3D)** But we must act quickly. | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0acbbceae3a8433bbb691a2ce0176e8f&_e=xiNbD60IGatPQHKtZ-PSyFQyUauh-iphuMiA32mEd65vIfzpj8xTShnEx-SzxbpscuPjYgPTV10iXikqQspV1z68Ezy1rYqDJlh7g3jClsFza0RuWt9KDPu4HknSoF8kav2VdKxuxYgDxlaeMEpnj0LkF9b_1swiiKz_4EuSO8fuu513Dvp1eDuWTUUt0-Nkh38xTN35VnpbETt9dkeAhidfMdug7HDdM0QILAKRZbA_TZ-RsqQM0pIDTECc3pN8YOAW4YmPr94-tGF1QCdLF3ARk7W9ETbx3XcIIAjQsUi4m2rQp1iHnveGYy5ttUlPrD8nfPsFQaIvtfw2BuSu4vlQQZ48Ov9526XcSuLUSSPi0_Tp4k6APZXR2BmcRN_3lJBnxhjL1L_GS7W-S-4x9w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0acbbceae3a8433bbb691a2ce0176e8f&_e=xiNbD60IGatPQHKtZ-PSyFQyUauh-iphuMiA32mEd65vIfzpj8xTShnEx-SzxbpscuPjYgPTV10iXikqQspV1z68Ezy1rYqDJlh7g3jClsFza0RuWt9KDPu4HknSoF8kav2VdKxuxYgDxlaeMEpnj0LkF9b_1swiiKz_4EuSO8fuu513Dvp1eDuWTUUt0-Nkh38xTN35VnpbETt9dkeAhidfMdug7HDdM0QILAKRZbA_TZ-RsqQM0pIDTECc3pN8FROztsFlKl5GGenZllKs7jTbQBtUgNQIntRf-cfDqfk61odlEjWiF3OFbD5RUBKSqU2k5MhQdQBAwP7Lj5dSOU20rEMrAAynYRpGf1mkqMW87ATolWdlupTpEDZV0us0ZUxHO7aZgYIpLitEnzf8Dw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th. During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s truly important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that eternal “heavenly treasures” await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession. I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions. # Saturday, January 11, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1967, the San Diego Rockets basketball team was founded, and then moved to become the Houston Rockets in 1971. And, let's be honest, the name fits the Texas city quite a bit better! ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GSsyAURp8GujhwRYwFxd_Y5W-3dNCLkQlyM3A3Jm-_4_b7lV9xzpyv23TzMcV8_-_34Pi90gQKuovSF60n9DF9JiPRzQoHLYPTfWu7odMdyM3NelAW1eqtNkbDcF1U3y_WXxEN4NzJ6E6Y0ueg123TQmsC-GVdFaJXVhgVMDKVhrfA4e3rmj70CqVZaJfJbczPKtp_AkYB43EcDdfNU04xh4bKXcC4-Ywz0UPAGDKXGOp50ndlypdCyyNwlcXh84gpxWp7YdR99zH9KvjP5peDnwAAAP__vbdaWA)) As reported yesterday, Texas families went to work in this winter weather to create amazing snowmen, and some took it upon themselves to prove that everything really is bigger in Texas! ([Watch Video](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS0WdwfGGRi6eEvXjhYJR4yEQ2Qj47x95e795k8_6f9zm24-5fR6fvuFXT1imVChuSi4AEzBp_yZtAzursIVJDuw1JurAYNydmYwfPWeDFnQBDRYTRBhGO6aVNQskzsxBefQAnWEpBn9I0YVgle90IpDqmXt6syVD7_F_Ck7r92jLDK7udb3JuhL4ChwbK11sRz6xW07DwLHPQUuAkcwVvdGydWFd0s5p623Qqvn4lP-s-q_cbvD3wAAAP__w2xPEA)) We're sponsored today by [HP Instant Ink](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u8zAMAJ9G3mKIpH-iQcOHz_BQIAXaDh0N2aJiAXJsyEqcvH3hpGs5kocDcd-n7mR88Jfzu5lYp7ubO5RYHiQcADprfHh0RWZ1L62CjDXUVJWqhBKzUQ8VHgt2AzFV0tY9FKrvnVUlOQXqKDOvd5mEfbAGygmpYDSDc9JaIytRSLY-zTFPIye-m9WFx3zjmA_zlAU9prSsgv4JbAW227blE_tL4jjwknZGYEu1IvwQ2OIb_v_82lFqr94KaoCOSgms1msPgpo0cvfr75boJxMfryMKai68rYFT4vjakaBGQgfwDJJFbZfNh-DXqhaFPE_Gh-eT6c9qN40_AQAA___q4GuQ). ## Texas Falls to Ohio St. in Cotton Bowl
The Texas Longhorns [came up short](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQRb_G7oI8Y8CmcPEaS6_ItluiAY-JJRMjsELy9yu239te6Ryd7_t4p5TTc_milV19xzKiwu6m4AYwBkr5M7YyuEmFASQ7MLrvhg46lA8H0XKvYzfYKVobcQoxkrFAKpCe2MrkLpiCa2hANxp1y0hzjCoEUr1oFYdUy97UB1d-0xHzp7x4b-ayyuwetW6H0P8EeoH-PM-Gj-15nQL9XHLmhW-xlDpRzgL9zjNtAv0o0C-08v8g0LcKemNgALm7sJ0p53T0RrRqWSnlX1P9M_3l8CcAAP__P51aeg) in the Cotton Bowl in Arlington Friday night, falling to Ohio State 28-14 in game that came down to the final two minutes of play. With the Longhorns trailing 21-14 late in the fourth quarter, Ohio State DE Jack Sawyer forced a fumble from Texas QB Quinn Ewers on fourth-and-goal and returned it 83 yards for the game-sealing touchdown. ([Watch Play](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGngW4NDAOeBcU1dHvtlQYdWCfB1SjR3be_eP1-7Zf8kv_vvb9HLvx8_MQ5-frKSw8K7E3pm9Y9RS7vHiX5QVGnZfK6Nc52VluQk3fK5XGIoHGkAe2QXdsi0pcDZyhSJ9lfmNLXoNWmMWAwQRxzVkRROYEqEddla-qUanrFPZf3cqStGZdZFj_Vuu7CfAsIAsJ5nk3a1-d1CggHU1oEhLHwKiD0AgKTgIDGOKvRyM3TenIpvLtWoHrMkcs_XD-WHh7-AgAA__-UGVOC)) Ewers connected with RB Jaydon Blue for two touchdown passes on the night in a showcase of two of the nation's top defenses trading punches. This week's winter weather sent Cotton Bowl [ticket prices plummeting](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kbGO3CAQhp8Gd6zMYHu1hYucTu4uXZRyhWG8RgHGgjmz-_aRE6dIcVQ_82m-kWZ-ftw_jA8-Pb6biCM_F7pDC71slVTq7owPr3vXuHFu3U01OKqrHvpbr3po1lGB6m4OwHXzbJRz89X1vTLLglqrWevGj4esVceDq9IXDbpDMHZZWudMO4iuReeZ8oVXZHyasoQX7ZgvlmITxpV5K0J_EzAJmGqtl1jSwQRMmORnETCVjTIfgXjFLGCyxExJzlSDZG9_Icste4tFbuEzRmRponeyojkapKVkMafDYLJ8e1PZPH6g0JPZ_I65eEpCv-8gYEhUMO-YrbErCv2uBAyOYll9PH8Zk8NccbYUN0qYuJyk2oJ05tmwXf-qGANG5Pw60b8R_9WbPLqt-hB8Ga6iax_R-PBnRfzlzfYRfgcAAP__6dyc_Q) leading up to the contest, and the announced attendance was about 15,000 less than capacity at AT&T Stadium.
## Bomb Threat Scares in Austin, San Antonio
Poteet Independent School District, near San Antonio, sent students home Friday morning after a [bomb threat sent via email](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAQRn8NdhgYQN2C4hq7vfZKMwvjSoJiZLLu_vuL199Xf3l5eT_36Y4pp-35jSt5fs9lAgVOKi21niKm_JlsE_1DxZtuyOvedO7mtINm8UBDVDdlw4A09N08GGO0C27Q1jysxib5C6b0Nei1aQ0YS4BhnlWMqDphFcXE5Wh5IaY31jl_youONpS1yX5h3qswXwJGAeN5nu36qbjhxmVL5ToJGDc6q4Axl4BZwIgHp5BJwLgXJmKZapS8HIQsa1hKyTLkUilKUAp65Wy7L3tz-LifKedUu15Y9Vwx5T8L_jfLy8NvAAAA__-BPGT4) demanded $30,000 in ransom money. Meanwhile, 44-year-old Gerard Hayes was arrested after allegedly issuing a bomb threat at an Austin H-E-B grocery store. Police arrested Hayes after searching his unoccupied vehicle outside the store without finding any explosives and said the threat stemmed [directly from an incident](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfY7qJ7LENoaC4hm6vvTIa7CGM1sERzMLm35-y_b72SZ_03r-P2wdJkfX-lx486Pdcb2gxgnXg3C2TlNctNHmYbO5dw4PrfBv76CI2y2A9h2voQ0R219C3OXJsU8cJ2ffUXRsZ3ph172Dn_MWjD4yU5tnmTLY1wXIWrdtFF1b-pn0ur3rwdkn10ZRhUX3uxv8xOBocz_O8fB5f_C4NjrSppMIGx5XP3eBYaqJicFx4gqk-JtBlY1Kgr11lhR8fZD14V7mTSl3hWYskBkoqh-gLCn0y6EaHvEFse7Bzx90UGGzfRgh8nYFccDAlZ72P0U9z32xDfp5SiuxtZ4K9P0jKzwT99dNjwP8BAAD__zYMeFw) on Wednesday. The bomb threat comes a day after a man at a Central Texas H-E-B was arrested for [wielding a gun](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQBb_GdCB7ARMKF9fQ5dor0WIvYSWDkb0Kyd-fcv29-mk0mp_7fEeOfDy-cScnrzXNoKGvtamNmQNyfM9dFdyiw2gqcmZobT_2podqcwi290i3ZbDWj9aOZPQSzDgQ6kDjrWL3gWnzGQymbVpoOwL066pDQG1VpymwpNzIRkIvLGt8pyflxqe9im4TOYtqvxRMCqbrupr9XfDAQ9LB6XNSMB10FQVTTB6jggmzsI-kYNpoqYVyTpmLsK9ly4RSY85UpAatwd5s35zbWWUXzotj5GIH1enHjhz_HOTfKE8HvwEAAP__gkdlSg) in the store during a dispute over a return.

clean_body: The Texas Longhorns in the Cotton Bowl in Arlington Friday night, falling to Ohio State 28-14 in game that came down to the final two minutes of play. | | | | | | Saturday, January 11, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1967, the San Diego Rockets basketball team was founded, and then moved to become the Houston Rockets in 1971. And, let's be honest, the name fits the Texas city quite a bit better! () As reported yesterday, Texas families went to work in this winter weather to create amazing snowmen, and some took it upon themselves to prove that everything really is bigger in Texas! () We're sponsored today by . Be sure to check them out in today's edition. Abilene ☀️ 57/31° | Amarillo ☀️ 45/23° | Austin ☀️ 58/38° | Brownsville ⛅ 58/48° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 58/46° | DFW ☀️ 44/36° | El Paso ☀️ 52/29° | Houston ☀️ 51/42° | Laredo ☀️ 59/39° | Lubbock ☀️ 53/33° | Midland ☀️ 53/30° | San Antonio ☀️ 56/36° | Tyler ☀️ 49/37° | Waco ☀️ 53/37° | Texas Falls to Ohio St. in Cotton Bowl The Texas Longhorns in the Cotton Bowl in Arlington Friday night, falling to Ohio State 28-14 in game that came down to the final two minutes of play. With the Longhorns trailing 21-14 late in the fourth quarter, Ohio State DE Jack Sawyer forced a fumble from Texas QB Quinn Ewers on fourth-and-goal and returned it 83 yards for the game-sealing touchdown. () Ewers connected with RB Jaydon Blue for two touchdown passes on the night in a showcase of two of the nation's top defenses trading punches. This week's winter weather sent Cotton Bowl leading up to the contest, and the announced attendance was about 15,000 less than capacity at AT&T Stadium. Bomb Threat Scares in Austin, San Antonio Poteet Independent School District, near San Antonio, sent students home Friday morning after a demanded $30,000 in ransom money. Meanwhile, 44-year-old Gerard Hayes was arrested after allegedly issuing a bomb threat at an Austin H-E-B grocery store. Police arrested Hayes after searching his unoccupied vehicle outside the store without finding any explosives and said the threat stemmed on Wednesday. The bomb threat comes a day after a man at a Central Texas H-E-B was arrested for in the store during a dispute over a return. Texas Zip Codes Most Popular in U.S. Texas was very well represented in of 2024, with Texas zips taking the top four spots and six of the top ten. Houston suburbs Katy and Cypress claimed the top two spots, while San Antonio and New Braunfels slotted in at three and four, respectively. Opendoor cited low housing costs and high job growth for Texas' high rankings, and also included Plano and Tomball in its "hidden gems" listings. You can check out the full list of 2024's most . The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | Flying together with our sponsor Say goodbye to last-minute ink cartridge sprints. With HP Instant Ink, you'll never be caught empty-handed again. Their smart printers automatically monitor ink levels and send new cartridges directly to your door before you run out. Plus, with their special offer, . That means more time for creating memories, focusing on work, or unleashing your creative side, and less time searching for ink. | ➤ This week's winter storms** have passed through Texas, but road closures and disruptions continued Friday, with at least 550 flights canceled through the inclement weather at Dallas-Fort Worth and Dallas Love Field airports alone. () ➤ El Paso: U.S. Rep. Veronica Escobar has been appointed to the powerful House Appropriations Committee, which oversees federal government budgeting. () ➤ Sen. Ted Cruz voiced support for the U.S. acquiring Greenland, backing recent comments by President-elect Donald Trump that the semi-autonomous territory was crucial for national security. () ➤ Tyler: Economist Dr. Ray Perryman said this week that "the Tyler area is very well situated for economic growth" at the 41st annual Economic Outlook event. () ➤ Today 's Lotto Texas $66.75 million jackpot is the largest in almost two years as the 86th drawing since a $29 million winner in June. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5215644b0f64f48a5629429824c34a2&_e=PLmN_Ueh42Ok0zZa3hJKEJrOyLVSzHojq--3W1n-V5IzwpxgenzIMfq7ym1AXT-TKaU5f0Nm9KnEVghsCpW-WdMb0f4evMnEv0xAh6-m2bhZ6nQy8e9LY6iqfJHyBkE7E3GH3zwM3FXbJxEs4aFlOw3e6chMz0sJUPXbAiajkOrPUUoocM511YRu_u70OlSXx5bTuq8r9dC4suhL0PMwSxoa0oT8Tl4W4XAF3r4rZXJdrMeDtKr9ma21PFTHQpNBTq_OqvkPzzH1Kx8ZLYwYdE34QRbZ3OXDd5IPqznyJLe6I8W28qUZK-6lHe98e-fJ5Qw4QKQzZyyOJErzdpsGpw7Yh_17OjnTznTCGHRDqZOSe30oZf0KLk_4XkFPwTmT6kL2upfm_QKKhE5H-IBzUQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5215644b0f64f48a5629429824c34a2&_e=PLmN_Ueh42Ok0zZa3hJKEJrOyLVSzHojq--3W1n-V5IzwpxgenzIMfq7ym1AXT-TKaU5f0Nm9KnEVghsCpW-WdMb0f4evMnEv0xAh6-m2bhZ6nQy8e9LY6iqfJHyBkE7E3GH3zwM3FXbJxEs4aFlOw3e6chMz0sJUPXbAiajkOrPUUoocM511YRu_u70OlSXx5bTuq8r9dC4suhL0PMwSxoa0oT8Tl4W4XAF3r4rZXJdrMeDtKr9ma21PFTHQpNBL0AwUImz9GZ4IqXplgbFuy41ZadQwJqpf0C882-brA4Vb6fG8pm0J36oz9mJNcZTiOyYQor8vjNLVbr5_ejR7-kjFir8crAjeoMpQmRCvBl4BtpJgdM3a9-MA1RT0RNZ2rjLMg7K6OWgHSS1k4P5_w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5215644b0f64f48a5629429824c34a2&_e=PLmN_Ueh42Ok0zZa3hJKEJrOyLVSzHojq--3W1n-V5IzwpxgenzIMfq7ym1AXT-TKaU5f0Nm9KnEVghsCpW-WdMb0f4evMnEv0xAh6-m2bhZ6nQy8e9LY6iqfJHyBkE7E3GH3zwM3FXbJxEs4aFlOw3e6chMz0sJUPXbAiajkOrPUUoocM511YRu_u70OlSXx5bTuq8r9dC4suhL0PMwSxoa0oT8Tl4W4XAF3r4rZXJdrMeDtKr9ma21PFTHQpNBLfRcXoRd7TJkKGLVr81g69EksqpE-mDLNMyOxMbrOikFa9996JmNOe-nuchWlpdgfH_zYfgpu7cXmhjstLf2iXvVwupGfp3-24g7ajpt5sUVoq5PwSWAT-hBaP7NcvIqYIaZAP07ldnWsCecBbKtIQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Firefighters Make Progress, Water Rankings, and Ohio St. Wins
body:
Multiple wildfires [continued to burn](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1gsmBAKir9xl7-90sJmifdETATEvrz9yelvutFoRqPv6zbdPCXa7v_9A12LeZJCai6AA0zBU3pPQxdcRJSoOnRg1EVbDfbarc56bTQsYD0ofZVWmVn4MGD0aOJsVEfuXBNwSgmt-kWJYK2Y5wgajJVsEBio5dJ_Z9raijG9846lX_KjS25t7VmZ-sfkyOR4HEcf88-GRz1zJsdEO_LTMznW_Gorlo0vPlHMZSPPU67cb3dMWHmkgpV_Gq9n8A0rBw6CSyGHrrjwPCglqhfDBnF_eEqfD-0vJruTvwEAAP__TixkBw) in Southern California yesterday, with officials reporting at least 10 deaths. Over 10,000 homes across 27,000 acres have burned, and 20 suspected looters have been arrested.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z0GLgzAUBOBfk9wqSV5imkMOC8WelGVZ6FGM71mzxCqarfTfL-69c53hg7nVbd3FFB_3ppvI52FulVDmJORJyha7mF6t5ugHIkXAyUsLpXFGujMffQh0FjZ0xmLpjDOgeq1dHwIiBG2RR39oQh4BYaDoQaBzIoRBGmmdYloQxjyvxc8cH3mkIb3mJ61FP088-THnZWPwwVTFVLXvezHhulA-aqaqr6ttmgtTFdT2-_p5O2ZQbb9BMrgYJy1fPS57TClupWVa3Kcupn87v_v69OovAAD__5XAUrk) | |
# Saturday, January 11, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1908, President Theodore Roosevelt utilized the Antiquities Act of 1906 and designated [the Grand Canyon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z81qhDAUQOGnSXYj-TVmkUWhuLOLMtDuJDE34y1xMmi02Kcv033PA3xwPoZx8JjxfnvzC7iayiiY0BfGL5yP0WM-R0WjSwACJAXHjWy11dx2dHahE5KHADCpzlgGIpkkk4m67ZjpJkXRPTXGn0mmZTNJFq1lISSuubGCKAYRa1mbr4L3OkPKZzlgbaay0OzmWh8bkS9E9ET0Z9nr3gQgosf369Fex88fNRDZJ_B1X4HI1232K0S6uvj4xpxxaw1R7LZ4zH9k_W_xcOI3AAD__wz-UgM) as a national monument. It would later be established as a national park in 1919. In today’s edition, we report on an Australian hiker who survived for nearly two weeks on foraged granola bars and berries. When rescuers found him, he was surprisingly well and had lost track of time, believing only a week had passed. [Read about it below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3u3CAQxJ_G7rBg8ce5oEjj7tKmtDAs581hOAE2urePnP4_1Ui_0Wg0f57rU5On8PqtD1TFxRU4DIwLJsRqNfnv2rdWOURA2aISkxyHeRDzo91VL8dt6qFHDQCP3o5ucEZb0NJoM4-iJXW3cXFL8kF2RnI7z3zbnBjENEPTc7RUYur-RgplR-e_8cLUmXi0Xu2lfHIjfzWwNLDUWruwmYA137yB5bY3iMnbBpaDcqbwYvrMJWlPOrCd3piYi2ewLJ_pousOlBpZRXxndpyYPbFNp8w2TIkws2SCFo9xBmiTsp9K3lMep6bnr0OT_7-t_PTVpeBfAAAA___jkm4V). We are sponsored this weekend by [Gundry MD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z0GLgzAUBOBfk9wqSV5imkMOC8WelGVZ6FGM71mzxCqarfTfL-69c53hg7nVbd3FFB_3ppvI52FulVDmJORJyha7mF6t5ugHIkXAyUsLpXFGujMffQh0FjZ0xmLpjDOgeq1dHwIiBG2RR39oQh4BYaDoQaBzIoRBGmmdYloQxjyvxc8cH3mkIb3mJ61FP088-THnZWPwwVTFVLXvezHhulA-aqaqr6ttmgtTFdT2-_p5O2ZQbb9BMrgYJy1fPS57TClupWVa3Kcupn87v_v69OovAAD__5XAUrk) offering the latest dietary advice.
|
---
## Trump Sentenced, Released Without Restrictions
President-elect Donald Trump received an [unconditional discharge sentence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNiJ-bGwGhi7e0rWjhc0lvhUGC1-nyttX6d5v_aRzpPN1n-8BM5bHZ9jBU6qzlroXUgml5hgwv-aOR58ANBgOXg3G9q5XbuSbT1YuYAzEYGJM3WLduESbutGNSUqbOPo3Tar3jOzNbTUyOieXJaleDU6zTkJEqu32XbHQBim_6hPaba07z34jOk5mPpiemJ5ogw1zfn9MTw0eVw6EtTA9rfVqJJZAlOFkeurlMDqrBbVrP8QJhaCsEEWp4rgKntsOhZieePPx-MGc8bQD6-RjD_gn4PRfjKfXvwEAAP__1QZh6w) on Friday, freeing him from the threat of jail or fines related to his felony conviction for falsifying business documents. Trump was found guilty of 34 felonies in a New York courtroom last May, but a series of legal motions delayed sentencing. He is now the first former president and presidential candidate to be convicted of a felony. Judge Juan Merchan, who presided over the proceedings including Friday’s sentencing, addressed the court, stating that Trump received fair treatment and that the case was [no different than any other](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uhDAQBOCnsbtDu2swR-EiDd2lTYn8sxwmBiOwDl2ePiJ9phpppE-ar8fwsDHF9flpFzZlzAMBNTfAG-IQbEzvoZbBjMzESrLBVumma7C7y8mAR-VQAWhy5LVHvt-pbikEq0mzktFcGuAVBY2qvILQdeDciA22HYkaOMSS92rOcS0Tj-mdX7xXPi8ymamU7RDqQ1AvqD_Ps3LOX5ugfuXzENTbvUSf-Kr-Zw7zN4ZtS1nuJmxnTCkeuhU1PBcb059a_nv5MvQbAAD__8QVUyQ) case. Trump appeared virtually from his Florida residence and disagreed with Merchan’s assessment, [proclaiming his innocence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ2j3XWAuHDxN-7yt1cig5fgk7ERNol4-xPX37QjfRrN13N4uhBDev13K5s654GAWgkoEQfvQjyHe-PNzEysGjbYq67VLepHs5iR3MSgaOLH7LV_YKdHNSNQ5_qRaWqCuTTAKwpadZsUeK1hHGdssdck7sA-1LzfvnNIdeE5nvnN-23KaxPNUutWhPonyAqy6dxyqVclyF6wIAsoyCIIskeRiT9FkPU5uehl3Y91ky-uRaYsN04u1lOGJJejLHLNiU85ucKCbLMbv31CjKF0vbjDa3Uh_m6of33yNvQTAAD__30-Ylk) and stating that the case lacked merit.
## Firefighters Make Progress in California
Multiple wildfires [continued to burn](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1gsmBAKir9xl7-90sJmifdETATEvrz9yelvutFoRqPv6zbdPCXa7v_9A12LeZJCai6AA0zBU3pPQxdcRJSoOnRg1EVbDfbarc56bTQsYD0ofZVWmVn4MGD0aOJsVEfuXBNwSgmt-kWJYK2Y5wgajJVsEBio5dJ_Z9raijG9846lX_KjS25t7VmZ-sfkyOR4HEcf88-GRz1zJsdEO_LTMznW_Gorlo0vPlHMZSPPU67cb3dMWHmkgpV_Gq9n8A0rBw6CSyGHrrjwPCglqhfDBnF_eEqfD-0vJruTvwEAAP__TixkBw) in Southern California yesterday, with officials reporting at least 10 deaths. Over 10,000 homes across 27,000 acres have burned, and 20 suspected looters have been arrested. Wind conditions improved Friday, allowing firefighters to push back the flames and increase containment. As of Friday morning, the Palisades Fire was 8% contained, the Eaton Fire 3%, the Hurst Fire 37%, and the Kenneth Fire 35% contained. [See a map of the fires here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdEbeNeaOwkUaukubEi2wPjYyGGHn0P19RPpMNdJIM6P39RgeJFG25yet7EtIAxp02oAGGGaS-B6aavaBGdlW7OFmW9c56O7V4qlxyGChdTjenTHWITARTDCFxrq2En-1GbhkjbP1ZM3cdWYcAzi4dagaw7OUdNTfSbaycIjv9OKjntJaRb-UsmdlPxT2CvvzPOtpzBuf-coV9pdV2E8UJaRjE9JBDtYr7VnvFCXTzFkzlbTp5efIRV9_FPbV4ef9lBgltzfVmOdKEv9Gy38QXh5_AwAA__-4Hl3f). Insurance officials have estimated that damages from this week's fires [may exceed $20 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1iAwQkDQxdv6drR4ucS3-raRIbESp--cvee4SxH-nT0fd3mm0fC7f7pV3Atl1kJZbiQXMo5eaT3rLvkMoCCoQMnL8NorJH22i0OUhiNylaHMIacNSQNRsUMVx2NFKFDd9KEPDMIM_RxEMlaEUKWRl6sYlpAwlb2_rvg1hbI9C4v2PtY1o7c0tqjsuGDqYmp6TiOPm4hniNT04lmahLyLMvURKVyv92BoPIDKWXcofJYnpR4AB5LbYRQGw_kf4Djxp-VL1hb2d-8X9pK3e7S40AirOOFaXFfPdLfl_afm5dTvwEAAP__VKZmfQ), surpassing the $12.5 billion in damages from the 2018 Camp Fire, which was the most costly blaze in the nation’s history. President Biden announced on Thursday that the [federal government would cover](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uxCAQhJ8Gd1iwa_xTUESK3F2ULqWFzdq3EQcnIHe6t4-cPtPOaPTp-7osF8eB4_HhbmTrnhZQYKTSUuvFOw6vpWu83YmAsCGrB-zNZPQ0NlercPWd8eRHjUSjgkEh9asaDAKu0Ddszzelz6Ay2G6o_DSpdd210cMEolPkuabcfieO9Up7eKUH5XZLtybYa633IvBNwCxgdusW6VnaI521gPkzBa68FQHzyp6izI4LFbmTp-yC3H-i53hIjlzZBRlSkS4eFM4NZxIwl5ryS-DMXuC71oPRfdeNTbb-_uQQuPSD6NRxcxz-mOp_jh4WfgMAAP__GBdoGw) 100% of costs for the initial disaster response, including debris removal, temporary shelters, and salaries for first responders for 180 days.
## Rankings: Worst Drinking Water in the Nation
Pennsylvania, Texas, and West Virginia have [the worst drinking water](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71uwyAUhZ_GbFiXPxMGhi7Z0rWjhcN1chtsIqBBefvK3XvGo6Pz6fu6zJdAifbbZ9jQtzXPEqThILgQcwyU3rNm0a-IEhVDL6yajDPCndjda9CTwMmiUMtiLBrQIBVaZeOqrJsY-eMNxBEFRo1XBdE5WJZVGGGdHDRgpJbL-J1pb3dc0zu_sIzXvLHk760966A-Bnke5Ln3Pu7Ya0d8HIOjyqU2HgvtD9pvvIeGhW_hyX9q4LWFhpVLEArsiRUfn51SojrZQcNtC5T-OO0_75eXvwEAAP__-CdZSw) in the nation, according to Newsweek, while Hawaii, Delaware, and Kentucky have the cleanest. Newsweek analyzed data from the Environmental Protection Agency on health-based violations, including failures to remove harmful chemicals, monitoring and reporting issues, and not notifying the public about water quality problems. Hawaii, the state with the fewest violations, had only two, followed by Delaware with 117 and Kentucky with 139. Pennsylvania had the most violations, with 24,525, followed by Texas with 15,340 and West Virginia with 7,473. Newsweek also reported that bottled water is regulated by the FDA, which has less rigorous oversight compared to the EPA's regulation of tap water. Additionally, some bottled water is simply filtered tap water. [See where your state ranks here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71uwyAUhZ_GbFiXPxMGhi7Z0rWjhcN1chtsIqBBefvK3XvGo6Pz6fu6zJdAifbbZ9jQtzXPEqThILgQcwyU3rNm0a-IEhVDL6yajDPCndjda9CTwMmiUMtiLBrQIBVaZeOqrJsY-eMNxBEFRo1XBdE5WJZVGGGdHDRgpJbL-J1pb3dc0zu_sIzXvLHk760966A-Bnke5Ln3Pu7Ya0d8HIOjyqU2HgvtD9pvvIeGhW_hyX9q4LWFhpVLEArsiRUfn51SojrZQcNtC5T-OO0_75eXvwEAAP__-CdZSw).
|
---
