clean_body: Multiple wildfires in Southern California yesterday, with officials reporting at least 10 deaths. Over 10,000 homes across 27,000 acres have burned, and 20 suspected looters have been arrested. | | | | | | Saturday, January 11, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1908, President Theodore Roosevelt utilized the Antiquities Act of 1906 and designated as a national monument. It would later be established as a national park in 1919. In today’s edition, we report on an Australian hiker who survived for nearly two weeks on foraged granola bars and berries. When rescuers found him, he was surprisingly well and had lost track of time, believing only a week had passed. . We are sponsored this weekend by offering the latest dietary advice. | Trump Sentenced, Released Without Restrictions President-elect Donald Trump received an on Friday, freeing him from the threat of jail or fines related to his felony conviction for falsifying business documents. Trump was found guilty of 34 felonies in a New York courtroom last May, but a series of legal motions delayed sentencing. He is now the first former president and presidential candidate to be convicted of a felony. Judge Juan Merchan, who presided over the proceedings including Friday’s sentencing, addressed the court, stating that Trump received fair treatment and that the case was case. Trump appeared virtually from his Florida residence and disagreed with Merchan’s assessment, and stating that the case lacked merit. Firefighters Make Progress in California Multiple wildfires in Southern California yesterday, with officials reporting at least 10 deaths. Over 10,000 homes across 27,000 acres have burned, and 20 suspected looters have been arrested. Wind conditions improved Friday, allowing firefighters to push back the flames and increase containment. As of Friday morning, the Palisades Fire was 8% contained, the Eaton Fire 3%, the Hurst Fire 37%, and the Kenneth Fire 35% contained. . Insurance officials have estimated that damages from this week's fires , surpassing the $12.5 billion in damages from the 2018 Camp Fire, which was the most costly blaze in the nation’s history. President Biden announced on Thursday that the 100% of costs for the initial disaster response, including debris removal, temporary shelters, and salaries for first responders for 180 days. Rankings: Worst Drinking Water in the Nation Pennsylvania, Texas, and West Virginia have in the nation, according to Newsweek, while Hawaii, Delaware, and Kentucky have the cleanest. Newsweek analyzed data from the Environmental Protection Agency on health-based violations, including failures to remove harmful chemicals, monitoring and reporting issues, and not notifying the public about water quality problems. Hawaii, the state with the fewest violations, had only two, followed by Delaware with 117 and Kentucky with 139. Pennsylvania had the most violations, with 24,525, followed by Texas with 15,340 and West Virginia with 7,473. Newsweek also reported that bottled water is regulated by the FDA, which has less rigorous oversight compared to the EPA's regulation of tap water. Additionally, some bottled water is simply filtered tap water. . | ➤ A recent AP-NORC poll shows President Biden is less popular than President-elect Trump was after January 6, 2021, with fewer than 1 in 10 Americans calling Biden’s presidency great. () ➤ Oil prices surged on Friday, reaching their highest levels since October, after the Treasury Department imposed sweeping sanctions on Russia’s oil industry. () ➤ December's job numbers surpassed expectations, with employers adding 256,000 jobs, well above the forecasted 153,000, while the unemployment rate dropped to 4.1%. Watson is expected to miss the 2025 NFL season. This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EKH8ZSPZcsNKW1D2Y1iD5A~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EKH8ZSPZcsNKW1D2Y1iD5A~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EKH8ZSPZcsNKW1D2Y1iD5A~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: History Facts
subject: Divers recently found an unusual shipwreck
body:
More than 160 years after vanishing beneath the waves of the Atlantic, the wreck of French steamship Le Lyonnais was discovered off the coast of Massachusetts. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cfz5vslgem5fghkql8d9znr8kdn9rse0m4kgzdu88he6g00tnlnwl8n60uaq64mtb1es8hru5jz82gftg22hvvgtc64fo2dayk3v69tpv7dj8dc51q0kbmuz4exioorhn0hbjcxb13q6u5r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Divers recently found a long-lost shipwreck that sank in a hit-and-run.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| M ore than 160 years after vanishing beneath the waves of the Atlantic, the wreck of French steamship Le Lyonnais was discovered off the coast of Massachusetts. The ship’s demise in November 1856 was a bit out of the ordinary. Le Lyonnais didn’t topple in a storm or suffer an epic wreck — it sank as a result of a hit-and-run.
---
Le Lyonnais was sailing from the U.S. to France when it collided with the U.S. sailing ship Adriatic. The Adriatic suffered only minor damage and sailed on, heading for port in Gloucester, Massachusetts, for repairs. The crew of the Adriatic reportedly thought Le Lyonnais was fine to carry on as well, but the French ship was not so fortunate: The hull was punctured, and despite the crew’s efforts to patch the breach, the situation grew worse. Three days later, Le Lyonnais succumbed to the damage and sank. Of the steamship’s 132 passengers, only 18 survived.
Though the fate of Le Lyonnais was known, the exact location of its wreckage remained a mystery until recently. In August 2024, a shipwreck hunting and salvaging team [discovered](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the vessel about 200 miles from New Bedford, Massachusetts. They knew they’d found the right ship thanks to a [few key details](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) including the horizontal steam engine and iron hull plates. Most crucially, the engine’s cylinder measured 57 inches — a perfect match with the ship’s records. According to Jennifer Sellitti, a member of the crew that found the ship and the author of _The Adriatic Affair: A Maritime Hit-and-Run off the Coast of Nantucket_ , Adriatic Captain John Durham later had his ship apprehended by French authorities and was put on trial. But even with the international attention, the sinking of Le Lyonnais was all but forgotten after the onset of the American Civil War.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj4jglistc4vo37a6rhmg1oo53gexa7lxun979jt85ekm80a1jyfcabq8bzeljdjimkmjb4xwky884fj8nuu7kkbzrg7bcy2gw1fqxcnddngfmxvyo0n4lc9k0hb4hhrfn3jda1jt1jks2xwvng99iju224zbdka7dxdf3moe1qwojpjo1lq562wlke4bcn56yf10r38i4a5g5pmusxr5ivey9f91fyr8wrqn35titicmwnjx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A California chicken farmer once discovered a $400 million shipwreck.
Mel Fisher followed a winding path to becoming one of history’s most profitable treasure hunters. After spending his childhood and university years in Indiana, followed by a stint with the U.S. Army, Fisher ended up in California, where he worked on his parents’ chicken ranch. It was there that he indulged in a longtime passion, opening his first dive shop in a feed shed on the ranch. By the 1960s, Fisher was immersed in the world of shipwreck hunting and had become fixated on finding the Nuestra Señora de Atocha, a Spanish treasure galleon that sank off the Florida Keys in 1622. In 1985, it [paid off](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spxapk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com): Fisher’s team found the long-lost ship, and its gold, silver, jewels, and other artifacts, worth about $400 million, were intact. The Atocha treasure made Fisher a millionaire — and led to law reform. In 1987, Congress passed the Abandoned Shipwreck Act, giving states ownership of shipwrecks found within 3 miles of their coastlines.

clean_body: More than 160 years after vanishing beneath the waves of the Atlantic, the wreck of French steamship Le Lyonnais was discovered off the coast of Massachusetts. | M ore than 160 years after vanishing beneath the waves of the Atlantic, the wreck of French steamship Le Lyonnais was discovered off the coast of Massachusetts. The ship’s demise in November 1856 was a bit out of the ordinary. Le Lyonnais didn’t topple in a storm or suffer an epic wreck — it sank as a result of a hit-and-run. Le Lyonnais was sailing from the U.S. to France when it collided with the U.S. sailing ship Adriatic. The Adriatic suffered only minor damage and sailed on, heading for port in Gloucester, Massachusetts, for repairs. The crew of the Adriatic reportedly thought Le Lyonnais was fine to carry on as well, but the French ship was not so fortunate: The hull was punctured, and despite the crew’s efforts to patch the breach, the situation grew worse. Three days later, Le Lyonnais succumbed to the damage and sank. Of the steamship’s 132 passengers, only 18 survived. Though the fate of Le Lyonnais was known, the exact location of its wreckage remained a mystery until recently. In August 2024, a shipwreck hunting and salvaging team the vessel about 200 miles from New Bedford, Massachusetts. They knew they’d found the right ship thanks to a including the horizontal steam engine and iron hull plates. Most crucially, the engine’s cylinder measured 57 inches — a perfect match with the ship’s records. According to Jennifer Sellitti, a member of the crew that found the ship and the author of The Adriatic Affair: A Maritime Hit-and-Run off the Coast of Nantucket , Adriatic Captain John Durham later had his ship apprehended by French authorities and was put on trial. subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1Oo9E79FSvdeQmgI4hSn1g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZPakP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTExVwNzcGNCCmd_dV6CZ-lTR59SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1Oo9E79FSvdeQmgI4hSn1g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZPakP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTExVwNzcGNCCmd_dV6CZ-lTR59SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1Oo9E79FSvdeQmgI4hSn1g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpZPakP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTExVwNzcGNCCmd_dV6CZ-lTR59SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: Whistleblowing Doctor Links Common Health Issues to Widespread “Grocery Scam”
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G3hGNx39h4cXlorSiKptS0bIzdgymMQlJSESfvoJStjPfzPl0bGqqGC6G6BlB3EffEUTC_xHE0-eY2vMhvTxNxiZfTk5qmeR1i__v6IAP-Ojs4Wv2trYfq03XvO5czb9hYA-8vzTlA76HZmWysbpO9Zx6w4MHQUvDNFdymguh6N5YgZ4Jnge1ZdYpJQWCC9KXOjjJtaXRIKAExhhD1AgZCq6ClKB08LCdAhFwy8lsKtvoLOv60bZtXafM1YlWZt_3TXcTKwgWY1tnx7OrynP3e-bqRLC4KxMsBoLFuxfTxWX-vFoTXtxK4_N8gTqC3eS0Nb4ZY1XFTmkiYPf3hg4GfwIAAP__kPJuKA)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | One of America's top doctors is hoping you'll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an invisible problem affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it's happening except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry's research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that's not even the worst part.

Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food, says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what's happening and what you can do about it in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zk1zsjAQwPFPE24ym80bHHJ4fBw8tHpoO1PbWwhBoqQgoBn76Ts4Dtfd3-x_TehbX981UWuC2PhqJIiE_SOIl68YhuspvGxXsc_2q4vcBzFv8f-T3nDBP9aczuv3T3P4-B773dF27BdudOHTvXcLfkZTF4xv56naJJVmdQU8cZoqJkWecS6TRotSyNxmlPESnbMWrKxdLSgIljEjROI1AgqglFJEhZAiZ7IWAqSqKyhzIBwendQEN3hr6DhFMwxdF1LbhaTVzTT14-OxgmARY0zLJlStObv7LAgWxf7A3yjBgu3k9pXms2TFeC0pYRuRg0oGXfXRt60fpSIcjo_gfP6m8S8AAP__gdlnsg)**

**Once you've seen this, Dr. Gundry says, you'll never buy groceries the same way again.**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It's a technique he's been using himself and at age 74, he says it's the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they've been using Dr. Gundry's simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

Every American should have this information, he says. And if this video opens your eyes to what's happening out there, I hope you'll share it with your loved ones.

[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zk1zsjAQwPFPE24ym80bHHJ4fBw8tHpoO1PbWwhBoqQgoBn76Ts4Dtfd3-x_TehbX981UWuC2PhqJIiE_SOIl68YhuspvGxXsc_2q4vcBzFv8f-T3nDBP9aczuv3T3P4-B773dF27BdudOHTvXcLfkZTF4xv56naJJVmdQU8cZoqJkWecS6TRotSyNxmlPESnbMWrKxdLSgIljEjROI1AgqglFJEhZAiZ7IWAqSqKyhzIBwendQEN3hr6DhFMwxdF1LbhaTVzTT14-OxgmARY0zLJlStObv7LAgWxf7A3yjBgu3k9pXms2TFeC0pYRuRg0oGXfXRt60fpSIcjo_gfP6m8S8AAP__gdlnsg)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0zbtOwzAUxvGncbZGx-f4kgweKEgMiC4gcdkcO25dYpI6JVF5epSqysb6_X_SZ9PQxXAxTG8Z4iH6kSEyumOIp4855Z9jenrczEO125zULsml4v2NTrjib2ePX9uXN_v--jkOz3vX0y9MfOXny9Cu-HZatsnGbln1Q-ENBQ-iaA3XpGRdCaGKgyHlq-A0YYWqcXUjvW2sJi4cNRRaXkSDgBI45xxRI5QoSAUpQengoamBCbj-lDa1OTrLx_Nsc-77VLo-FZ3xwxy7Lo5KMwH7K11C_i9MBv8CAAD__9ZzXHY)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
| [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMuK4zAQRb9G2sVIJTmyF1p4EgzDEAgDyTDZySqpLSI_2q_gfH2TdDrby6m6h2uaPga_aqJ-EYA64EgAiCgIwDyJszmdDsO6we64uQlwj5jA7kUu8GZba-SlmNvP3XFkuIRU_bsv_E1Pa-_e7KsycY0J8ZGqPUUtwXBvqdNciW2aZ1JKWuvUg-CpcXlluUWWc8yEqjLMbObs1noaNDBIGeecAyiQiUGJPk9RWG-UYoZI9ixK_ODcVIf26gY0Ia6J7RoadT1N_fgUKwmUHVZJO9vo5vH7ynYNgfKlTKBcCJT_79XZHto_RUVE-ZxM7C9F-7u5_lV00NjfQoxh3Coi2cfPF7po-AoAAP__k3lu9A)
| | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuO4yAQRb8G72xBASZeeJFux1EvWooy0xlNNhaBoo3i1_gVZb6-ZcvKBomjIy51S9dd5d0zJeqNAJTeDgSA8D0BmEZ-0V9fn_0ztO0pfHDABRN438wZXm5jtLjup-bf-2mgdvZS_fk_s5c9Pjt8uVtkhLX21UJVFthUgGbOBJgyxWOZ7IQQQZlyhVLeBDXMOBQ3o5lMnI7RMumU4UngU6AgKWOMASgQkbbCukRabpxWimoi6BoUuR5xLH1zx95qXz0j09ZBlZbj2A3rx3IC-YBm6jHSDdp2XAwC-a3XM4a3tr0PBHKe7OhOogljJzAUSskwQW3DnUWrKGOaOVze4vk01sXQTr1BwrO37BieDxcC8YJrtH6qCc8OnxsZsV_ubrRsI0bXnfbfDeHZNiItPo7HvyCL8-FS_Pq9P4fLQSAumspbwrOTTkrIDsMVV7huk2fXffNR388q6FPbPXxV-SFWRNDvtZalhTmFnwAAAP__maOdNw)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vozAQhn-NuRHZY4PDgUNaQtRDpSrbptpekOMZN1b4WjB0s79-RYRyseRHjzx-3zFNX3t3y5l-YgAXjyMDYHLHAKYgT-bj43W4xdi9xT8SaMEMnldzhofbWqO-dlP75_lt5Dj7RH_-m8XDDreeHu46ckON8fVCdRFhrsAIZyPKhZZpkm2VUtElz0TilBJCATkjRaYArcTMGsEtApwjnwOHhAshBIAGtTGo0GUJSuuM1twwxe-DNm4gChffXmlA4-vbxnZNVOeXEPrx_rGSQTmSnQbamJawC4vBoDwPZqb43HXXkUEpsy3fJmTj1CmKldZJnJHBeIuEmgthhKPlLVlOoanGbhosMVk8FYf4uD8xSBfcEPqpYbLYv64k0LDcXUCxEmua3vjvlslijcirl8PhNyTVcX-qfr3vjvFyMEirtvbIZPEOSqrw-XdJk1btfZuy-Nq1L831qKMhx_7H17UfU80U_77XsrQw5_A_AAD__59anCs) Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kctu2zAQRb-G2skgh5QoLbRwItvNIkHg1m6ajTAmhzFhvapX4H59IUHwhgAPDng5d7BqS-_uGdNPDODqbc8AmNwygHGQZzydXrt7aJv38FsCzZjB82pO8HBrg-pzO9Z_n997bicf6d__JvGwh3tLD3eN3FCFvpypzgObKUDhTECZ0DKO0kQpFVwzh2QwMhzjVFjuBIokjdwFY2lQJDoJfAYcIi6EEAAa1Aatsi6NrDQOtebIFF-CNq4jGq6-vlFn0Zf3jWmqoMyuw9D2y8f2DPY9mbGjDdZkm2E2GOwvHU4UXprm1jPYyzThSUQmjJ2iUGkdhSmhDRNLVnMhUDia35L7caiKvhk7Q0zmT_khPO7ODOIZV2T9WDGZ715XMlA3391gxUoMVi36r5rJfB2RFy-Hwx-IiuPuXPz8tT2G88EgLurSWybzt_F0rD7e2o8fC1y2KfPPbf1S3Y466DLbfvuy9H2smeJfSy1zC1MG_wMAAP__qgadfQ) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_. This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vozAQhn-NuRHZY4PhwCENIeqhUpXdpmovyGHGxQpfy1eb_voVCOViyY8e-fW8Y-qucvaeMP3EAEqHAwNgcs8AplFezNvbS3_3sX31vyXQghkcNnOGh9sURn3up-bf4XXgOLtAv__O4mGP944e7ha5o9q4aqE69TBRYIQtPEqElmEQR0opr0xsoFHqECGOSSup4WpFEQURRdfYSI6eS4BDwIUQAkCD2hlUaOMAZWGN1twwxdegne2JxtI1N-rRuOq-K9raq5JyHLth_VjGIBuomHramYawHReDQXbtzUz-tW1vA4NMxhGPAir80CryldaBH5NBP0JCzYUwwtLylsymsc6HduoLYjJ9Sk_--XhhEC64JnRTzWR6fNnISP1ytyOKjRSm7oz7aphMtxF5_nw6fUCQn4-X_M_f_dlfDgZh3lQOmUw_-p_y_Uf_0mGF6zZl-rlvnuvbWXt9gt23qyo3hJop_rXWsrQwJ_A_AAD__9hunSQ)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vozAQhn-NuRHhscFw4JCWEFWrVlW2yWp7QRN7KFb4WjBU2V9fgVAulvzokV_PO9j0tS3vKVNPDKCyZmQATOwZwOTEBc_n1-Hum-7d_xZAC2bwvJkzPNxWo_zcT-2_5_cxMLMN1Z__M3_Y7t7Tw90id9SgrReqMs-kEpCX2qOUKxGFSSyl9KqUowqvCRdGJ7HiQoYxlkhKCUpMjBo9m0IAYcA55wAK5A6NNGUSGqFLVCpAJoM1aFcORK6y7Y0Gg7a-73TXeHVaOdeP68dyBvlIehpohy2Zzi0Gg_w64Ez-tetuI4NcJHEQh6T9qJTkS6VCPyE0fmzIqIBz5CUtb4l8ck0xdtOgiYnsKTv6p8OFQbTghoydGiayw-tGHA3LvXSGb0Rj06P9apnIthGD4uV4_AthcTpcit8f-5O_HAyioq2tYSL7-DXKt9u5cm8rXLcpss99-9LcTsobUtN_27q2Y6SYDL7WWpYW5hR-AgAA__8vV50i)** There's no time to waste. clean_body: | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books. If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD. This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

subject: Trump’s *Little* Hands Are All Over This Race
body:
Tiny Hands Trump picked my opponent because he will be his loyal lackey.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdDqvI8FUNlCQZGReWzeqE6gkfxM9Y0BAxvVKv8RZLWSOyNL6gPZQq6BUFjq74ewL5V4_eiTGGKYvKKdpGcVnbcoq6lxAhF4jqawIb9Gi5uev5cL_2AapVYrq5V7qFh3rlo-dNc71DkZ3--wnsTqf0s1qjvVQWaOaYFW7cp73HPJ1iZEpr0E4XHy56J9r3ifmpyVhVMzAFVgle_WxRoAHRkcpXweTY5O&c=Sd5CP4ZPvNAvTd1EjL8GIQk1rF6tEcAoXZSvhj_myh64rX-FnOr07Q==&ch=rU9M0o5yuZvGCiVm5T2QQDglNqaITsUNw_NLU5Aq97DY7owVFPobZg==)

| | | | Team,
The stakes in this race couldn't be clearer.
I'm running against Randy Fine, Trump's handpicked candidate for Florida's 6th Congressional District. Fine isn't just another Republican--he's a MAGA extremist who has built his career on banning books, attacking public education, and pushing Trump's dangerous Project 2025 agenda.
This race is our chance to stop him and deliver a DEVASTATING BLOW to the MAGA agenda.
Tiny Hands Trump carefully selected Randy Fine as his preferred candidate, because he knows that he'll do his bidding in Congress without question. Frankly, we need to do everything we can to keep Trump's influence OUT of our district!
I've spent my career fighting for kids and families. Now I'm fighting to ensure that people like Randy Fine can't take their extremism to Washington.
---
| | | | [But I can't do it without you. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us win this race and stop Trump's handpicked candidate?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdDqvI8FUNlCQZGReWzeqE6gkfxM9Y0BAxvVKv8RZLWSOyNL6gPZQq6BUFjq74ewTFduW6m16rTfgnsFqnxzB7DxpvxiPp5hU_5A3JUSao2OfC1X2C4jNmx9JzADbbvJdaYtfPMoUVdNnGOWKYgWc5TpzjnM46yDtPbvpvRhl6aP4BkkQUV-z0XwI43MKTqmHOhTA_uvHj6pACR0WMgT0V4sNvK1yCy6ObiWJeGEIns=&c=Sd5CP4ZPvNAvTd1EjL8GIQk1rF6tEcAoXZSvhj_myh64rX-FnOr07Q==&ch=rU9M0o5yuZvGCiVm5T2QQDglNqaITsUNw_NLU5Aq97DY7owVFPobZg==)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi is on the cusp of great change – if we can overcome inertia
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greatchanges?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Another week, another massive investment project was unveiled in Mississippi.** On Thursday, Governor Tate Reeves announced that a $10 Billion data center is coming to Meridian.

**One deal alone isn’t proof that the economy is taking off, but it does add to a pile of evidence suggesting that Mississippi could be on the cusp of a new era of growth.** If Mississippi keeps going the way data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis suggests we are moving, this state won’t be 50th out of 50 for much longer.

**Is it too far-fetched to imagine young people wanting to move to Oxford, Starkville, Laurel, or the Coast, the way they currently want to go to Austin or Nashville?**

Encouraging, too, is Mississippi’s political leadership at the start of the new legislative session.

**Income tax abolition, essential if we are to be competitive, is now the number one priority for the Governor and the Speaker, Jason White.**
---
| [ ](http://)
---
_This is what conservative leadership looks like...._
| School choice, the only sure fire way to improve education standards and prepare young people for the world of work, is on Speaker White’s priority list for this legislative session.

Removing red tape, particularly as it restricts the healthcare economy, is also being actively considered, with the State Board of Health firmly committed to change.

These changes are essential if our state is to seize this once-in-a-generation opportunity. **But even now the forces of inertia are trying to stop change. If they succeed, Mississippi will stall. **

**(Almost) everyone now says they support income tax elimination. Yet some are quite clearly only paying lip service to the idea, desperately seeking to avoid passing legislation this session that commits to actual elimination.** At the same time, they talk up the idea of cutting the grocery tax as a deliberate distraction strategy, knowing full well that cutting the income tax would have vastly more impact.

**While Mississippi considers school choice, we are surrounded by states that are actually doing it.** Tennessee is in the process of passing the legislation this week.
---
|
---
_GOP Governors lead on school choice....._
| Yet the forces of inertia in Mississippi say we need more time to consider Education Savings Accounts. Really? Can you not look across the state line at Arkansas or Alabama to see how it is transforming education for the better? Perhaps your call for “more time” just an excuse?

**Maybe, like the disgraceful School Superintendent in Madison County did this week, the forces of inertia circulate false claims about school choice?** (No, public to public school choice does not take away local tax dollars, since it only involves the state portion of the budget. No, private schools do not lack accountability. They are more accountable than any public school.)

The sort of misleading claims made by the Madison School Superintendent are attempts to prevent change by those that think they, not pesky parents, know best for your child.

The forces of inertia are also lobbying aggressively in the legislature to kill off reforms that will remove health care regulation that intentionally limits the number of providers.

**The truth is that for years all of those against lower taxes, less regulation and opposed to school choice in our state have been able to get their way.** That is why Mississippi has not grown the way Alabama or Texas have.

I’m optimistic that this time the forces of inertia can be overcome. Why?

**Firstly, it is increasingly obvious that Mississippi could be doing things differently. **You only need to look across the river at Arkansas under Sarah Huckabee Sanders (tax cuts, school choice, red tape removal), or Alabama (ditto), or at almost any southern state to see it.

**Secondly, Trump.** The 47th President is committed to tax cuts, red tape reduction and school choice. This will help tilt opinion in our state.

Imagine for a moment that you are a local Republican party office holder keen to catch the eye of the new White House administration. Perhaps you want an appointment or some kind of endorsement?

Do you really imagine Donald J. Trump would pick you out in such a crowded field if you have been anti-tax cuts? **Do you honestly think Team Trump would say, “Yes, Mr. President, this local guy in Mississippi who killed off School Choice is our guy”? **

If nothing else, self-interest will move the dial towards the right agenda in Mississippi over the next four years.

**Finally, I think inertia can be overcome because of Elon Musk. **

Something weird has happened since Elon bought X / Twitter. Politics is now increasingly unfiltered. Even if you are one of a majority of folk that don’t use X, you will have felt the effect of this form of unfiltered politics.

**The forces of inertia can be petulant. They can lobby and bully to try to stop change. But they cannot any longer escape the consequences of trying to stop change.**

Cheer up! 2025 is going to be awesome. Mississippi is on the cusp a great change.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b0892766b1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---

body:
This is what happens when the Radical Left is in charge
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b6c7a13c955453b8c89c68b10e626ea&_e=Au3aW_ajYk9czFlzQG_Gq3YElOao1Zql6JBJ7My21h9Z-QqqioYdoLli7EfvToKfHnlH6UcoTWjcJKJeduz30WcQ405xGdFo2wfU4ksC_dqhOAHI1cE1uM-F0F686XnAbTqbkn1zG6MEoiiDkwIMm5MEqmNlwmzSaCXFsvbipsGL9hgk-ifYxzElw9Q15N5cT33t_iH5iV4X0YvLqX1la1ILX57Q4enfVxQOIBJUc2anqYzhBEEvRQNFZ6nCQxCZ6MCGMS_0wl0bDcjfyu5EGkt_x1ilxYxwCZ65Qq2DvV3D9cI4M6So0rJu_RtsEKd0fYmrOygtnpoKCSvi_r8waw%3D%3D)
---

Hey Peter,

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b6c7a13c955453b8c89c68b10e626ea&_e=Au3aW_ajYk9czFlzQG_Gq3YElOao1Zql6JBJ7My21h9Z-QqqioYdoLli7EfvToKfHnlH6UcoTWjcJKJeduz30WcQ405xGdFo2wfU4ksC_dqhOAHI1cE1uM-F0F686XnA7yPHAHT3X0elNEaYD5n8ErlC2TYIRE_8VNqc9VU1JY3eAUAHmPd38xBze36RS3bfYvqDqzNg4olyx7RP3JjqZ6K-gTwrFmWXSHI6CrQ1uU3XmK6WBuwydhcfIvR-4ZEitgqjzOtq1eVLguF-V7wQD9alhOB6PehrKN_H6br3NDldnBHC8bXsmxWk-6FPdkNVoCAn3XJAFf_AQ6fYQh3zrA%3D%3D)
The people of California have had enough. Under Governor Gavin Newsom, the state has suffered as he prioritized policies that put illegal immigrants ahead of hardworking Californians and pushed his anti-Trump agenda over policies that put America first.

**Newsom is a FRAUD and a COWARD!** [**Stand with me to DEMAND HIS IMMEDIATE RESIGNATION!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6b6c7a13c955453b8c89c68b10e626ea&_e=Au3aW_ajYk9czFlzQG_Gq3YElOao1Zql6JBJ7My21h9Z-QqqioYdoLli7EfvToKfHnlH6UcoTWjcJKJeduz30WcQ405xGdFo2wfU4ksC_dqhOAHI1cE1uM-F0F686XnAbTqbkn1zG6MEoiiDkwIMm5MEqmNlwmzSaCXFsvbipsGL9hgk-ifYxzElw9Q15N5ckbxHMKMrfEMjVQjCY3YrdT_usVwbTS_W-R3mrwsjws6ra5KX3QviGki8ao5domrmiBa81np5cOpUtHxo3ZDa6bFXB-Ds4xUJw9Zzgv9i4CxpP7pfUP8qL5K3SdrGEJmGO0lN1-gbH9sN98EYfHX-bg%3D%3D)

But the most glaring example of his failures is how he handled the devastating wildfires that are ravaging California. Instead of taking preventative measures and addressing the root causes of these fires, Newsom has spent his time blaming climate change and attacking Trump, failing to protect lives and property. While Californians are left to cope with the destruction, Newsom's focus remains on his political ambitions--leaving the communities vulnerable.

Newsom has:

* **Failed to protect Californians,** focusing on sanctuary policies that undermine our security and safety.
* **Given preference to illegal immigrants** at the expense of the people who live and work here legally, draining resources from schools, healthcare, and our communities.
* **Pushed divisive, radical policies,** prioritizing his own anti-Trump agenda instead of the welfare of Californians.

_**It 's time for a change.** We need leadership that puts America first, and Newsom has NEVER been the right person for the job._

We're calling for Governor Gavin Newsom to resign. He has FAILED Californians.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7046ace2a7124e52b4bbec4da4f0a3f3&_e=y1nPU66OW5DIO9nHTDclTUeDOc_Pu7l2X4L2pGzpEa2pzI5MGhC_RXZOwSiG2z8FXP3tTaAkdkze7e1bFdAQpqezxkJ1ofCDcN_VjrbBRi2qUj0_4OT5Y4a92EYrTu2C0uedugwm-wViyckUeLy0RoqE5FPvCXyF4IfEp_DLjxVQryzGYpwaszwljQB1-IqMcJ2IxOwOvQ2zwACOrRcEi9nN0jNHOmMjRLIK_AxTDyMX8rt5y4hsdZRGb5qosXj2wBkEk5fJlcQSuXujeiTTU6XtMXvfZST0UrzljeqjFedOCMm15pDYbsdzIx1hBUqXXPjW_rL5jRwFX7_ln_e_7EQULh3XsCiuM1yAx7ggbjLjqeWOk74kpf8TSGdEuUdz)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now.__
---
[**Before my trial begins, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to take away my home – and ultimately, JAIL me for life as an innocent man.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7046ace2a7124e52b4bbec4da4f0a3f3&_e=y1nPU66OW5DIO9nHTDclTUeDOc_Pu7l2X4L2pGzpEa2pzI5MGhC_RXZOwSiG2z8FXP3tTaAkdkze7e1bFdAQpqezxkJ1ofCDcN_VjrbBRi2qUj0_4OT5Y4a92EYrTu2C0uedugwm-wViyckUeLy0RoqE5FPvCXyF4IfEp_DLjxVQryzGYpwaszwljQB1-IqMcJ2IxOwOvQ2zwACOrRcEiy6tlLABtUvmlrwKqXHoesfCeHQUJe4ZyEkAmMpJlgK1_iUer2wniEJlwdBp8tR8Qaa28sPty9A6aHKQTcOhUssQK1Cf057kLCZoqU7Vi0Ejndyw2DBOtelIEheC2d1gqC5BrEHUv-iEDKbBpylVyTiQk4mL4tuGCwyEyo4NBklL)

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. - Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.

| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8412dd0d64d541a092341c6546aab546&_e=nijPzD7KN8eHKtJucOl0vwi4jzLZ-txDRtnNA86slxMVZ6WHdSet3R3c76wa670FCGS87x-4rIMDEtuIhnoakt6xbq8GY2As4TXP3GmN6dQK47rWgTBoCKgSuXct1HRHWTAlthwR_OvNVM5O3h1pCWKohFsI0xRKktayDn30w995HpmlcGAbIdvlcQsyquqQpYrUqWSgTak9YJuhh09LD7GTUvnGNiQtIPAFGMpVpsGSMQmHm8DPAUgU6dggdrMaP9JL90ikJFxkzURvpSTEKQ4cu-MT09hOlUMkFvBls3amNPEuafpJJepoQdqzgtreAaL59ijL9LhMsL9Si0OdKePWPZWJpQJsGTukB7lhGDRNY_5__N5F0ey4ffbBRUqRieqHDNFyApnb9bDXyHokIWkQgUhU9D0mWatkqhAutmoEJhud613J6vlQDeOvgOdW)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8412dd0d64d541a092341c6546aab546&_e=nijPzD7KN8eHKtJucOl0vwi4jzLZ-txDRtnNA86slxMVZ6WHdSet3R3c76wa670FCGS87x-4rIMDEtuIhnoakt6xbq8GY2As4TXP3GmN6dQK47rWgTBoCKgSuXct1HRHWTAlthwR_OvNVM5O3h1pCWKohFsI0xRKktayDn30w995HpmlcGAbIdvlcQsyquqQpYrUqWSgTak9YJuhh09LD7GTUvnGNiQtIPAFGMpVpsGSMQmHm8DPAUgU6dggdrMaP9JL90ikJFxkzURvpSTEKQ4cu-MT09hOlUMkFvBls3ZdEKSyaBb6ErVFqGlAj_U9Z9GckiqM_6q4mmx6C7RM0Bu09e1JVyCkvKyxOd3OrYO739fFAvmYA_HQvRcjRE6Xnn47Nmu6bsmgnnwCwKcYW_h_8g-o6kk5q6Ix42iYBAgNlgaAreDyd-eE1KfYxPkD) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: The Fight to Protect Christian Attorneys
body:
Since most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE4W5z2hWbDypkIuTrCXQAbuM6KKdElKP1W52BEOyrmgzX7b1vqhGXibbzw1yZaEMCarxjz03KB2rFw178cCT3ry81vWioKVYcqoRMOV1nTHRnqX_qxy6zmgWitzIUCG4bh1MUJbsSxLk_t2Xjl3pjZ-)
---
Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Peter, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE64PN0X12wZ4RZ4bOBWC4SdT9jyqdL_wtHOFo2nWD_PBOXB5mvsemQ3GPRUEoCU8xwUcYZ6A5bsFFOXDebyIr3zAhyiGxTUp9P0iD_Us9SuPsBl7jvDUgxVSCuDyS2xJAxXtNvjaFrShNdMtWBUcQoW)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE62F_z3oX0Gq-4MDxEzfyLYiLTB8DrhfqcFWUc_jeMiin_2GZYPKFB2TigJz8HroTTBBGfJGLjNzxW2nQ_Mi6TDrkb84OjEqbwtcMXRxo0bmI6dsQOPKYdrkJuSMSPf2DtkYJvswstL59ZH8aPUsubD)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Peter, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE7_xDx2oSvelA8eEsgTSZNrTNq0iDDqblbqPjc3eljBjiEBh7FaEJAOUZFanM79m_XmGVAo_t-9HMxAjWobcJI-Z9MMEU6VeQr7hCGpMyXkpEjwN9pj3Cbi-B-L3VlIvbwlqTGXibZ1H2DG4L_eXGow)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE7WiVuh0b4RMfsxt_tPWLQasdF9v4gdwPikM2d-iWeOGr6Ad6hpw2iBR8CXCDE1NK1dBeOJArLmIZWaI3ILUScX6TOZY-EmSvzc5bVFMuf8VPnDEJXtbpvOnEnPeVOWXzYkblmO_pKvJzN3uMP2h9CO)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c72f29a0987403ebf5ab70bbcaeaedf&_e=xjA5b4efw2a1lnF4iF25tJKBsBYJt5rw4TgLZSmB8_uXFQl2d3bwTDoYGVKF_pJY8KLWdAlCYYYELvKjiEbVW4DK1LcF8QXy07jK_GSuLssAel51waQv2Dexdv-j6iXEU1nZQS0GMVSbi3FhZmfa7sz-z-_fM2c1rPg0SojgBE4FjpiLdZ7TvN-URg8w_d2Lti9cJcjnLMjP9zhGmUIoTdCs07FPhUy__SRvuafWz_TGKPbMTEldHrn1C3lk3s0BwtV055Qn51MPEPNOWvcZCwLpNtQZThOf06kYMs5rSFX-S1da92DDyQKoU7GvxR2A)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society

clean_body: Since most Christians don’t realize this...| | | - Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states. That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of personal prayer without getting fired, protection of moral conscience so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a Christian student club --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! Peter, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state. For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change. Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to: discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke"); stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious; prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values! Peter, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work. Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society. Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society Christian Legal Society P.O. Box 7712 McLean, VA 22106-7712

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Look — I’m personally committed to bringing our winning strategy to candidates who need to hear it. I’ll do whatever I can
#

Peter —
[**If you can afford it, I am humbly asking you to become a sustaining donor to my campaign by committing to a monthly donation of $5.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3169?c0=ruben-em-jan25%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.rFuAUn&c1=em250111-1-120.3a53Ss&t=1&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV)
If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link:
[MAKE A RECURRING DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3169?c0=ruben-em-jan25%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.rFuAUn&c1=em250111-1-120.3a53Ss&t=2&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV)
If you need to hear more, please — let me explain.
When my team and I sit down at our monthly finance meetings, one of the first things we do is project our baseline. What we know that we can expect to raise, month-to-month. The biggest part of that baseline right now is the incredible supporters who have made the decision to sustain my campaign with a monthly donation.
It makes a huge difference for us. As I get to work pushing my colleagues to step up and fight for working families and the middle class this session, it gives me a lot of peace of mind to know that I have a strong team behind me.
There’s some bad news, though. That pool of sustaining donors is shrinking.
Look — I’m personally committed to bringing our winning strategy to candidates who need to hear it. I’ll do whatever I can to help champions for working families and the middle class win their races, and to build the infrastructure we need to win races back home in Arizona.
But none of that comes easy, or free. And the surest way I can maintain this campaign and our operations is by sustaining that pool of recurring donations.
That’s why I’m writing to you, and it’s why I’m humbly asking:
[**Can you please commit to a $5 monthly donation for the rest of the year so that my campaign can keep up the important work we’re doing? It’d mean so much to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3169?c0=ruben-em-jan25%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.rFuAUn&c1=em250111-1-120.3a53Ss&t=3&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV)
[MAKE A RECURRING DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/3169?c0=ruben-em-jan25%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.rFuAUn&c1=em250111-1-120.3a53Ss&t=4&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV)
Thanks so much for hearing me out.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=5&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=3644_734936_1CSMIV&akid=3644%2E734936%2E1CSMIV)
clean_body: Look — I’m personally committed to bringing our winning strategy to candidates who need to hear it. I’ll do whatever I can Peter — If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link: If you need to hear more, please — let me explain. When my team and I sit down at our monthly finance meetings, one of the first things we do is project our baseline. What we know that we can expect to raise, month-to-month. The biggest part of that baseline right now is the incredible supporters who have made the decision to sustain my campaign with a monthly donation. It makes a huge difference for us. As I get to work pushing my colleagues to step up and fight for working families and the middle class this session, it gives me a lot of peace of mind to know that I have a strong team behind me. There’s some bad news, though. That pool of sustaining donors is shrinking. Look — I’m personally committed to bringing our winning strategy to candidates who need to hear it. I’ll do whatever I can to help champions for working families and the middle class win their races, and to build the infrastructure we need to win races back home in Arizona. But none of that comes easy, or free. And the surest way I can maintain this campaign and our operations is by sustaining that pool of recurring donations. That’s why I’m writing to you, and it’s why I’m humbly asking: Thanks so much for hearing me out. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

## US, Europe Face Challenges Amid Changing Political Landscapes
Consider these European and American binaries. On Dec. 20, a terrorist, Taleb Al-Abdul Mohsen, rammed his SUV into a Christmas crowd in Magdeburg, Germany. He killed six pedestrians and injured 299 others. Eleven days later, on New Year’s Eve in New Orleans, Louisiana, Shamsud-Din Bahar Jabbar smashed his pickup into a festive crowd. He killed [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6513a07524bd407aa4f7e9d79680698c&_e=7CaL_LyZXHhEo268lty-9c1-jb5w1JgWWbegqAM8E6H9kanNA_MtzaTU6MPvtdrGKp5tjHENzdUa4kRAVSGjRlOAlReYtCvigxifFf9M26D6zKrXqoQAx198DevtaBOL1P6Z2VyqSg9waBNQdf4Rqa34xH8Jy5w9Zj18XW6kchsubgakT2TiRc3AWIsILK1YIDHElI2FELTqklz6lbzfmnHNiwEcPPIdwTZ9aFQwSPD8v5-9psIeO71wmoDkhJGGeiyYGTJrpDG43Aw3tmk6_UfwOBpVPXvIcS5nK91XJSo%3D)

He openly challenged Canada’s leadership, and the prime minister’s resignation followed shortly after. When three 1-million-gallon capacity water storage tanks in Pacific Palisades went dry Tuesday night, firefighters were forced to abandon efforts to save thousands of homes. LA Department of Water and Power (LADWP) CEO Janisse Quiñones has repeatedly claimed during press conferences that her utility did everything it could to prepare for the forecasted wind [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6513a07524bd407aa4f7e9d79680698c&_e=7CaL_LyZXHhEo268lty-9c1-jb5w1JgWWbegqAM8E6Fcx6g7EJ4hAvcQHjhNNGUUMs_qlPLJKP-YUYpUf05oMDiEPVRb3KWF1TRGWJtg35Xi0N0HvuTphJjrDjx0V2aKqjCwc-07LROXuiUJOskzHguitc7tT2JL4yr2hIxCwqg12TOWJMXJDRPXKIGvqf9PjoVcHrarDw2ABfrmxBBOOBkJfuXi-SEhKqMBuy5hngTb4Hi60ZZZ-n0wY7vceCuJwuwyKjvZUxM8ilZdA7l23R1uouzxZRxnapJFymZzs8os-7G6ZCPu3t2byz4bh2mhDyVc6zXsA0XyTEjYi0oTOw%3D%3D)

## A Progressive Hellscape
“February was the wettest month in downtown Los Angeles since 1998. With over 12 inches of rain drenching the city, it was the fourth-wettest February–and the seventh-wettest month overall –in the city’s nearly 150-year recorded history,” said Judson Jones’ report on Los Angeles’ weather on March 2, 2024, in The New York Times. name: emergency-response@uso.org
subject: URGENT UPDATE: Additional troops activated for CA wildfire response
body:
Please read this service member update
Please read this quick but important update: As deadly and destructive wildfires continue to ravage the Los Angeles area, additional National Guard members and the U.S. Navy are deploying to assist firefighters and protect civilians.
The Department of Defense is working closely with the state of California on a coordinated response to this emergency, and more service members have been deployed to the area. As of yesterday evening, the USO has begun activating across the greater Los Angeles area. We are providing food and supplies for service members and standing ready to meet any additional needs.
**[To help ensure we can continue providing critical support for service members responding to emergencies like this and serving around the globe, we have increased our goal to $100,000. And at this urgent moment, the USO is calling on supporters like you to donate $29 or more as we support the military heroes who are risking their lives in California.* Will you please rush an emergency donation now?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/8PN4hEG~azTk/T1lGN29IOXM1bjBpUGJUbjBQKzFOZUlGYlJlcVF5ZGNlQ0NOcjNzZEpWVWFwY09SZjRzZTVRZnFINUpsUTlEYUZ3dUN5aU5UNFVEY0VzcFR2Vi9JVEtDNHRhN3dENkNjb01uU1Q2MGszK1k9S0/UlViOWhpVTJHTHpKeW91WHE1cGpOYTJYTTBYRTB2RktjYmR0STJvVWtJY2V6YlFEbHZWd2taaHltcUhXQVpWZ1JwYjdLc2ZteGVmQVJ4dWh6dGN0TnhMVEw3YlFXU29iS0)
---
Thank you for stepping up for our heroes, especially in moments of crisis like this and during the devasting hurricanes that happened only a few short months ago. We will be there supporting those who serve throughout whatever may arise in 2025 and beyond.
--The USO
* * *
**From: **Emergency Response via USO
**Sent: **Wednesday, January 8, 2025
**Subject:** BREAKING: CA Wildfire Alert -- National Guard activated
[](https://www.uso.org)
[RUSH A DONATION](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/9PKLhwL0_aT-/T1lGN29IOXM1bjBpUGJUbjBQKzFOZUlGYlJlcVF5ZGNlQ0NOcjNzZEpWVWFwY09SZjRzZTVRZnFINUpsUTlEYUZ3dUN5aU5UNFVEY0VzcFR2Vi9JVEtDNHRhN3dENkNjb01uU1Q2MGszK1k9S0/UlViOWhpVTJHTHpKeW91WHE1cGpOYTJYTTBYRTB2RktjYmR0STJvVWtJY2V6YlFEbHZWd2taaHltcUhXQVpWZ1JwYjdLc2ZteGVmQVJ4dWh6dGN0TnhMVEw3YlFXU29iS0)
---
**" Fire chief describes 'apocalyptic'
scene in Pacific Palisades"
--CNN, Jan. 8, 2025 ** _National Guard members are actively assisting affected communities, and**[we're counting on YOUR emergency donation as we prepare to support our heroic service members.*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHgG9q_Mq/T1lGN29IOXM1bjBpUGJUbjBQKzFOZUlGYlJlcVF5ZGNlQ0NOcjNzZEpWVWFwY09SZjRzZTVRZnFINUpsUTlEYUZ3dUN5aU5UNFVEY0VzcFR2Vi9JVEtDNHRhN3dENkNjb01uU1Q2MGszK1k9S0/UlViOWhpVTJHTHpKeW91WHE1cGpOYTJYTTBYRTB2RktjYmR0STJvVWtJY2V6YlFEbHZWd2taaHltcUhXQVpWZ1JwYjdLc2ZteGVmQVJ4dWh6dGN0TnhMVEw3YlFXU29iS0)**_
---
The news out of California is devastating. Four life-threatening fires are wreaking havoc across Los Angeles County. Tens of thousands of people have been forced to evacuate their homes; many have lost everything they own.
The California National Guard has been activated and are joining firefighters to fight the blaze. With little notice, they jumped into action, left their own families behind and deployed to the front lines to protect civilians.
**While the news around this disaster is rapidly shifting, we know this: The USO will be there for our service members throughout emergencies like this and whatever else arises in 2025 -- but to do that, we rely on generous donations from people like you. **
**[Please, will you rush an emergency donation of $29 to help reach our $20,000 rapid-response goal by midnight and support our heroes in uniform around the world at this critical moment and into the future?](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[RUSH AN EMERGENCY DONATION NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CywGW7TV/T1lGN29IOXM1bjBpUGJUbjBQKzFOZUlGYlJlcVF5ZGNlQ0NOcjNzZEpWVWFwY09SZjRzZTVRZnFINUpsUTlEYUZ3dUN5aU5UNFVEY0VzcFR2Vi9JVEtDNHRhN3dENkNjb01uU1Q2MGszK1k9S0/UlViOWhpVTJHTHpKeW91WHE1cGpOYTJYTTBYRTB2RktjYmR0STJvVWtJY2V6YlFEbHZWd2taaHltcUhXQVpWZ1JwYjdLc2ZteGVmQVJ4dWh6dGN0TnhMVEw3YlFXU29iS0)**
---
Just over a week into the new year, we've already seen service members activated in response to multiple disasters across the country. We are so grateful for these selfless heroes in our communities who are ready to go wherever duty calls to do whatever it takes to keep us safe -- and it's up to us to make sure they have all the support they need and deserve in these difficult moments.
**During emergency deployments like these, the USO provides critical support such as kits filled with essential supplies, water, snacks and warm meals, as well as a secure connection for service members to call their loved ones.[All this and more is only possible with your generosity, so please, will you donate $29 -- or anything at all -- to support our heroes around the world no matter what crises arise in 2025?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/vpbwCgmVzyM_)**
[RUSH $29 NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $58 NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $116 NOW](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)
---
[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/4NKwHKWqxAs-/T1lGN29IOXM1bjBpUGJUbjBQKzFOZUlGYlJlcVF5ZGNlQ0NOcjNzZEpWVWFwY09SZjRzZTVRZnFINUpsUTlEYUZ3dUN5aU5UNFVEY0VzcFR2Vi9JVEtDNHRhN3dENkNjb01uU1Q2MGszK1k9S0/UlViOWhpVTJHTHpKeW91WHE1cGpOYTJYTTBYRTB2RktjYmR0STJvVWtJY2V6YlFEbHZWd2taaHltcUhXQVpWZ1JwYjdLc2ZteGVmQVJ4dWh6dGN0TnhMVEw3YlFXU29iS0)
---
We'll continue to keep you updated on our work to support those responding to this emergency. Thank you for being a military supporter our heroes can count on!
--The USO

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Would You Fight Your Neighbor Over Water?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**It’s been the Gulf of Mexico for centuries. Trump’s greed shouldn’t overshadow history.** Gay Valimont here, Democrat running for FL-1 in the special election. Trump greedily wants to rid Mexico of pride, for no economic gain. The Gulf of Mexico was named by Native Americans, and Trump is willing to destroy that piece of heritage over pride. **The worst part; It is already sparking a rivalry with Mexico, before he has even been sworn in.** **You and I can ensure history is conserved.**
---
---
As I campaign for Congress in Florida’s First District, I’m struck by the absurdity of Donald Trump’s latest proposal—renaming the **Gulf of Mexico to something that suits his ego**. This is just another example of his disregard for our shared history and culture, all in pursuit of personal gain. Trump’s actions not only undermine our national values, but they also show a broader disregard for the global community and the importance of cultural preservation. **We need more Democrats in Congress who will fight for our communities, protect our heritage, and prioritize people over profit.**

**[Your donation is vital in flipping this district and restoring integrity to our government. Rushing $8 to my campaign can help us spread our message, and potentially get the kind of individuals in Congress that would prevent this from happening.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100238893/522110423/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY3OTJkY2QtMmNkMC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nP1bIHBGo9toHav4QBjfNi61LMovNN04UY5GNwLQwns=)**
