| |
---
| | | One of America's top doctors is hoping you'll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an invisible problem affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it's happening except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry's research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that's not even the worst part.

Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food, says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what's happening and what you can do about it in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zkFzqjAQwPFPE24y2U3YyCGH5_Ph4VkP7cHa2yJB0pKKBGXop-_gOF53f7P_5dC1vp6sMCuB2PgqCkSh_gjEy2EM_fUz_N8sDt1KLy60C9m8xb8PesMn_j7ydFq97bf_ooru4yfmXb-_wZMPU-ee-BFNXWDfzlOzTiqr6krqxFkwigilhDxpLDLWSwAgA652BJBpTU5mxIqlYU68RYmZBABYImmTUlZyrYmphmXOphRa3jspB9f7I0McRu778zmkx3NIWtsMQxfvjxUCi3Ec07IJVctfbpqFwKLYvetXEFioF9psIZ-lKuK1BKHWWS5N0tuqG33b-khGaHm6B-fzN4u_AQAA__9lIGfJ)**

**Once you've seen this, Dr. Gundry says, you'll never buy groceries the same way again.**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It's a technique he's been using himself and at age 74, he says it's the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they've been using Dr. Gundry's simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

Every American should have this information, he says. And if this video opens your eyes to what's happening out there, I hope you'll share it with your loved ones.

[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zkFzqjAQwPFPE24y2U3YyCGH5_Ph4VkP7cHa2yJB0pKKBGXop-_gOF53f7P_5dC1vp6sMCuB2PgqCkSh_gjEy2EM_fUz_N8sDt1KLy60C9m8xb8PesMn_j7ydFq97bf_ooru4yfmXb-_wZMPU-ee-BFNXWDfzlOzTiqr6krqxFkwigilhDxpLDLWSwAgA652BJBpTU5mxIqlYU68RYmZBABYImmTUlZyrYmphmXOphRa3jspB9f7I0McRu778zmkx3NIWtsMQxfvjxUCi3Ec07IJVctfbpqFwKLYvetXEFioF9psIZ-lKuK1BKHWWS5N0tuqG33b-khGaHm6B-fzN4u_AQAA__9lIGfJ)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0zbFOwzAUheGncbZG9rVjx4MHCogBxMJQle0muW6NYpLaJVF4epSqysZ6_k86GMc--MUxs2cA59BlBsDkAwO4HOeYfr7i68vuOO7V7qLfY7VWeLzTCTb83eJy2n8c3p6zzPT5m-2YDpPY-HUZacP305Iihn5dzVPROek7rgpywkitgXNhi7OzFZFualV3jVW29Y2X5JF0a0FysnURHHCouBBC1KCVKXXVoFcatRe1RdMwxW8_JUZKoUWRrzOmNAyxbIdY9K4b59D3IWvDFD_d6BrSf2Fy8BcAAP__KI1dVQ)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Add your name: Save the USPS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)
Hey Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw this alarming news from the Trump Administration: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2501_USPS/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250111_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-) That’s right — after nearly destroying the postal service by appointing unqualified MAGA megadonor Louis DeJoy as Postmaster General during his first term, Trump is discussing privatizing the USPS. **This would be a disaster for the American people — which is why Tammy is speaking out to defend the postal service.[Add your name if you want to save the postal service and protect this government service >>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2501_USPS/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250111_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)** | | [PROTECT THE USPS](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2501_USPS/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250111_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)
---
Ever since Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS _**more expensive**_ and _**less convenient**_ to use. It’s a shame.
DeJoy has made massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election — when millions of Americans were counting on voting by mail.
The USPS is a vital service that millions of Americans count on for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why passing legislation in the Senate to improve the USPS has remained a priority for Tammy.
**Privatizing the USPS would increase costs, lead to cuts in service for rural communities, and impact hundreds of thousands of government workers.**
**[Tammy knows the value of the USPS for Wisconsinites — which is why she’s speaking out against privatizing the postal service. Please join her in voicing your opposition to this plan from the Trump Administration.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2501_USPS/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250111_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)**
| [PROTECT THE USPS](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2501_USPS/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250111_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)
---
Thank you for using your voice to bring awareness to this critical issue.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4556%2E35263%2EpKNF8-)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

name: Katie Porter
subject: I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this email I sent yesterday, highlighting a way to help LA families and firefighters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)
Derek,
I’ve been so heartened to see the outpouring of support for California. I’m proud of how much this movement has collectively chipped in to support wildfire recovery.
But the need is real with thousands of people displaced. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this email I sent yesterday, **[highlighting a way to help LA families and firefighters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250111-wildfires?refcode=em20250111-39384&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39384_3422442_8Fjixs&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)**
With gratitude,
Katie Porter
_—Forwarded Message—_
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: January 10, 2025
Subject: Here’s how to support our brave firefighters
Derek,
These LA wildfires are devastating, and my thoughts and prayers are with the many Californians affected.
[_For information about wildfire safety, please click here._](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21280?t=2&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)
I’m so thankful for the firefighters who are bravely working around the clock to contain the fires and evacuate residents. If you’re safe from the fires and able to make a donation, **[consider supporting LA firefighters and our community by donating to the California Fire Foundation.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250111-wildfires?refcode=em20250111-39384&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39384_3422442_8Fjixs&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)**
**For firefighters:** The foundation supports families of firefighters who are killed or injured in the line of duty, and helps incoming firefighters who need assistance affording the exams they’re required to take before joining the fire service.
**For the community:** The foundation helps people in need of immediate assistance by distributing $250 gift cards to eligible survivors who need help getting things like food and clothing.
**[Will you join me in making a donation to the California Fire Foundation? Every donation made adds up to make a real difference for people in need.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250111-wildfires?refcode=em20250111-39384&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39384_3422442_8Fjixs&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250111-wildfires?refcode=em20250111-39384&refcode2=39384_3422442_8Fjixs&akid=39384%2E3422442%2E8Fjixs)
I am praying for my neighbors in Los Angeles and so grateful for all of the hard work of the first responders who are on the frontlines.
With gratitude,
Katie Porter

clean_body: Derek, I’ve been so heartened to see the outpouring of support for California. I’m proud of how much this movement has collectively chipped in to support wildfire recovery. But the need is real with thousands of people displaced. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this email I sent yesterday, With gratitude, Katie Porter —Forwarded Message— To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: January 10, 2025 Subject: Here’s how to support our brave firefighters Derek, These LA wildfires are devastating, and my thoughts and prayers are with the many Californians affected. I’m so thankful for the firefighters who are bravely working around the clock to contain the fires and evacuate residents. If you’re safe from the fires and able to make a donation, For firefighters: The foundation supports families of firefighters who are killed or injured in the line of duty, and helps incoming firefighters who need assistance affording the exams they’re required to take before joining the fire service. For the community: The foundation helps people in need of immediate assistance by distributing $250 gift cards to eligible survivors who need help getting things like food and clothing. I am praying for my neighbors in Los Angeles and so grateful for all of the hard work of the first responders who are on the frontlines. With gratitude, Katie Porter Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. name: David Hogg
subject: Tim Walz just endorsed me for DNC Vice Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’m thrilled to have Tim Walz on the team.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250111-1&t=1&akid=1625%2E587540%2E2u3L7_)
Did you hear the good news, Peter?
**Tim Walz just endorsed my campaign for DNC Vice Chair!!! 🥹🥹🥹**
I was proud to support Tim for Vice President (even before he was officially picked!). It’s a full circle moment to have his support for my own campaign.
**[I’m thrilled to have Tim Walz on the team. Are you with us, too? Split a $5 donation to support my campaign and power our work at Leaders We Deserve.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1625&amount=5&refcode2=1625_587540_2u3L7_&akid=1625%2E587540%2E2u3L7_)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1625&amount=5&refcode2=1625_587540_2u3L7_&akid=1625%2E587540%2E2u3L7_)
From serving our country in the military to shaping young minds as a teacher and football coach, **Governor Walz has shown unwavering commitment to public service** and I’m incredibly honored and humbled to have him back my campaign.
Ever since the shooting at my high school, he’s been a champion for the gun violence prevention movement – exemplifying leadership that listens, takes action, and works tirelessly to better our lives. That’s exactly what we need more of in our party. **And as DNC Vice Chair, I will work to make that vision a reality.**
**[If you’re able, please pitch in $5 now to fund my campaign for DNC Vice Chair and help Leaders We Deserve continue electing bold young progressives.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1625&amount=5&refcode2=1625_587540_2u3L7_&akid=1625%2E587540%2E2u3L7_)**

clean_body: I’m thrilled to have Tim Walz on the team. Did you hear the good news, Peter? Tim Walz just endorsed my campaign for DNC Vice Chair!!! 🥹🥹🥹 I was proud to support Tim for Vice President (even before he was officially picked!). It’s a full circle moment to have his support for my own campaign. From serving our country in the military to shaping young minds as a teacher and football coach, Governor Walz has shown unwavering commitment to public service and I’m incredibly honored and humbled to have him back my campaign. Ever since the shooting at my high school, he’s been a champion for the gun violence prevention movement – exemplifying leadership that listens, takes action, and works tirelessly to better our lives. That’s exactly what we need more of in our party. And as DNC Vice Chair, I will work to make that vision a reality. Thank you for your support!!! David Hogg

name: Gay Valimont
subject: DeSantis doesn’t Care About Fair Elections. You Can Help.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:

---
**If Ron DeSantis thinks ignoring special elections is a good idea, April 1st will prove him wrong.** Gay Valimont here, campaigning for Florida’s First Congressional District, I’m deeply concerned by the recent actions of Governor Ron DeSantis, who continues to _undermine the democratic process_ at every turn. A brave group of Florida voters has filed a lawsuit against him for failing to call special elections after vacancies in the state legislature, a clear violation of the law. **This deliberate inaction is no accident; it’s part of a broader effort by DeSantis and his allies to consolidate power and maintain control over our democracy—only for the benefit of the right-wing agenda.** **We can stop these efforts.**
---
---
By intentionally stalling elections, DeSantis is blocking the will of the people, leaving key districts without representation and preventing voters from having a voice. **His goal is clear:** limit access to the ballot, undermine fair representation, and keep power firmly in the hands of a few. **We need more Democrats in Congress who will fight for our communities, protect our heritage, and prioritize people over profit.**

**[We can’t afford to let this continue. We need more Democrats in office who will fight for free and fair elections. name: Claire Low, NDRC
subject: Domino effects of the ongoing power grab in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
How this will shape the state’s electoral maps — and future control of Congress
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255299/522160463/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZjE4YTU1LTRlZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zdXSJUE5dCbgw10f0vhxcn4QvG7ZBW9BM0aze3FfF3o=&emci=baf55118-9bcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=37f18a55-4ed0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, What’s happening right now in North Carolina is outrageous. In case you missed it, a GOP supermajority on the state’s supreme court has blocked the certification of November’s state supreme court election — in which Democratic candidate, and currently serving Associate Justice, Allison Riggs was declared the winner. **This is essentially an effort by Republicans to steal a seat on North Carolina’s highest court —** a dangerous, anti-democratic power grab that could have long-lasting ramifications. **Here’s a quick explainer from _Mother Jones_ about the stakes — [and why it’s imperative that we keep working in North Carolina and across the country to push back against these partisan efforts to undermine the will of the voters:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255301/522160465/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCMotherJones_email_20250111-NDRC-Tier1-NCMotherJones_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250111-NDRC-Tier1-NCMotherJones_&utm_campaign=NCMotherJones&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZjE4YTU1LTRlZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zdXSJUE5dCbgw10f0vhxcn4QvG7ZBW9BM0aze3FfF3o=)** “The race has national significance because Riggs’ victory would give Democrats a shot at retaking the court’s majority after 2028. **That would allow them to oversee the state’s redistricting process in 2031.** That is particularly consequential because the current majority on the court upheld heavily gerrymandered maps drawn by the Republican-controlled state legislature that allowed Republicans to pick up three US House seats in November**— just enough to maintain control of the chamber and ensure one-party rule in DC.”** — Mother Jones, January 7, 2025 When control of Congress relies on such a slim margin, it’s easy to connect the dots between anti-democratic efforts in state-level elections and the impacts they can make on leadership at the national level. The domino effects of power grabs like this effort in North Carolina can be massive — and we must do everything possible to stop them to ensure fair representation across the country. All of us at the NDRC are committed to fighting back against widespread efforts to further partisan gerrymandering in North Carolina and other states like Ohio, Florida, and New Hampshire. **But it’s going to take time and resources to keep it up — and we’re relying on the support of people like you to power our efforts in 2025 and beyond.** **[If you’re able to contribute right now, make a gift that will fuel the fight for fair electoral maps and push back against current and future power grabs like what’s happening right now in North Carolina.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255303/522160468/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCMotherJones_email_20250111-NDRC-Tier1-NCMotherJones_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250111-NDRC-Tier1-NCMotherJones_&utm_campaign=NCMotherJones&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZjE4YTU1LTRlZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zdXSJUE5dCbgw10f0vhxcn4QvG7ZBW9BM0aze3FfF3o=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: How this will shape the state’s electoral maps — and future control of Congress | Peter, What’s happening right now in North Carolina is outrageous. In case you missed it, a GOP supermajority on the state’s supreme court has blocked the certification of November’s state supreme court election — in which Democratic candidate, and currently serving Associate Justice, Allison Riggs was declared the winner. This is essentially an effort by Republicans to steal a seat on North Carolina’s highest court — a dangerous, anti-democratic power grab that could have long-lasting ramifications. Here’s a quick explainer from Mother Jones about the stakes — = “The race has national significance because Riggs’ victory would give Democrats a shot at retaking the court’s majority after 2028. That would allow them to oversee the state’s redistricting process in 2031. That is particularly consequential because the current majority on the court upheld heavily gerrymandered maps drawn by the Republican-controlled state legislature that allowed Republicans to pick up three US House seats in November— just enough to maintain control of the chamber and ensure one-party rule in DC.” — Mother Jones, January 7, 2025 When control of Congress relies on such a slim margin, it’s easy to connect the dots between anti-democratic efforts in state-level elections and the impacts they can make on leadership at the national level. The domino effects of power grabs like this effort in North Carolina can be massive — and we must do everything possible to stop them to ensure fair representation across the country. All of us at the NDRC are committed to fighting back against widespread efforts to further partisan gerrymandering in North Carolina and other states like Ohio, Florida, and New Hampshire. But it’s going to take time and resources to keep it up — and we’re relying on the support of people like you to power our efforts in 2025 and beyond. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I appreciate everything you’re doing to stop partisan gerrymandering and ensure fair maps. body:

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

name: Team McBride
subject: BREAKING: MAGA is coming for Sarah McBride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Just days into 2025, Sarah’s old opponent — with Nancy Mace by her side — announced that she’s running against Sarah again next year.
#
Breaking news:
**One of Sarah’s 2024 opponents just joined MAGA loyalist Nancy Mace on stage in Delaware and announced that she’s running to challenge Sarah in 2026.**
[**We’re mobilizing to fight back, but we need your help. Can you chip in now to help us defend Sarah and keep her fighting for us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1686&amount=5&refcode2=1686_21716_yiAtVm&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)
Last November, Sarah was elected to Congress by an _overwhelming_ margin because Delaware voters know she’s an effective legislator who will fight for all of us.
Now, just days into 2025, our former opponent — with Mace by her side — announced that she’s running against Sarah _again_ next year.
While Sarah’s introducing bipartisan consumer protections in Congress, the Delaware GOP seems more focused on bathrooms than the economy. And the MAGA right will clearly do anything to try to attack Sarah personally.
To fight back and prepare for the continued attacks ahead, we need to replenish our campaign funds — and Sarah is relying on this grassroots movement to do it.
**We know 2026 seems far away, but the work to keep Sarah in Congress starts now.[Can you make an urgent $5 contribution to respond to our opponent’s campaign announcement with the strongest grassroots response possible?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1686&amount=5&refcode2=1686_21716_yiAtVm&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250111-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250111-1686&refcode2=1686_21716_yiAtVm&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)**
Thank you for having Sarah’s back,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250111-1&t=1&refcode2=1686_21716_yiAtVm&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1686%2E21716%2EyiAtVm)

# [California's controversial inmate firefighter program](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=154631601&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjMxNjAxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY2MjMzNjAsImV4cCI6MTczOTIxNTM2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.hBTAJQLOMLhenmLvDzYBWlWR9NItiNOB_lg4hK4Abjo)

---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=154631601&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjMxNjAxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjYyMzM2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzM5MjE1MzYwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ._41VwmApZ1iKX-0Nh4p1zxui0bMBX_sffmAWC0biuh0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcmViZWthaGpvbmVzL3AvY2FsaWZvcm5pYXMtY29udHJvdmVyc2lhbC1pbm1hdGU_.2uCLe--n3UU0aX06SWM8kUrAlSCEx3QAJh-uuJrxBS0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/californias-controversial-inmate?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

More than 1,000 inmates are currently battling wildfires as part of California's [Conservation Fire Camp Program](https://substack.com/redirect/9f4091dd-d6d3-4658-a4dd-8d7a13f4b991?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
California's prisoners make up [30% of the state's entire fighting force](https://substack.com/redirect/607ef67d-b26b-4c9d-924f-1ad0dfea3839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), though sentencing and prison reforms have[ cut the number of participants in half ](https://substack.com/redirect/b1e0fa81-befe-4d47-a50b-5a2302197e04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)since last year.
Participants are low-risk inmates who are paid a maximum of $26 a day and get two days off their prison sentence for each full day they serve.
The program has been a source of controversy for years, as inmates are eight times more likely to be seriously injured and are often given used and inadequate tools.
They can't sue if they're injured due to neglect, and their family's can't receive death benefits if they're killed in service.
Worse still, they can't even get jobs as firefighters once they're free -- even if they spent years on the frontlines. First, they would have to get their records expunged -- a time-consuming and often expensive process that takes months to years.
Here's a five-minute rundown on the key points.

name: Abigail
subject: protecting reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As the next Governor of Virginia, I will defend our fundamental rights – including the right to choose, the right to access IVF, and the right to contraception.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100255871/522162570/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmY4MzY0NjgtNTFkMC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kzuo-c7RR-1OvWr1333HfsVuiumDDqOC7MEoCOErZ_I=)
---
| Peter,

**After the _Dobbs_ decision, Democratic Governors throughout the country have become the first line of defense in protecting reproductive rights and rejecting Trump abortion bans.**

Now, Virginia is the only state in the South that hasn’t further restricted women’s reproductive freedom—and that is only thanks to our Democratic-held General Assembly.

But we know Republicans in Virginia, including my opponent, want to pass extreme restrictions on family planning, reproductive healthcare, contraception, and more that would rip away women’s fundamental rights because they have put them forward.

We must make sure that women in Virginia – and those from neighboring states—can get the reproductive healthcare they need—no matter who is in office. **As the next Governor of Virginia, I will defend our fundamental rights – including the right to choose, the right to access IVF, and the right to contraception.**

[_**But this race is already being called the most competitive in the country, so I need your help. Will you contribute to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100255876/522162578/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmY4MzY0NjgtNTFkMC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kzuo-c7RR-1OvWr1333HfsVuiumDDqOC7MEoCOErZ_I=)

clean_body: As the next Governor of Virginia, I will defend our fundamental rights – including the right to choose, the right to access IVF, and the right to contraception. | = | Peter, After the Dobbs decision, Democratic Governors throughout the country have become the first line of defense in protecting reproductive rights and rejecting Trump abortion bans. Now, Virginia is the only state in the South that hasn’t further restricted women’s reproductive freedom—and that is only thanks to our Democratic-held General Assembly. But we know Republicans in Virginia, including my opponent, want to pass extreme restrictions on family planning, reproductive healthcare, contraception, and more that would rip away women’s fundamental rights because they have put them forward. We must make sure that women in Virginia – and those from neighboring states—can get the reproductive healthcare they need—no matter who is in office. As the next Governor of Virginia, I will defend our fundamental rights – including the right to choose, the right to access IVF, and the right to contraception. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Virginia just handed Trump his first L.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is how we build momentum for the fights ahead.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255944/522162848/1328794144?refcode=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWMwZjNmLTUyZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPqS5USrGSE81P_S1P6uN6Lyd699lzw6vlBc-AQv--8=&emci=4d9c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
It’s been a heavy week for some of us, team. Our thoughts remain with everyone impacted by the wildfires in Southern California. But amidst the devastation, I want to take a moment to share some uplifting news — a small win in Virginia this week that we can all feel good about. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Kannan Srinivasan — our first JanePAC-endorsed climate champion of the year — won his critical special election in Virginia’s 32nd Senate District! This was no ordinary race. It was our first early test of the political environment after the 2024 elections, setting the tone for the fights ahead. With a razor-thin majority in Virginia’s Senate, Kannan’s win keeps control out of Republican hands — and makes sure Trump and his allies can’t bulldoze through the state with their anti-climate agenda. But let’s not kid ourselves. This special election was our first battleground of 2025, but it won’t be the last. Trump takes office in a matter of weeks, and he’s promised to team up with Big Oil and Republican-led legislatures across the country to erase climate progress. **That’s why we need to continue to build on this momentum and create a firewall of climate leaders at every level of government to protect the climate policies we’ve fought so hard for — and to push for bold new ones.** **[This special election victory is just the beginning. It’s proof of what we can accomplish together in the months ahead. Can I count on you to chip in a few dollars to help us keep this momentum going?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255945/522162849/2105508926?refcode=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWMwZjNmLTUyZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPqS5USrGSE81P_S1P6uN6Lyd699lzw6vlBc-AQv--8=)** There is no “off-year” in the climate fight. With over **_100,000 open seats_** on the ballot this year, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. The fossil fuel industry and its Republican enablers will pour unlimited resources into elections to defeat candidates like Kannan — candidates who dare to prioritize people and the planet over corporate profits. That’s why grassroots power is the key to winning. When we unite, there’s nothing we can’t achieve — and 2025 will prove it. **[Every dollar you give helps us recruit, endorse, and strategically support candidates who will hold the line and push for bold climate action. Can I count on you to chip in today to power our fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255946/522162850/2105508926?refcode=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWMwZjNmLTUyZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPqS5USrGSE81P_S1P6uN6Lyd699lzw6vlBc-AQv--8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255947/522162851/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWMwZjNmLTUyZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPqS5USrGSE81P_S1P6uN6Lyd699lzw6vlBc-AQv--8=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100255948/522162852/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.549c0f3f-52d0-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0OWMwZjNmLTUyZDAtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GPqS5USrGSE81P_S1P6uN6Lyd699lzw6vlBc-AQv--8=)

clean_body: This is how we build momentum for the fights ahead. | It’s been a heavy week for some of us, team. Our thoughts remain with everyone impacted by the wildfires in Southern California. But amidst the devastation, I want to take a moment to share some uplifting news — a small win in Virginia this week that we can all feel good about. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Kannan Srinivasan — our first JanePAC-endorsed climate champion of the year — won his critical special election in Virginia’s 32nd Senate District! This was no ordinary race. It was our first early test of the political environment after the 2024 elections, setting the tone for the fights ahead. With a razor-thin majority in Virginia’s Senate, Kannan’s win keeps control out of Republican hands — and makes sure Trump and his allies can’t bulldoze through the state with their anti-climate agenda. But let’s not kid ourselves. This special election was our first battleground of 2025, but it won’t be the last. Trump takes office in a matter of weeks, and he’s promised to team up with Big Oil and Republican-led legislatures across the country to erase climate progress. That’s why we need to continue to build on this momentum and create a firewall of climate leaders at every level of government to protect the climate policies we’ve fought so hard for — and to push for bold new ones. = There is no “off-year” in the climate fight. With over 100,000 open seats on the ballot this year, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. The fossil fuel industry and its Republican enablers will pour unlimited resources into elections to defeat candidates like Kannan — candidates who dare to prioritize people and the planet over corporate profits. That’s why grassroots power is the key to winning. When we unite, there’s nothing we can’t achieve — and 2025 will prove it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

[I hope you’ll hear me out and consider chipping in $3 to sustain this people-powered movement »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100255998/522163020/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250111_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDkyODA4Ni01MmQwLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpbU4OB5PVkFYxUIJ8f1vINgzF9hTFMxE-rtYJ-q1so=)

I’m the **first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man** in Congress.

I was raised by a single mother. I never thought I’d go from **public housing in the Bronx** to the **halls of Congress in D.C.**

I don’t have a fancy degree or connections, and I **don’t do a minute of call time** — I just have an **army of grassroots supporters** made up of folks like you.

Peter , this special election will be one of our first chances to flip a seat and shrink Mike Johnson’s razor-thin majority, but we have to be prepared for anything.

| In just a few weeks, our campaign has built incredible momentum! Thanks to you, we raised over $265k and have a real shot of replacing Elise Stefanik in Congress.

**✅ **We’ve received support from over 10,000 grassroots donors.

**✅ **Small-dollar donations fuel our work, with 99% of our donations coming in at under $250.

**✅ **In fact, our average donation is just $22!

Peter, this special election will be one of our first chances to flip a seat and shrink Mike Johnson’s razor-thin majority, but we have to be prepared for anything.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: not a hypothetical
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100256286/522164082/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwOTMwNC01NmQwLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lwq2jqeozoXDmGELoP9eCThl2Rej1JOYHDgF_FctVFQ=) Hey, Extreme Republicans have been chipping away at our abortion rights for years – and now that they control both the Senate and House, some are already pushing for national legislation to restrict abortion rights. This isn’t a hypothetical. A majority of my Republican colleagues in Congress have already signed onto proposals that would ban abortion nationwide – even criminalizing IVF. Donald Trump repeatedly left the door open to signing a national abortion ban if Congress sends it to his desk. And Republican super PACs that support these extreme measures spent millions here in Oregon to try to unseat me. We can’t let that happen. Women deserve the right to make decisions about their own bodies – without interference from politicians. [_**I’ll fight tooth and nail to defend reproductive rights, but I need you with me. clean_body: = Hey, Extreme Republicans have been chipping away at our abortion rights for years – and now that they control both the Senate and House, some are already pushing for national legislation to restrict abortion rights. This isn’t a hypothetical. A majority of my Republican colleagues in Congress have already signed onto proposals that would ban abortion nationwide – even criminalizing IVF. Donald Trump repeatedly left the door open to signing a national abortion ban if Congress sends it to his desk. And Republican super PACs that support these extreme measures spent millions here in Oregon to try to unseat me. We can’t let that happen. Women deserve the right to make decisions about their own bodies – without interference from politicians. = | | = Thanks for your support, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ACxPNefZjpBnntU0wYyol4VkZUoCR9KvsjzBYhBQYq4vYY-gJ1OOkINZwEFiC5U5I-9mPMrjZdptSKRrFw2QL7nHcsEbrKLgjiBHA8TQDLhgTiXH0MJPbdE08Z08BeDsw1VZD79DYxtHjiS9_mX38R9)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5AACzfD8C0FzjoWkX8WMu6u7z0yBmA8-E-R4DOfE_sQytm0_tO3QszCHZBdHSKkrXELrgjGNPny8HrZpNVie1VIVcaHICQqrj-4zl1CTq5WFWhWI82z35NyoAtRSh0S2BGunj7sqQSUTIfWzpR-03Rg7)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ADVPNW7Be_ZaUq5Me_-4MK9jcwfPYq8X_qmfPbYBarUN6n369R9iz0uLO1LIiqepSu1484VwuzR782RRThQ8TTBrpDacNoloxloutVzj62K4g0diLgnqAxNXUW3X_cv9z9IBrExaQVHEQ33bCo5l-dh) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5AAKe-fd-emT5pvzj5j2i36Ga-6HxNmtZJd4KgA0phia15mh4b1Pz1_o-6J3R_954044A9R9aqJWL02WQPYK0E44I6W0PW7MdP-I00oSI7cJR4ltl8ZxI21JmYMuE1J7aiVS093-1INdrGSrK6uzPM2_)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ADBvhTUswzxtau7EC2DsVHQ3yI0uy_6xZ2UAJCBpa0N82sz3K_sib35Lrub8i9yp7Mr4aZHoh3rsSjGAg7-83wP4st0cba0ZixUB5BLc2aMVtFg9LTOqYaioHurGXTPY4RfdJvwz19XmZGWQge6kiFB)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ADzzNEThZt_DBT_2HR_oa4Nn7m6ZgKDNz-dBMHSftXIIX8UqwOM4nZf5jUX-dDTVuR7w1uU9ge36xFUIeqRyxlqFTjpBR9mgVQw64wXxETura0xNMrjX0QVePRk9TzT9dJEiXU-40kxFZJAMIxl8T6I)
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ABBPk0hfk_Hi5dBx6vUIPrIhTuUY9OJI0jGZivqgh-NWecAQBUr8esV7DbAfyhOQv_NGFoEaNOR1cdcJZ-fy8fxJL3En7YuKRTCFHL99MA1a4RGpYLAOtnOlWJtieu2E4vDS8JE9TW27v2LcrKNHcJv)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d961eeffc1d048588a68d66107127dd9&_e=g_g5QogcDWDkPxXj4J1JU4lmbnjeY11DO8pSyA6QmT8hPH7ep_gtAd2MVXCyMYYxn9GH6gD2fV7gSKP19dlUEhg2KqEAI2qXmh3_Vdj_M2Rvi3bamDN7vreursrbMY5fuGMt6FJPonigM_6LB_wzSv0ipFSSkysgqs4hiXwpW1jy3RjVLTrcxe8eycpW4koKQcng4WdQv_6QQYw8Gsf912SvR2Z25R-cKI5kj3rn5ADJ4rVa_7A-ridhIKfYcfZSOUMeM-Qkp4VA8zNJ3cXZgXwqBzrkP3fvGgAAkNGXAK0Q-qQUp7eOW1y960aw4Iv1iMgLt45uT4R2zXWIpRMLbsGcMw4YYmID_wMZ8w9RIQZnQhSIvn8nHGEyKS9n_qT2)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

## Big UPDATES At Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
I am _beyond excited_ to share with you that in 2025, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18901688.10299.1.217ef09d1d68dbfbc25521082181ba14) will be getting an **outside facelift** along with the **installation of an outdoor basketball/pickle-ball court** targeting the next generation! With your help previously, we have taken a **former night-club** and _transformed_ it into a **beautiful church** on the inside. Now it's time to tackle the outside. **Phase 1** of this project (outside facelift + basketball/pickle-ball court) will cost the church around $250,000. We do things on a cash basis at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18901688.10300.1.d8890e92495ade661d0892625360a748) and _I need your help_. Please consider partnering with us in 2025 with a gift of **$25** , **$250** , **$2500** _or more_. This message is going out to **thousands of believers** and if everybody will do something in 2025, we can accomplish this phase of transforming a **former tavern** into a **tabernacle**. Take a look at the pictures below! **Phase 2** is the addition of an upper deck of seating to our main auditorium. You can give by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18901688.10301.1.8640046780387b1e6b667cc5b5544b77) Thank you in advance!
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18901688.10303.1.b3685fb78f9dbbb2b5b6853c02e61020), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. name: Respond before midnight [DOTL]
subject: Do you approve of Mike Johnson?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Help us plan our offensive strategy against the GOP

|
---

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Voters of Michigan deserve what’s right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)
In the first few weeks of 2025, I’m focused on what really matters.
At this moment, we need leaders who are committed to values of fairness, equality, and making sure everyone has fair opportunity, and that we fight to protect people in the workplace, and our kids in school.
We need to _unify_ behind those values that brought us to the table and ensure we continue to show to the people of Michigan that we’re on the side of the people. **We need leaders who show up every day to ensure the people’s voices are heard.**
At this moment, **I don’t back away from hard fights.** I _lean in_ and do the hard work. However, I can’t do that hard work without your help.
**[Donations from people like you are what allow me to continue to my work serving the people of Michigan. So please, will you chip in any amount today to help continue this hard work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1&refcode2=30_181023_Bkzz27&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250111-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250111-1&refcode2=30_181023_Bkzz27&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)**
The journey is only beginning, and we have a lot to accomplish — _together._
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1&refcode2=30_181023_Bkzz27&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250111-1?refcode=em20250111-1&refcode2=30_181023_Bkzz27&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=30%2E181023%2EBkzz27)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

At this moment, we need leaders who are committed to values of fairness, equality, and making sure everyone has fair opportunity, and that we fight to protect people in the workplace, and our kids in school. We need to unify behind those values that brought us to the table and ensure we continue to show to the people of Michigan that we’re on the side of the people. We need leaders who show up every day to ensure the people’s voices are heard. At this moment, I don’t back away from hard fights. I lean in and do the hard work. subject: This could be the end.
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 I would rather be doing anything other than writing this email to you right now. What I’m about to tell you pains me to write, but I can’t put this off any longer. It’s all over. This could be the end. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our first goal of 2025. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 I could really use your support right here and now. HERE’S WHY: 1. Ever since their MAJOR DEFEAT, the Democrats are more fired up than ever before to defeat our Republican agenda, destroy our conservative values, and stand against our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. 2. In order to try and defeat us, they’re pulling out all the stops. They’re making the calls to all the national Democrats and liberal fat cats. They’re fundraising and strategizing for how to TAKE DOWN our America First agenda once and for all. 3. Meanwhile, I’m way behind pace to reach my make-or-break fundraising goal before our FIRST deadline of 2025. We can’t afford to start the year out on this note! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I know you’ve already done so much for this campaign, but if you can find it in your heart to pitch in ONCE MORE before our deadline, it would mean the world to me and go a long way in my fight to protect our America First priorities! I’m really hoping I can count on your help, Peter. No gift is too small right now. Anything you can give helps me inch closer to our make-or-break goal. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 So please, help me get back on track. And if you can’t give right now. Trust me, I understand. All I ask is for your continued prayers and support. Thank you! - Marsha Blackburn https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=319240d3f3fc35124c79834fb0e1e6cb4982adff9c7b2861c4ef0362d3e0f73451651e6e93d002d043db6060ef75a2d10a9771fed9bb4975499dc1642a625972 RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. clean_body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ I would rather be doing anything other than writing this email to you right now. What I’m about to tell you pains me to write, but I can’t put this off any longer. It’s all over. This could be the end. RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our first goal of 2025. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now. HERE’S WHY: 1. Ever since their MAJOR DEFEAT, the Democrats are more fired up than ever before to defeat our Republican agenda, destroy our conservative values, and stand against our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. 2. In order to try and defeat us, they’re pulling out all the stops. They’re making the calls to all the national Democrats and liberal fat cats. They’re fundraising and strategizing for how to TAKE DOWN our America First agenda once and for all. 3. Meanwhile, I’m way behind pace to reach my make-or-break fundraising goal before our FIRST deadline of 2025. We can’t afford to start the year out on this note! RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT I know you’ve already done so much for this campaign, but if you can find it in your heart to pitch in ONCE MORE before our deadline, it would mean the world to me and go a long way in my fight to protect our America First priorities! I’m really hoping I can count on your help, Peter. No gift is too small right now. Anything you can give helps me inch closer to our make-or-break goal. So please, help me get back on track. And if you can’t give right now. Trust me, I understand. All I ask is for your continued prayers and support. Thank you! - Marsha Blackburn RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@updates.marshablackburn.com "info@updates.marshablackburn.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? **Each of these special elections marks an opportunity to take a meaningful stand against Republicans’ hate-driven agenda.**

clean_body: With twelve special elections quickly approaching, will you chip in to help ensure that state Democrats have the resources they need to win this month, next month, and beyond? | | | | | ---|--- Democrats are gearing up for twelvespecial elections across eight states over the next three months. Here’s what’s on deck ⬇️ | Date | State | Seat ---|---|--- 1/28 | Minnesota | SD-60 1/28 | Minnesota | HD-40B 1/28 | Iowa | SD-35 2/15 | Delaware | SD-1 2/15 | Delaware | SD-5 2/25 | Maine | HD-24 3/25 | South Carolina | HD-113 3/25 | Pennsylvania | SD-36 3/25 | Mississippi | HD-23 3/25 | Mississippi | HD-82 3/29 | Louisiana | SD-14 3/29 | Louisiana | SD-23 With Republicans' federal trifecta, building Democratic power at the state level has never been more critical to our fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, and our democracy. But, state legislative races are frequently overlooked and underfunded – we need you to help change that. Each of these special elections marks an opportunity to take a meaningful stand against Republicans’ hate-driven agenda. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | As we gear up for the fights ahead, we know we do our best work together. So thanks for being on this team. Let’s do this, Team DLCC | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Check this out...
A _**pro-drug Libertarian PAC based in Austin, Texas wants you to send your money to Pueblo, Colorado**_ so they can "fix" Idaho?
This is the SAME gorup pitting legislators against each toehr and spreading misinformation abdout legislator pay raises! They're flat-out lying about me and others to stir up chaos and rake in donations.
For example, see this text they sent out:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8caee2a0-0cf2-4044-9f84-b66539fba962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's a calculated move to exploit outrage for profit.
Because if you check out my post from a few days ago, you'll see that they are in fact, lying:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4422e113-c892-4869-9bf3-ec277b21f4f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Facts don't matter to pro-drug groups like them--_**fundraising does.**_

#
We need your help.
To be transparent, our fundraising slowed down big time after the election. As a result, we started 2025 behind – and with less than 10 days until Trump returns to office, we’re hoping you can help us catch up today.
We’re politely asking for your support to help us get back on track, so we have the resources to fight back against Trump's MAGA agenda.
Every dollar will go directly toward our efforts to register Texans, get them to the polls, and ultimately, help elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump and his cronies.
We will never try to scare or pressure you into donating, but since this is a grassroots movement, we want to be transparent about our slowdown.
If you have $10 to spare, will you pitch in right now to help us fight back against the Trump administration?

body:

They’re no longer just trying to win elections – they’re trying to strengthen their influence in communities nationwide. This year, they’ve launched an initiative called M4LU, which will serve as a year-round “educational” tool to teach people about their worldviews and opinions of various topics from parenting to Marxism. We cannot normalize the views espoused by the Moms for Liberty extremists, which is why it’s so critical that we defeat them in every school board race possible. We’re not backing down in 2025. **In fact, we’re only growing.** [**Will you help us sustain Educated We Stand throughout 2025 by rushing a $5 donation today?**](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=e7f1beb8dcab49dbb0ea434947d6086b&_e=gC3nC_YDxxMllN-_pUJesfM06xEkpIWfgJ57qV10UWQ1jFhVcOVVH1H2UTpOHBIDibPZ24Em8zKNKltMTQgtTw0_Kq76qFaNcy2_KASa12IMLprjGe18yKNJTImEzz-SiVwS9kcGjpWxACHDfdRvWoxVSZY9NRgpDD04lNrntc8Mxiz3CopnlvDbVH3k3CCU7W6lHot6YDSoydYKStOcVk2o--nF9H1VrY0IoEUjqR0qDy1eTsWdS78or-UkAll9wj7T4R3_FO-yKQfGvOjISOnmDtSSwUX9ANXWSOGEA-Ztz5RfzbR9Qohpn2GrriHXIItK7ciBr_z-AV6keKpweGIlsJQWz0-oDFZuIE7EHVjJkNxawuhZLnH3pL2bLC7hyB2zuB4kYBJSHea74QPPmw2ZDZpegrjPkm0lnlLfK65azjM5V7rpgG0Z3JreyGHV) The country suffered a setback in November, and we will be reminded of that setback on January 20th when Donald Trump assumes office. clean_body: | | | Peter, Moms for Liberty is stepping up their game in 2025. They’re no longer just trying to win elections – they’re trying to strengthen their influence in communities nationwide. This year, they’ve launched an initiative called M4LU, which will serve as a year-round “educational” tool to teach people about their worldviews and opinions of various topics from parenting to Marxism. We cannot normalize the views espoused by the Moms for Liberty extremists, which is why it’s so critical that we defeat them in every school board race possible. We’re not backing down in 2025. In fact, we’re only growing. The country suffered a setback in November, and we will be reminded of that setback on January 20th when Donald Trump assumes office. But Moms for Liberty suffered setbacks at the ballot box as well—and we must capitalize on our victories and momentum. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you so much, Educated We Stand ** Paid for by Educated. We Stand. **

CALL TO ACTION!!!

Dear Moms,

We need your voice to help secure a brighter future for America’s families and children. President Trump nominated Linda McMahon
to serve as his next Secretary of Education, and her confirmation is critical to restoring parental rights, empowering families,
and putting education back into the hands of the states.

Linda is a phenomenal choice for this role. As an experienced advocate for students and parents, she consistently championed
educational freedom and policies prioritizing families over federal bureaucrats.

How Can YOU Make a Difference?

Write to Senator Cassidy today. Below are key points to inspire your message, but we encourage you to craft it in your own words.
Your unique voice matters!

Why we need Linda...

Under Linda’s guidance at the America First Policy Institute and America First Works:

* She spearheaded the expansion of universal school choice from 0 to 12 states.

* She fought for curriculum transparency, patriotic education, and civics studies.

* She protected women and girls while pushing back against harmful ideologies in schools.

As Secretary of Education, Linda will continue this vital work by:

* Returning education decisions to the states so that families, not federal agencies, determine what’s best for their children.

* Aligning education with workforce needs, reallocating funding toward skills training, and connecting students to real career
opportunities without burdening them with unnecessary debt.

* Upholding parental rights and ensuring that school boards, teachers, and administrators are accountable to parents.

Her background in business, her experience on Connecticut’s School Board, and her long-standing commitment to empowering families
make her uniquely qualified to transform America’s education system.

TAKE ACTION NOW!!!

Send a letter to Senator Cassidy via this form.

SEND A LETTER TODAY! clean_body: Restore Parental Rights & Educational Freedom by confirming Linda McMahon for Secretary of Education If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] CALL TO ACTION!!! Dear Moms, We need your voice to help secure a brighter future for America’s families and children. President Trump nominated Linda McMahon to serve as his next Secretary of Education, and her confirmation is critical to restoring parental rights, empowering families, and putting education back into the hands of the states. Linda is a phenomenal choice for this role. As an experienced advocate for students and parents, she consistently championed educational freedom and policies prioritizing families over federal bureaucrats. How Can YOU Make a Difference? Write to Senator Cassidy today. Below are key points to inspire your message, but we encourage you to craft it in your own words. Your unique voice matters! Why we need Linda... Under Linda’s guidance at the America First Policy Institute and America First Works: She spearheaded the expansion of universal school choice from 0 to 12 states. She fought for curriculum transparency, patriotic education, and civics studies. She protected women and girls while pushing back against harmful ideologies in schools. As Secretary of Education, Linda will continue this vital work by: Returning education decisions to the states so that families, not federal agencies, determine what’s best for their children. Aligning education with workforce needs, reallocating funding toward skills training, and connecting students to real career opportunities without burdening them with unnecessary debt. Upholding parental rights and ensuring that school boards, teachers, and administrators are accountable to parents. Her background in business, her experience on Connecticut’s School Board, and her long-standing commitment to empowering families make her uniquely qualified to transform America’s education system. TAKE ACTION NOW!!! Send a letter to Senator Cassidy via this form. SEND A LETTER TODAY! [] You can also reach out to Senator Cassidy via phone. CALL SENATOR CASSIDY [tel:+12022245824] Together, we can make a difference. Let’s stand united for faith, family, and freedom. Thank you for your continued commitment to our mission. name: VoteVets
subject: It’s going to be different this time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We’re going to have to be smarter, more efficient, and more effective to prevent the worst of what Trump intends to accomplish.
#
Peter —
In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a donation to VoteVets as we lay the groundwork to fight back against Trump and the MAGA Right over these next four years.
Please, give us a chance to explain why this donation — especially now — is so important to the fight.
We all remember what it was like after Trump won in 2016. An organized resistance sprang up almost overnight. VoteVets was a big part of that — we were running TV ads against Trump just weeks after his election.
VoteVets endorsed candidates have won literally thousands of elections since then. We stopped countless efforts to privatize the VA and slash benefits for Veterans, and we passed critical expansions of those benefits like the PACT Act. We have strong, principled leaders serving in important offices at a time when we’re going to need them most.
We spent eight years trying to prevent this from happening. But in spite of everything, here we are again. Trump is set to retake the White House in a little over a week.
The “resistance” is going to look different this time around — it has to. We’re going to have to be smarter, more efficient, and more effective to prevent the worst of what Trump intends to accomplish. And we need to look towards the future and invest in the type of candidates who can be impactful leaders post-Trump.
VoteVets is working around the clock to develop a strategy that will hold the line against Trump while also getting more leaders elected to defend our values and promote our priorities.
As we prepare ourselves for the next four years and beyond, it is absolutely essential that this team sticks together so that we can accomplish those goals. That is why your donation is so important, Peter.
And that is why we are humbly asking:
[**If you’re still with us, please: Make a donation of $5, $10, or more if you can afford it to VoteVets before Trump’s inauguration. We can’t do this work without you. Never could.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250111-1-120&t=1&akid=34072%2E3013755%2EVyPZzp)**

### 'Excuse me?!! If Newsom was a Republican you would have nailed him to THE WALL for this!!"
Jan 11
