| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154639440&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjM5NDQwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjYzNTczNSwiZXhwIjoxNzM5MjI3NzM1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.t4C63jQykdMXbkot5JyyGZAbCJVmRMN5rOntbGD3WYY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154639440&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjM5NDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY2MzU3MzUsImV4cCI6MTczOTIyNzczNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.INq_nELkUDWIa8-xI6JpBKfFhPfaN3zkXoAIXKH8vjg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154639440&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0NjM5NDQwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY2MzU3MzUsImV4cCI6MTczOTIyNzczNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.INq_nELkUDWIa8-xI6JpBKfFhPfaN3zkXoAIXKH8vjg)
---

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/ron-desantis-destroys-reporter-for?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Ron DeSantis **[fired back at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/6c44861c-78fb-4679-883f-968848975c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for asking if Donald Trump's comments towards Gavin Newsom amid the California wildfires was "appropriate" for a president-elect.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6c44861c-78fb-4679-883f-968848975c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Is it appropriate for people in your industry to try to create division and to try to create narratives every time these things happen?!!" DeSantis snapped at the reporter.
"You're not as interested in doing that because Newsom is a 'D'," he continued. "If Newsom was a Republican you would have nailed him to the wall for this!!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6c44861c-78fb-4679-883f-968848975c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Earlier this week, Trump dragged Newsom for neglectful policy that lead to water shortages in his state, right as it was needed most.
"Governor Gavin Newscum refused to sign the water restoration declaration put before him that would have allowed millions of gallons of water, from excess rain and snow melt from the North, to flow daily into many parts of California, including the areas that are currently burning in a virtually apocalyptic way," Trump wrote in a **[post on Truth Social](https://substack.com/redirect/e9274597-d181-4b68-82d8-ae79d3556dae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
Newsom's office quickly pushed back Trump's accusation of negligence **[in a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/bd698d93-89aa-4591-8b09-9ee9823fa182?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , **saying that there was no "water restoration declaration."
"There is no such document as the water restoration declaration - that is pure fiction," Izzy Gardon, Newsom's communications director said. "The Governor is focused on protecting people, not playing politics, and making sure firefighters have all the resources they need."
Trump's accusation might refer to his 2020 presidential memorandum aimed at increasing water flow from Northern to Southern California, which Newsom and environmental groups opposed due to concerns for endangered species and ecosystem health.
Newsom's refusal potentially limited the amount of water available for emergency situations like the wildfires. With Southern California often facing water scarcity, any obstruction to redirecting water could be seen as a direct impact on the state's ability to manage crises, including fires.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6c44861c-78fb-4679-883f-968848975c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

clean_body: 'Excuse me?!! If Newsom was a Republican you would have nailed him to THE WALL for this!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? 'Excuse me?!! If Newsom was a Republican you would have nailed him to THE WALL for this!!" Jan 11 | | | | | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for asking if Donald Trump's comments towards Gavin Newsom amid the California wildfires was "appropriate" for a president-elect. "Is it appropriate for people in your industry to try to create division and to try to create narratives every time these things happen?!!" DeSantis snapped at the reporter. "You're not as interested in doing that because Newsom is a 'D'," he continued. "If Newsom was a Republican you would have nailed him to the wall for this!!" Earlier this week, Trump dragged Newsom for neglectful policy that lead to water shortages in his state, right as it was needed most. "Governor Gavin Newscum refused to sign the water restoration declaration put before him that would have allowed millions of gallons of water, from excess rain and snow melt from the North, to flow daily into many parts of California, including the areas that are currently burning in a virtually apocalyptic way," Trump wrote in a . Newsom's office quickly pushed back Trump's accusation of negligence , saying that there was no "water restoration declaration." "There is no such document as the water restoration declaration - that is pure fiction," Izzy Gardon, Newsom's communications director said. "The Governor is focused on protecting people, not playing politics, and making sure firefighters have all the resources they need." Trump's accusation might refer to his 2020 presidential memorandum aimed at increasing water flow from Northern to Southern California, which Newsom and environmental groups opposed due to concerns for endangered species and ecosystem health. Newsom's refusal potentially limited the amount of water available for emergency situations like the wildfires. With Southern California often facing water scarcity, any obstruction to redirecting water could be seen as a direct impact on the state's ability to manage crises, including fires. | | POLL Would DeSantis have handled the CA fires better than Newsom? | ? ? ? name: Senate Alert
subject: President Trump’s Warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Corrupt Senate Democrats are trying to prevent President Trump’s nominees from being approved!

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NIS/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Friend,

President Trump had some words of motivation for our new GOP Senate majority as they work to outsmart and outwork the Democrats to confirm President Trump’s nominees:

_**[“We have a Country to run and many big problems to solve, mostly created by Democrats. REPUBLICANS, BE SMART AND TOUGH!!!” – President Trump](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NIS/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

Winning the election was the critical first step to Making America Great Again with President Trump and our new Senate majority. We must clean up all the messes made by Joe Biden’s failed administration and lead America into a prosperous future.

Our new majority must END Democrat attacks on the American Dream by supporting President Trump’s critical nominees who will fight with Senate Republicans to rebuild our country after Joe Biden’s destructive term.

It is going to be a tough fight to confirm President Trump’s nominees as Democrats smear strong nominees to slow down President Trump and Senate Republicans and stop us from achieving as much as possible with this majority.

_**[Pitch in now to support our fearless Republican Senators as they take on Democrats’ smear campaign and push back on lies spread about President Trump’s strong nominees.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9NIS/?__vbtrk=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY5MzI0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

Thank you,

Senate Republicans

subject: New way to beat depression (without sticking your fingers in cow poo)
body:
|
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuea57Iteknop5I2ITm5t4oxmf&s=JHGFLKPAHBDLFGDB&req=l%3DD0I2xuea3rIteknop5I2ITm5t4oxmf%26s%3DBLJGJFMACOHKGHDJ)
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
If you’re like most people, you probably know that psilocybin—the active compound in magic mushrooms—has been scientifically proven to help with depression, anxiety, and PTSD.

...But finding a reliable source for it can feel like a mission.

After all, who wants to go digging through cow poo just to find something that might work?

That's why we took matters into our own hands... Quite literally!

Introducing... the Easiest Way to Experience the Power of Magic Mushrooms—Without the Hassle Of Going Out And Finding Them Yourself, Or Buying Them From Some “Dodgy Guy” On The Street And Potentially Getting Arrested!

We’ve transformed real psilocybin mushrooms into a simple, easy-to-take supplement, and we’ll ship them right to your door, direct from our farm here in California.

Start your day with a single capsule that helps you:
* **Boost your mood** —Shake off those morning blues and feel more positive every day.
* **Enhance mental clarity** —Get the focus and sharpness you need to tackle your day with ease.
* **Increase energy naturally** —No more sluggish mornings or dragging yourself through the day.

And you can get started today with a full month’s supply of real psilocybin magic mushrooms with our Mighty Micro “Microdosing Starter Kit”.

_Here’s what’s inside each dose:_

150mg of organically grown psilocybin mushrooms (carefully grown and prepared for maximum potency)

A touch of ginger—to support digestion and metabolism (trust us; it doesn’t taste very nice without this. Yuck!)

That’s it. No fillers, no gimmicks. Just pure, effective ingredients that get results. FAST.

_Here's How Easy It Is to Take Your Daily Dose_

Taking your dose is a breeze. Just:
1. Pop a capsule with your morning coffee.
2. Blend it into a smoothie.
3. Or chew it like a children's vitamin.

It’s that simple. And once you find the right dose for you, you’ll experience a surge of good energy, positive emotions, and mental clarity that lasts throughout your day.

_Why Trust Us?_
* **Scientifically Backed** —Psilocybin microdosing has been shown to have life-changing benefits, backed by real research and studies from Harvard, Yale, & And Thomas Hopkins Medical University, amongst thousands of other places. You may have already read them.
* **Real Results** —Thousands of satisfied customers have already seen improvements in their mood, focus, and energy.
* **Organic & Safe**—We use only the highest-quality, organically grown mushrooms, from our own farm in california. Everything has been lab tested.
* **Risk-Free** —We stand behind our product with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, we'll give you a full refund. No questions asked.

Don’t let another day go by feeling stuck.

Order now and get your 1-month supply of real magic mushroom capsules for just $99—and get $1000 worth of FREE products for becoming a new customer—but only if you act today.

Click here to order now:

[https://mightymicro.co/op/starter-pack/ref/12/](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuea57Iteknop5I3ITm5t4oxmf&s=JHGFLKPAHBDLFGDB&req=l%3DD0I2xuea3rIteknop5I3ITm5t4oxmf%26s%3DBLJGJFMACOHKGHDJ)

Experience the benefits of magic mushrooms without the mess, and start feeling better today.

Best regards, Michael “The Mushroom Guy” Griswold

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: Trump’s second term:
body:
Let’s think back...
---
Derek, If you’re feeling tired after a long election year and worried about another Trump presidency, you’re certainly not alone. But here’s the truth: How we respond in this moment is critical. Our work right now is more important than ever. Let’s think back to Trump’s first term: He repeatedly tried to rip away access to health care for millions of people. He gave tax breaks to the wealthiest 1% at the expense of American families. He installed far-right Supreme Court justices who then voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. He refused to accept the results of the 2020 election and incited a deadly insurrection. And now, he and his allies will only feel more emboldened as they begin a second term. We know it’s a scary thought, Derek. It’s why we need your help now to build the strongest possible Democratic Party that can fight back, organize, and prevent Trump and his allies’ worst impulses from becoming our reality. [**Can you pitch in $3 now to help?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250111_2527_fr&refcode2=2549_22930333_iJKr49&akid=2549%2E22930333%2EiJKr49) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250111_2527_fr&refcode2=2549_22930333_iJKr49&akid=2549%2E22930333%2EiJKr49)**

Thank you in advance for stepping up today,
The Democrats
